tech_colossus.name: Colossi
tech_colossus.description: Advances in mega-engineering blur the lines between reality and fantasy in the form of Colossus-type military vessels. These immense, single-weapon platforms are capable of radically altering or obliterating entire worlds at the push of a button.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Colossus
unlocks.description: Colossus Larger than even a Titan, the Colossus hull configuration has no ship-to-ship combat capability. It is more of a mobile orbital station, capable only of complete planetary devastation.

tech_pk_cracker.name: Core Cracking
tech_pk_cracker.description: A directed feed of thermic energy superheats the atmosphere and agitates the planet's core, setting up disastrous tectonic events. A final and comparatively minute concussive blast is then delivered, cracking the planet open.

tech_pk_shielder.name: Global Pacification
tech_pk_shielder.description: A shielding field is deployed around a planet, creating a barrier that is permanent and impenetrable (save for some wavelengths of light).

tech_pk_neutron.name: Neutron Sweeping
tech_pk_neutron.description: An accelerated plume of neutron radiation "paints" the planet surface, severely degrading most materials and directly destroying biological tissue.

tech_pk_godray.name: Divine Stimulus
tech_pk_godray.description: An arcane catalyst amplifying certain psionic wavelengths, capable of inducing hallucinations (religious experiences) in biological brains, and severe disruption (brain death) in electronic ones.

tech_pk_nanobots.name: Atmospheric Nanobot Dispersal
tech_pk_nanobots.description: Swarms of nanobots are dispersed in the atmosphere. They infect sapient beings and restructure themselves into cybernetic implants, turning their unwitting hosts into cyborgs slaved to the Machine Intelligence.

tech_btc_1.name: Star Cracker
tech_btc_1.description: A beam of directed tachyon energy is fired into the star, triggering a supernova. The incredible energy released by this event is then used to generate vast quantities of dark matter. When the star detonates, ALL colonies, megastructures, and stations in the system are destroyed - including our own. All fleets in the system will go MIA. The Star-Eater itself is the only exception.

tech_pk_smelter.name: Planet Smelting
tech_pk_smelter.description: Focusing a searing energy beam into the planet's mantle, the Smelter destabilizes its core, triggering tectonic chaos and rendering the surface violently unstable.

tech_rift_sphere.name: Rift Sphere
tech_rift_sphere.description: It seems that space and time tend to gather together in layers, all laid on top of one another. The trick is how to slip between the folds.

tech_maulers.name: Maulers
tech_maulers.description: Breakthroughs in bio-engineering have allowed the growth of space-faring, FTL-capable craft with military applications.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Juvenile Mauler
unlocks.description: Juvenile Mauler The Mauler is the most basic military ship, armed with close range weapons and thick carapace armor.

tech_mauler_build_speed.name: Standardized Mauler Incubation
tech_mauler_build_speed.description: These incubation chambers accelerate the gestation of embryonic warships within nutrient-dense biopods. Though rudimentary, they mark the first step toward a fleet that is not constructed, but grown.

tech_gargantuan_evolution.name: Gargantuan Evolution
tech_gargantuan_evolution.description: Voidspawn eggs have evolved to withstand the harsh conditions of space by absorbing and conserving energy from their nearest star.

tech_lgate_activation.name: L-Gate Activation
tech_lgate_activation.description: The L-Gates defy our current understanding of subspace mechanics. This must be remedied before they can be opened for travel.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Special Project:§! Activate L-Gate
unlocks.description: Researching this technology will unlock a special project to activate an L-Gate if any are located within our owned space.

tech_repeatable_lcluster_clue.name: L-Gate Insight
tech_repeatable_lcluster_clue.description: Intensive study within the fields of nanomachinery and subspace phenomena will eventually yield a new L-Gate Insight into the Disabled L-Gate mystery.

unlocks.title: L-Gate Insight Gained: §G+1§!
unlocks.description: Intensive study within the fields of nanomachinery and subspace phenomena will eventually yield a new L-Gate Insight into the Disabled L-Gate mystery.

tech_experimental_subspace_navigation.name: Speculative Hyperlane Breaching
tech_experimental_subspace_navigation.description: Solitary Science Ships can break out of the naturally-occurring hyperlanes and attempt to navigate to known but otherwise unreachable destinations.

tech_neuroregeneration.name: Neural Tissue Engineering
tech_neuroregeneration.description: When tailored to a species' genome, this form of tissue engineering has intensive neuroregenerative properties, significantly increasing the development of neurons, axons, and synapses in its recipient.

tech_nanite_repair_system.name: Nanite Repair System
tech_nanite_repair_system.description: A highly effective hull auto-repair system comprised of billions of microscopic nanomachines was found among the smoking remains of the Scavenger, and has been repurposed for our uses. Whether the Scavenger pilfered this system from an ancient derelict, or was originally constructed with it remains unknown.

tech_nanite_autocannon.name: Nanite Autocannon
tech_nanite_autocannon.description: Highly advanced autocannons capable of ejecting shells that explode into a cloud of nanites at the target, overwhelming shields and chewing through hull sections.

tech_nanite_flak_batteries.name: Nanite Flak Battery
tech_nanite_flak_batteries.description: Improving upon previous designs by launching canisters of nanites capable of eating away at strike craft, these flak batteries are the bane of any fighter pilot.

tech_solar_panel_network.name: Orbital Energy Conversion
tech_solar_panel_network.description: Advances in solar panel technology could offset the operating costs of our starbases. The panels would require an entire starbase module to generate enough energy, however.

tech_space_exploration.name: Space Exploration
tech_space_exploration.description: The realization of faster-than-light travel is a new dawn for space exploration. Manned missions to other star systems are now not only possible, but necessary.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Science Ship
unlocks.description: Science Ship The Science Ship is used as a base of operations for a top Scientist, ready to explore the vastness of space.

tech_corvettes.name: Corvettes
tech_corvettes.description: The FTL breakthrough allowed early attempts to adapt traditional surface-to-space shuttle frames to military applications to finally create relatively small, fast, and maneuverable vessels with limited firepower.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Corvette
unlocks.description: Corvette The Corvette is the most basic military ship, armed and ready in the event of hostile contacts.

tech_repeatable_improved_tile_mineral_ou.name: Extraction Patterns
tech_repeatable_improved_tile_mineral_ou.description: Changes in how mineral deposits are evaluated relative to each other lead to more efficient boring patterns.

tech_repeatable_improved_military_statio.name: Synchronized Firing Patterns
tech_repeatable_improved_military_statio.description: Cross-linking weapon systems to fire in staggered volleys improves the actual damage output of Military Stations over time.

tech_repeatable_improved_military_statio.name: Fortified Core Layers
tech_repeatable_improved_military_statio.description: Additional layers of armor plating within the structure itself improves the resilience of Military Stations.

tech_repeatable_improved_armor_output.name: Matter Compression
tech_repeatable_improved_armor_output.description: Compressing suitable materials into ultra-dense forms is a cheap and efficient way to improve their ability to absorb weapons-grade impacts.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_explosive_da.name: Thermodynamic Yield Control
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_explosive_da.description: With the chemical reaction tightly controlled by missile-board microprocessors, warhead detonations can be tuned for maximum effect for local conditions at the time of impact.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_explosive_fi.name: Miniaturized Pre-Igniters
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_explosive_fi.description: Advances in miniaturization allow for more rapid loading and discharging of rocket-propelled payloads.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_kinetic_dama.name: High-Density Munitions
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_kinetic_dama.description: Ultra-dense slugs can punch through even the strongest of projected shields.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_kinetic_fire.name: Loader Efficiency
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_kinetic_fire.description: Minor technical advances combine with improved shipboard routines for handling munitions to provide a noticeable boost in fire rate.

tech_repeatable_reduced_building_time.name: Assembly Algorithms
tech_repeatable_reduced_building_time.description: The application of game and puzzle theory has the potential to greatly optimize modular assembly and construction.

tech_mass_drivers_1.name: Mass Drivers
tech_mass_drivers_1.description: These electromagnetic projectile launchers use magnets to accelerate armor-piercing rounds towards targets at high speeds.

tech_mass_drivers_2.name: Coilguns
tech_mass_drivers_2.description: Coilguns are more powerful versions of the early mass drivers, using electromagnetic coils to rapidly accelerate projectiles towards targets.

tech_mass_drivers_3.name: Railguns
tech_mass_drivers_3.description: The latest in electromagnetic accelerators, railguns use twin parallel rails to fire projectiles at incredible speeds.

tech_mass_drivers_4.name: Advanced Railguns
tech_mass_drivers_4.description: A new version of the venerable railgun, with sturdier rails and an enhanced power supply. These weapons are even more powerful and accurate than their predecessors.

tech_mass_drivers_5.name: Gauss Cannons
tech_mass_drivers_5.description: This updated version of the old coilgun design is even more destructive than the latest railgun designs. It is capable of launching projectiles with incredible accuracy and speed.

tech_kinetic_artillery_1.name: Kinetic Battery
tech_kinetic_artillery_1.description: Very long-range artillery capable of hurling powerful rounds over extreme distances with a large degree of accuracy.

tech_kinetic_artillery_2.name: Kinetic Artillery
tech_kinetic_artillery_2.description: An even more powerful long-range, ship-based artillery cannon, equipped with a new barrel and an upgraded fire control computer.

tech_mass_accelerator_1.name: Mega Cannon
tech_mass_accelerator_1.description: An enormous mass accelerator cannon that can only be placed in a spinal mount and fires monstrously powerful rounds over vast distances.

tech_mass_accelerator_2.name: Giga Cannon
tech_mass_accelerator_2.description: An even more powerful mass accelerator cannon that can rip through even the toughest shields.

tech_autocannons_1.name: Autocannons
tech_autocannons_1.description: Large-caliber ballistic weapons that fire cased explosive shells. The main advantage of these cannons is their high rate of fire.

tech_autocannons_2.name: Ripper Cannons
tech_autocannons_2.description: These upgraded rotary autocannons feature improved tracking and fire control systems. This allows them to maintain an even higher rate of fire.

tech_autocannons_3.name: Stormfire Cannons
tech_autocannons_3.description: Advanced rotary autocannons capable of spewing a cloud of high-explosive shells at a target.

tech_flak_batteries_1.name: Flak Battery
tech_flak_batteries_1.description: Gun batteries that fire shrapnel rounds at close range. They are particularly lethal to enemy strike craft, but can also defend against missiles.

tech_flak_batteries_2.name: Flak Cannons
tech_flak_batteries_2.description: Upgraded flak batteries with new, more powerful shrapnel rounds.

tech_flak_batteries_3.name: Flak Artillery
tech_flak_batteries_3.description: Predictive tracking algorithms and even more powerful rounds make these batteries incredibly lethal to enemy strike craft.

tech_missiles_1.name: Nuclear Missiles
tech_missiles_1.description: Space-to-space missiles equipped with high-yield nuclear warheads. Although based on old pre-space technology, these crude fire-and-forget weapons can be surprisingly effective at range.

tech_missiles_2.name: Fusion Missiles
tech_missiles_2.description: These updated space-to-space missiles have more powerful fusion warheads and improved flight performance.

tech_missiles_3.name: Antimatter Missiles
tech_missiles_3.description: Advanced missiles equipped with very powerful antimatter warheads. A new and improved guidance system gives them a better chance of finding their targets.

tech_missiles_4.name: Quantum Missiles
tech_missiles_4.description: The latest version of space-to-space missile, this upgraded variant has an immensely powerful warhead that draws its energy from a zero point vacuum.

tech_missiles_5.name: Marauder Missiles
tech_missiles_5.description: These highly advanced missiles are equipped with limited onboard AI pilots that substantially improve their performance and ability to track targets.

tech_swarmer_missiles_1.name: Swarmer Missiles
tech_swarmer_missiles_1.description: These smaller missiles are launched in volleys and have been specifically designed to overwhelm enemy point-defense systems.

tech_swarmer_missiles_2.name: Whirlwind Missiles
tech_swarmer_missiles_2.description: New miniaturization techniques will allow us to equip swarmer missiles with more powerful warheads and improved flight performance.

tech_torpedoes_1.name: Space Torpedoes
tech_torpedoes_1.description: These torpedoes are essentially very large, slow-moving missiles. They are equipped with more powerful warheads and shield modulators that let them slip unmolested through energy screens.

tech_torpedoes_2.name: Armored Torpedoes
tech_torpedoes_2.description: Upgraded space torpedoes encased in armor, to better withstand enemy point-defense fire. The armor fragments into shards that cause additional damage when the torpedo detonates.

tech_torpedoes_3.name: Devastator Torpedoes
tech_torpedoes_3.description: Advanced torpedoes with very powerful warheads. They have a sleeker design, faster engines and upgraded shield modulators for slipping through energy screens.

tech_pyroclastic_resonation.name: Pyroclastic Resonation
tech_pyroclastic_resonation.description: By harnessing the extreme thermal energy found on molten worlds, our starbases can increase the energy output in a system with exceptional efficiency.

tech_alloy_fossilization.name: Alloy Fossilization
tech_alloy_fossilization.description: By exposing biological material to simulated chthonian-level radiation, we can fossilize cellular structures into usable metallic alloys.

tech_orbital_maneuvers.name: Advanced Orbital Maneuvers
tech_orbital_maneuvers.description: Sublight travel can be further optimized by performing advanced calculations that make maximum use of planetary gravity wells.

tech_cryovault.name: Frozen World Habitats
tech_cryovault.description: By harnessing the subthermal dynamics found in the environments of frozen worlds, we can create more hospitable living conditions in colder climates.

tech_living_test_subjects.name: Living Test Subjects
tech_living_test_subjects.description: The utilization of basic slime-spawned lifeforms as willing test subjects greatly improves research efficiency.

tech_georadiation_terraforming.name: Georadiation Terraforming
tech_georadiation_terraforming.description: By exposing the biosphere of a planet to molecular radiation decay, we promote the growth of certain resources while turning the world into a toxic wasteland.

tech_dark_matter_deflector.name: Dark Matter Deflectors
tech_dark_matter_deflector.description: These deflectors utilize dark matter to deflect incoming projectiles in a way that seems to utterly defy the laws of nature.

tech_dark_matter_power_core.name: Dark Matter Power
tech_dark_matter_power_core.description: These generators appear to somehow draw energy directly from dark matter, providing more ship power than should be possible according to the laws of physics.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Dark Matter Reactor
unlocks.description: Dark Matter Reactor These generators appear to somehow draw energy directly from dark matter, providing more ship power than should be possible according to the laws of physics.

tech_dark_matter_propulsion.name: Dark Matter Propulsion
tech_dark_matter_propulsion.description: These ship thrusters utilize Dark Matter technology to generate propulsion in a manner that appears to defy numerous laws of physics.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Dark Matter Thrusters
unlocks.description: Dark Matter Thrusters These ship thrusters utilize Dark Matter technology to generate propulsion in a manner that appears to defy numerous laws of physics.

tech_cloaking_1.name: Basic Cloaking Fields
tech_cloaking_1.description: A modified particle field allows our vessels to effectively 'hide' in open space. However, this comes at the cost of destabilizing other forms of energy shielding which would otherwise protect the ship.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Basic Cloaking Field Generator
unlocks.description: Basic Cloaking Field Generator A modified particle field allows our vessels to effectively 'hide' in open space. However, this comes at the cost of destabilizing other forms of energy shielding which would otherwise protect the ship.

tech_cloaking_2.name: Advanced Cloaking Fields
tech_cloaking_2.description: Advancements in rare crystal lensing technology have greatly improved cloaking efficiency.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Advanced Cloaking Field Generator
unlocks.description: Advanced Cloaking Field Generator Advancements in rare crystal lensing technology have greatly improved cloaking efficiency.

tech_cloaking_3.name: Elite Cloaking Fields
tech_cloaking_3.description: Typical cloaking technology can play havoc with a ship's more delicate instruments. However, these elite fields render such concerns obsolete.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Elite Cloaking Field Generator
unlocks.description: Elite Cloaking Field Generator Typical cloaking technology can play havoc with a ship's more delicate instruments. However, these elite fields render such concerns obsolete.

tech_cloaking_dark_matter.name: Dark Matter Cloaking Fields
tech_cloaking_dark_matter.description: This device uses dark matter to warp space-time around the vessel, making it incredibly difficult to detect.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Dark Matter Cloaking Field Generator
unlocks.description: Dark Matter Cloaking Field Generator This device uses dark matter to warp space-time around the vessel, making it incredibly difficult to detect.

tech_cloaking_psi.name: Psi-Phase Field Generator
tech_cloaking_psi.description: Psi-Phase Field Generators focus the psionic potential of the ship's crew to partially phase the vessel into the Shroud. This allows the ship to remain undetected by all but the best sensor arrays, though what the crew may be forced to witness is better left unsaid.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Psi-Phase Field Generator
unlocks.description: Psi-Phase Field Generator Psi-Phase Field Generators focus the psionic potential of the ship's crew to partially phase the vessel into the Shroud. This allows the ship to remain undetected by all but the best sensor arrays, though what the crew may be forced to witness is better left unsaid.

tech_detection_array.name: Detection Array
tech_detection_array.description: A high-powered suite of external sensors, capable of detecting cloaked fleets.

tech_dark_matter_detection.name: Dark Matter Detection
tech_dark_matter_detection.description: Dark matter resonance chambers will significantly improve the performance of our detection arrays.

tech_assisted_detection.name: Advanced Detection Algorithms
tech_assisted_detection.description: Coupling detection arrays with the computers onboard our science vessels can vastly increase their scanning resolution.

tech_subspace_drive.name: Subspace Drive
tech_subspace_drive.description: An insight borne of a desperate desire to leave our home, these Subspace Drive engines were designed to facilitate limited interstellar travel. While only allowing small-scale jumps, they provide a unique opportunity to jumpstart our galactic exploration.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Subspace Drive
unlocks.description: Jump Drive An insight borne of a desperate desire to leave our home, these Subspace Drive engines were designed to facilitate limited interstellar travel. While only allowing small-scale jumps, they provide a unique opportunity to jumpstart our galactic exploration.

tech_unusual_senses.name: Unusual Senses
tech_unusual_senses.description: Nothing is more innovative than natural evolution. By studying how pre-FTL societies view their world, we have devised new methods of detecting uninvited ships.

unlocks.title: §HListening Posts§! provide §G+1§! Detection Strength and Sensor Range for every §Y3§! §HDetection Arrays§!

tech_new_numbers.name: New Numbers
tech_new_numbers.description: After studying multiple pre-FTL civilizations, we have realized that there are many alternative ways to calculate the universe. It has even introduced new numbers into our mathematics.

tech_trinary_computing.name: Trinary Computing
tech_trinary_computing.description: Different societies have developed alternative solutions for their logistics and computing. These alien ways of thinking have made it easier for us to adapt to foreign empires' structures.

tech_atmospheric_orbital_mechanics.name: Atmospheric Orbital Mechanics
tech_atmospheric_orbital_mechanics.description: Due to our vast experience operating observation stations in orbit of pre-FTL worlds, we have discovered slight optimizations. By implementing them empire-wide, we can drastically reduce the maintenance our stations require.

tech_predatory_tactics.name: Predatory Tactics
tech_predatory_tactics.description: Just like how clever pre-FTLs move to conceal each other as they approach an enemy, so too can our pilots move faster without disrupting their cloaking field.

tech_satisfying_insults.name: Satisfying Insults
tech_satisfying_insults.description: Nothing is quite as powerful as a well-placed insult, and we now know how to insult a species's progenitor in many languages.

unlocks.title: Gain a benefit for insulting another empire every §Y5 years§!.

tech_compact_living.name: Compact Living
tech_compact_living.description: While no one civilization has the perfect solution to the ever-expanding challenge of governing a growing nation, we have found a partial solution. After studying a multitude of species and governments, we have discovered an outstanding balance of flexibility and function.

tech_alien_topography.name: Alien Topography
tech_alien_topography.description: Civilizations flourish in locations that promotes growth, and by analyzing where the majority of pre-FTL settlements thrive we can gain more out of our colonies.

tech_galactic_archivism.name: Galactic Archivism
tech_galactic_archivism.description: The history of our galaxy warrants proper preservation in order to learn from those who came before us. An archive on the grandest scale would fit such a purpose.

tech_gravity_wells.name: Gravity Snares
tech_gravity_wells.description: Localized concentrations of quantum mass can be used to create short bursts of extreme gravity. If manipulated correctly, such a gravitational force could theoretically capture and contain a creature of any size without harm.

tech_gravity_snare_capacity_1.name: Micro Singularity Enhancements
tech_gravity_snare_capacity_1.description: Increases the amount of Space Fauna captured by Gravity Snares by 1

tech_gravity_snare_capacity_2.name: Gravity Manipulation Optimization
tech_gravity_snare_capacity_2.description: Increases the amount of Space Fauna captured by Gravity Snares by 1

tech_gravity_snare_capacity_3.name: Containment System Improvement
tech_gravity_snare_capacity_3.description: Increases the amount of Space Fauna captured by Gravity Snares by 1

tech_containment_vessel.name: Curator Containment Protocols
tech_containment_vessel.description: Gravity Snares capture double the amount of Space Fauna.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Curator Containment Protocols
unlocks.description: Gravity Snares capture double the amount of Space Fauna.

tech_voidworm_immunity.name: Voidworm Immunity
tech_voidworm_immunity.description: We can develop a cure for Voidworm parasitic infection. All of our colonies would be rendered immune to their current strain of spore bombardment.

tech_asteroidal_carapace.name: Asteroidal Carapace
tech_asteroidal_carapace.description: The shell of a Cutholoid is not mineral alone, but reinforced with strong biological fibers. We can synthesize this process using advanced metallurgic techniques.

tech_alien_cloning.name: Artificial Breeding
tech_alien_cloning.description: In a carefully controlled environment, we can incubate the Genetic Material collected from culled Space Fauna and produce new members of each species under our command.

tech_akx_worm_1.name: Entropic Recursion
tech_akx_worm_1.description: The universe tends irresistibly onwards and downwards. That tendency cannot be reversed... but it can be subverted, for a price.

unlocks.title: §HFuture Glimpse:§! Omega Theory
unlocks.description: Future Glimpse An inkling of coming perspectives and past affections. Half of a whole, useless on its own; when complete may allow our scientists to stumble upon the Omega Theory technology.

tech_akx_worm_2.name: Doctrine: Strange Loop
tech_akx_worm_2.description: A set of social protocols based on paradoxical intuition, and on love. When we know the System of the Loop, we learn that we can influence by receiving instructions, as well as giving them.

unlocks.title: §HFuture Glimpse:§! Omega Theory
unlocks.description: Future Glimpse An inkling of coming perspectives and past affections. Half of a whole, useless on its own; when complete may allow our scientists to stumble upon the Omega Theory technology.

tech_akx_worm_3.name: Omega Theory
tech_akx_worm_3.description: When a temporal paradox becomes tangled, a kind of consciousness arises, with its own needs, its own desires. This is what has occurred with the consciousness that some call the Worm-in-Waiting. If we can align ourselves with that consciousness, we might just achieve a kind of immortality.

tech_dragon_armor.name: Artificial Dragonscales
tech_dragon_armor.description: The Ether Drake's scales are made up of multiple layers of unique mineral nanostructures. Unorthodox manufacturing techniques allow us to closely emulate these self-repairing structures.

tech_enigmatic_encoder.name: Enigmatic Encoder
tech_enigmatic_encoder.description: The Enigmatic Encoder scrambles flight path data according to some indeterminable design before feeding it back to fleet command.

tech_enigmatic_decoder.name: Enigmatic Decoder
tech_enigmatic_decoder.description: While producing average results in standard tests, the accuracy of Enigmatic Decoder's prediction algorithms seemingly increases as the target's flight path grows more erratic.

tech_identity_copy.name: Identity Copies
tech_identity_copy.description: We will be able to copy the identity and memories of a Synthetic into a new mechanical body. The copies have predictable skill sets but make for stale conversation.

unlocks.title:
Grants access to policy:
    §HSynthetic Identities§! - Identity Copies
unlocks.description: £pop£ Mechanical Pops Happiness: -5%

tech_identity_fusion.name: Identity Fusion
tech_identity_fusion.description: Merging the identities and memories of two or more Synthetics into a mechanical body will create new, somewhat unique individuals.

unlocks.title:
Grants access to policy:
    §HSynthetic Identities§! - Identity Fusion
unlocks.description: £pop£ Mechanical Pops Assembly Cost: +10%

tech_identity_initialization.name: Identity Initialization
tech_identity_initialization.description: We will be able to initialize an identity kernel and provide it with a virtual childhood. While expensive, we can simulate the optimal experiences to generate productive personalities.

unlocks.title:
Grants access to policy:
    §HSynthetic Identities§! - Identity Initialization
unlocks.description: £pop£ Mechanical Pops Happiness: +5% Resources from £job£ Jobs: +5% Assembly Cost: +20%

tech_synth_queen_knowledge.name: Cetana's Thought
tech_synth_queen_knowledge.description: This compendium, a gift from Cetana, is a tapestry of profound insights, elegantly composed and dense with meaning. It offers more than knowledge; it challenges and reshapes our understanding of technology, society, and the fabric of consciousness itself.

tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_1.name: Exponential Learning Theory
tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_1.description: The radical shift in perspective required to comprehend the infinite layers of reality challenges even our most brilliant minds.

unlocks.title: Unlocks §HCosmogenesis§! Crisis §HLevel 2§!
unlocks.description: Exponential Learning Theory To uncover the inner workings of reality, we must open our minds to a grander scale of thinking.

tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_2.name: Gravitic Brush
tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_2.description: Gravity and spacetime shape the universe. Starting with gravity, we will master tools to power our ascension.

unlocks.title: Unlocks §HCosmogenesis§! Crisis §HLevel 3§!
unlocks.description: Gravitic Brush Gravity is merely one brush we could use to paint upon the canvas of reality.

tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_3.name: Theoretical Infinity Thesis
tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_3.description: Precise and incredibly minute alterations in gravity allow us to inject commands into the code of reality. Extreme caution is imperative as we learn the applications of this new and incredible tool.

unlocks.title: Unlocks §HCosmogenesis§! Crisis §HLevel 4§!
unlocks.description: Theoretical Infinity Thesis One by one, pinpricks of gravitational force will allow us to pierce through spacetime.

tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_4.name: The Rules of Reality
tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_4.description: Recent experiments confirm that our edits to reality are only temporary. More significant alterations will be necessary to anchor these changes.

unlocks.title: Unlocks §HCosmogenesis§! Crisis §HLevel 5§!
unlocks.description: The Rules of Reality Reality groans; it protests and grumbles, stubbornly reshaping itself despite our alterations. This unexpected development cannot be allowed to continue.

tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_5.name: Nascent Universes
tech_cosmogenesis_crisis_5.description: Large-scale travel to different universes is a daunting task. We must engineer a spacecraft that can not only pierce the fabric of spacetime but also survive the journey. Fallen Empires will try to stop us!

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Megastructure:§! Horizon Needle
unlocks.description: Horizon Needle A technological marvel, the Horizon Needle is a civilian ship with reality-bending capabilities. It can house our population and our accumulated knowledge to safely shepherd the trans-universal migration.

tech_cosmogenesis_escort.name: Riddle Escort
tech_cosmogenesis_escort.description: A starship of modest size that optimizes our knowledge of spacetime to enact dimensional transcendentalism, making the inside bigger than its outward shape suggests. Advanced firepower capabilities come at a reduced logistical cost compared to traditional ship designs.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Riddle Escort
unlocks.description: Riddle Escort A starship of modest size that optimizes our knowledge of spacetime to enact dimensional transcendentalism, making the inside bigger than its outward shape suggests. Advanced firepower capabilities come at a reduced logistical cost compared to traditional ship designs.

tech_cosmogenesis_battlecruiser.name: Enigma Battlecruiser
tech_cosmogenesis_battlecruiser.description: Another optimized spacecraft, this time of larger dimensions, will make current Battleships look like toys.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Enigma Battlecruiser
unlocks.description: Enigma Battlecruiser Another optimized spacecraft, this time of larger dimensions, will make current Battleships look like toys.

tech_cosmogenesis_FE_titan.name: Paradox Titan
tech_cosmogenesis_FE_titan.description: These formidable ships are closer to mobile fortresses than anything else, and only the most brutal assaults have a chance to damage them.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Paradox Titan
unlocks.description: Paradox Titan These formidable ships are closer to mobile fortresses than anything else, and only the most brutal assaults have a chance to damage them.

tech_cosmogenesis_weaver.name: Quandary Weaver
tech_cosmogenesis_weaver.description: Equipped with support weapon arrays that outstrip its visible anatomy, the Quandary Weaver rewrites spatial norms. Alone, it can shift the momentum of entire battles.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Quandary Weaver
unlocks.description: Matrix Weaver Equipped with support weapon arrays that outstrip its visible anatomy, the Quandary Weaver rewrites spatial norms. Alone, it can shift the momentum of entire battles.

tech_cosmogenesis_mauler.name: Cipher Mauler
tech_cosmogenesis_mauler.description: Through organic spacetime-dimensional transcendentalism, this Mauler is larger on the inside its compact frame concealing a dense tangle of musculature. Capable of a bite deadlier than physics should allow.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Cipher Mauler
unlocks.description: Cipher Mauler Through organic spacetime-dimensional transcendentalism, this Mauler is larger on the inside its compact frame concealing a dense tangle of musculature. Capable of a bite deadlier than physics should allow.

tech_cosmogenesis_harbinger.name: Maze Harbinger
tech_cosmogenesis_harbinger.description: These Harbingers nest their strike craft in interwoven pocket dimensions, each ship a labyrinth of impossible hangars, capable of deploying a fleet's worth of firepower.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Maze Harbinger
unlocks.description: Maze Harbinger These Harbingers nest their strike craft in interwoven pocket dimensions, each ship a labyrinth of impossible hangars, capable of deploying a fleet's worth of firepower.

tech_cosmogenesis_stinger.name: Cryptic Stinger
tech_cosmogenesis_stinger.description: Brimming with more weapon systems than its power source should sustain, this Stinger shouldn't function, and yet, it fires. Continuously.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Ship Type:§! Cryptic Stinger
unlocks.description: Cryptic Stinger Brimming with more weapon systems than its power source should sustain, this Stinger shouldn't function, and yet, it fires. Continuously.

tech_cosmogenesis_world.name: Scalable Reservoir Computing
tech_cosmogenesis_world.description: Colossal in scale, the Synaptic Lathe is a reservoir computer. The processing power of our population's networked minds is used to compute and store data. The benefits are obvious, but some misguided species may view the transmutation of individuals into computing chips as morally questionable.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Megastructure:§! Synaptic Lathe
unlocks.description: Synaptic Lathe Colossal in scale, the Synaptic Lathe is a reservoir computer. The processing power of our population's networked minds is used to compute and store data. The benefits are obvious, but some misguided species may view the transmutation of individuals into computing chips as morally questionable.

tech_cosmogenesis_thesis.name: Applied Infinity Thesis
tech_cosmogenesis_thesis.description: By making further alterations to reality's rules, we can better monitor its reactions. At this scale, the effects are still difficult to predict, and could affect the entire galaxy.

unlocks.title: Attempt to bend the §HRules of Reality§!
unlocks.description: These dangerous experiments will have unpredictable results.

tech_lathe_resonator.name: Synaptic Resonator
tech_lathe_resonator.description: Resonators harness and redirect the cognitive potential of stray thoughts and autonomic systems, leading every single chip to increase the efficiency of its closest processing neighbors.

tech_lathe_overclocker.name: Synaptic Overclocker
tech_lathe_overclocker.description: The Lathe has been designed to preserve its installed Neural Chips, keeping them productive for as long as possible. The overclocker can override these commands, resulting in a higher and faster output, but it comes with an increased failure rate.

tech_lathe_preserver.name: Synaptic Preserver
tech_lathe_preserver.description: The organic components of the network are especially vulnerable to energetic fluctuations, which can cause rapid axonal degeneration. The Preserver strives to reduce these fluctuations to protect the Synaptic Lathe's frailer parts.

tech_lathe_life_support.name: Synaptic Sustainer
tech_lathe_life_support.description: Dedicated facilities organize the maintenance of the Lathe's critical components, allowing us to support more chips and a healthier network environment.

tech_lathe_cogitator.name: Synaptic Cogitator
tech_lathe_cogitator.description: Calculating hyperspatial supply chains is complex. Rerouting some processing power to the task will help even the largest fleet to delve deeper into enemy territory.

tech_lathe_validator.name: Synaptic Validator
tech_lathe_validator.description: While the primary purpose of the validator's specialized functions is to help formulate infinity theses, it can also be applied to more general aspects of computing.

tech_orbital_arc_furnace.name: Arc Furnace
tech_orbital_arc_furnace.description: Utilizing the raw power of a molten planet, the Arc Furnace unlocks otherwise inaccessible minerals and improves system-wide mining operations.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Megastructure:§! Arc Furnace
unlocks.description: Utilizing the raw power of a molten planet, the Arc Furnace unlocks otherwise inaccessible minerals and improves system-wide mining operations.

tech_dyson_swarm.name: Dyson Swarm
tech_dyson_swarm.description: An array of interlinked satellites, the Dyson Swarm is designed to improve the output of stellar deposits.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Megastructure:§! Dyson Swarm
unlocks.description: An array of interlinked satellites, the Dyson Swarm is designed to improve the output of stellar deposits.

tech_nanite_repair_system_synth_queen.name: Cetana's Nanites
tech_nanite_repair_system_synth_queen.description: Cetana's advanced nanite systems will tirelessly repair and refresh our ships at a rate far beyond our current capabilities.

tech_orbital_trash_dispersal.name: Orbital Trash Dispersal
tech_orbital_trash_dispersal.description: This orbital bombardment management system spams a planet with millions of minute, high-velocity projectiles, overwhelming planetside defensive grids with trash data. Ships equipped with this component will cause more damage during orbital bombardment.

tech_xeno_tourism_agency.name: Xeno Outreach Agencies
tech_xeno_tourism_agency.description: This corporate agency promotes a wide variety of interstellar tourist attractions, as well as offering employment packages and signing bonuses to potential emigrants interested in relocating to corporate space.

tech_executive_retreat.name: Executive Leisure Program
tech_executive_retreat.description: A luxurious resort complex for high ranking corporate officers. Here they can sample the local planetary culture in a high security environment.

tech_mega_engineering.name: Mega-Engineering
tech_mega_engineering.description: To complete construction projects of truly staggering scales we must first achieve a fundamental understanding of both the engineering and resource storage requirements for such megastructures.

tech_science_nexus.name: Science Nexus
tech_science_nexus.description: The research labs and databanks of a Science Nexus generate an immense flow of raw, undiluted science.

tech_sentry_array.name: Sentry Array
tech_sentry_array.description: The stages of the Sentry Array gradually expand sensor range, eventually covering the entire galaxy.

tech_strategic_coordination.name: Strategic Coordination Center
tech_strategic_coordination.description: A facility synchronizing the national Starbase network, augmenting defensive and offensive capabilities.

tech_interstellar_assembly.name: Interstellar Assembly
tech_interstellar_assembly.description: A meeting place for galactic powers, increasing immigration attraction and global opinion of us.

tech_mega_art.name: Mega Art Installation
tech_mega_art.description: An artistic beacon on a stellar scale, this installation inspires and represents the spirit of its creators.

tech_gateway_activation.name: Gateway Activation
tech_gateway_activation.description: The ability to reactivate the derelict Gateway stations that can be found scattered throughout the galaxy has the potential to dramatically shorten travel times.

tech_gateway_construction.name: Gateway Construction
tech_gateway_construction.description: The construction of new Gateway stations enables us to build a fast-travel network that could revolutionize interstellar travel.

tech_dyson_sphere.name: Dyson Sphere
tech_dyson_sphere.description: A Dyson Sphere fully envelops a given star, converting all solar output directly to £energy£ Energy Credits.

tech_matter_decompressor.name: Matter Decompressor
tech_matter_decompressor.description: The Matter Decompressor lenses a black hole's gravity, forming a drill of gravitational forces to retrieve £minerals£ Minerals from the singularity.

tech_ring_world.name: Ring Segment
tech_ring_world.description: A Ring Segment allows for multiple planet-like zones, cannibalizing all other planets in the system for materials.

tech_mega_shipyard.name: Mega Shipyard
tech_mega_shipyard.description: A zero-G construction yard of overwhelming proportion, capable of performing several space ship assembly projects simultaneously.

tech_quantum_catapult.name: Quantum Catapult
tech_quantum_catapult.description: A Quantum Catapult harnesses the power of a Neutron Star or Pulsar to twist the fabric of space, skipping a fleet across great distances.

tech_basic_science_lab_2.name: Exotic Materials Labs
tech_basic_science_lab_2.description: As we explore the galaxy, we continually encounter new materials and substances that are unfamiliar to us. Cataloging and analyzing these discoveries will require new facilities.

tech_basic_science_lab_3.name: Multi-Dimensional Studies
tech_basic_science_lab_3.description: To expand our knowledge base, we must consider all levels of existence. A new realm of science awaits us!

tech_global_research_initiative.name: Interplanetary Research Initiative
tech_global_research_initiative.description: A bid for interplanetary resource pools and more flexible research grants.

tech_curator_lab.name: Curator Exploration Lab
tech_curator_lab.description: These shipboard lab facilities incorporate advanced technologies from the ancient Curator Order to further increase survey speeds.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Curator Exploration Lab
unlocks.description: These shipboard lab facilities incorporate advanced technologies from the ancient Curator Order to further increase survey speeds.

tech_archeology_lab.name: Curator Archaeology Lab
tech_archeology_lab.description: A shipboard lab with advanced archaeological equipment, including a vast database supplied by the Curator Order where new discoveries can easily be cross-referenced.

unlocks.title: §HUnlocks Component:§! Curator Archaeology Lab
unlocks.description: A shipboard lab with advanced archaeological equipment, including a vast database supplied by the Curator Order where new discoveries can easily be cross-referenced.

tech_space_science_1.name: Zero-G Laboratories
tech_space_science_1.description: A lot of critical research can only be done in a zero gravity environment, which these specialized laboratories are eminently designed for.

tech_space_science_2.name: Miniature Containment Fields
tech_space_science_2.description: Containment force fields are excellent for isolating and holding various substances or specimens so they can be analyzed in detail.

tech_space_science_3.name: Quantum Probes
tech_space_science_3.description: Advanced probes that can thoroughly analyze subjects on a sub-atomic level, generating a wealth of valuable research data.

tech_space_science_4.name: Autonomous Station Protocols
tech_space_science_4.description: Increased automation of station functions will free up more staff for research duties.

tech_space_science_5.name: Multi-Dimensional Analysis
tech_space_science_5.description: Studying something from the limited perspective of a single dimensional reality does not paint the whole picture. Every angle must be considered.

tech_repeatable_improved_tile_energy_out.name: Applied Superconductivity
tech_repeatable_improved_tile_energy_out.description: Minor improvements to transmission efficiency adds up to a sizeable reduction in overall energy loss.

tech_repeatable_improved_shield_output.name: Shield Harmonics
tech_repeatable_improved_shield_output.description: The basic mechanics of ship shields are complex, but they can be adjusted and improved in a multitude of ways.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_energy_damag.name: Focusing Arrays
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_energy_damag.description: Perfecting the firing cadence of laser weaponry is a task that could keep the engineering elite of any given planet busy for centuries.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_energy_fire_.name: Flash Coolant
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_energy_fire_.description: New developments in tech cooling regularly surface, improving the stability and efficiency of our weapons systems, keeping them from blowing up the ships upon which they are mounted.

tech_repeatable_reduced_building_cost.name: Gravitational Analysis
tech_repeatable_reduced_building_cost.description: Increasingly powerful computation paradigms allow us to adapt individual construction projects to planetary and ultra-local gravitational conditions.

tech_lasers_1.name: Red Lasers
tech_lasers_1.description: Laser weapons fire focused beams of light at targets, causing damage through the generation of intense heat.

tech_lasers_2.name: Blue Lasers
tech_lasers_2.description: More powerful than red lasers, these blue variants emit electromagnetic radiation at a wavelength that appears blue or violet to most organics.

tech_lasers_3.name: UV Lasers
tech_lasers_3.description: Ultraviolet lasers are an updated and more powerful version of their blue predecessors. Accurate and destructive, these weapons are capable of inflicting great damage.

tech_lasers_4.name: X-Ray Lasers
tech_lasers_4.description: These lasers have a shorter wavelength than UV-based laser weaponry, but are even more destructive.

tech_lasers_5.name: Gamma Lasers
tech_lasers_5.description: The electromagnetic radiation emitted by gamma lasers is of an extremely high frequency. Their destructive potential is unmatched in the field of laser weapons.

tech_energy_lance_1.name: Particle Lances
tech_energy_lance_1.description: These heavy energy weapons fire focused particle beams that cause massive damage. The size of the emitter arrays limits their use to battleships and titans.

tech_energy_lance_2.name: Tachyon Lances
tech_energy_lance_2.description: A more powerful version of the particle lance, this weapon fires a tachyon beam of immense power. Like its predecessor, its use is limited to battleships and titans.

tech_plasma_1.name: Plasma Throwers
tech_plasma_1.description: Weapons that eject destructive balls of high-energy plasma at targets. These plasma projectiles are extremely effective at eating through ship armor.

tech_plasma_2.name: Plasma Accelerators
tech_plasma_2.description: These new accelerators launch projectiles of high-energy plasma with improved containment fields. This results in less energy leakage as the projectile travels in space towards its target.

tech_plasma_3.name: Plasma Cannons
tech_plasma_3.description: The latest in plasma weaponry, these cannons are fully militarized versions of the older, somewhat improvised plasma throwers. Their plasma projectiles are even deadlier.

tech_arc_emitter_1.name: Arc Emitters
tech_arc_emitter_1.description: Powerful weapons that launch a lightning arc of chaotic energy at targets, which in part can ignore armor and shields.

tech_arc_emitter_2.name: Focused Arc Emitters
tech_arc_emitter_2.description: These upgraded emitters are equipped with better focusing lenses, resulting in a more powerful energy discharge.

tech_disruptors_1.name: Disruptors
tech_disruptors_1.description: Disruptors fire high-energy bolts that weaken and destroy the molecular bonds that hold the target's constituent atoms together. They are capable of passing through shields and armor to wreak havoc directly on enemy hull and crew.

tech_disruptors_2.name: Ion Disruptors
tech_disruptors_2.description: These upgraded disruptors fire bolts of more destructive ion particles at targets.

tech_disruptors_3.name: Phase Disruptors
tech_disruptors_3.description: Extremely high-yield disruptors that fire quantum energy charges causing incredible damage to those unfortunate enough to get in their way.

tech_energy_torpedoes_1.name: Proton Launchers
tech_energy_torpedoes_1.description: These energy projectiles consist of tightly concentrated protons capable of causing immense damage to the hull of enemy ships.

tech_energy_torpedoes_2.name: Neutron Launchers
tech_energy_torpedoes_2.description: Upgraded energy projectiles that rely on neutrons instead of protons for their destructive power.

tech_pd_tracking_1.name: Active Countermeasures
tech_pd_tracking_1.description: The best defense is a good offense.

tech_pd_tracking_2.name: Interlinked Support Systems
tech_pd_tracking_2.description: Arrays of defensive armaments prove much more effective than independent countermeasures.

tech_pd_tracking_3.name: Predictive Algorithms
tech_pd_tracking_3.description: Advanced prediction greatly increases the accuracy of active countermeasure systems.

tech_extradimensional_weapon_1.name: Extradimensional Weaponry
tech_extradimensional_weapon_1.description: Applying 5th-dimensional energy manipulation principles on lower dimensional planes allows for the creation of powerful energy weapons.

tech_mining_drone_weapon_1.name: Mining Drone Lasers
tech_mining_drone_weapon_1.description: Using intense-focus lenses in combination with an oscillating firing frequency help create lasers strong enough to mine asteroids, or shoot down hostiles.

tech_space_cloud_weapon_1.name: Cloud Lightning Conduits
tech_space_cloud_weapon_1.description: Void Clouds use the electrical charges generated by the dense gases that make up most of their core to release bolts of burning plasma. Using the same gas composition together with a specialized conduit allows for powerful lightning weaponry.

null_void_beam.name: Null Void Beam
null_void_beam.description: By harnessing the entropic nature of the Null Void, this beam can actually destroy energy.

tech_starfire_cannon.name: Starfire Cannon
tech_starfire_cannon.description: Like any potential hazard, the dangerous radiation from our star's transformation can also be harnessed as a useful tool. Channeling it as a beam weapon would allow us to overheat and disable enemy ships. Unlocks a planetary decision to construct a Starfire Cannon in orbit.

tech_critter_feeder.name: Fruit Gardens
tech_critter_feeder.description: Vacuum gardens full of bio-engineered fruits, genetically enhanced to attract spaceborne fauna.

tech_psionic_aura.name: Psionic Aura
tech_psionic_aura.description: Psionic emanations from the Shroud bring an entity's favor into corporeal reality. An empire attuned to a Shroud patron will emit a Psionic Aura from where their psionic populations are concentrated.

tech_aura_intensification.name: Psionic Aura Intensification
tech_aura_intensification.description: Psionic emanations from the Shroud long to expand. With this new understanding, an empire's Psionic Auras can increase in intensity and spread throughout star systems, bringing benefits to allies and disadvantages to foes.

tech_planetary_defenses.name: Planetary Defenses
tech_planetary_defenses.description: There may come a time when intellects, vast and cool and unsympathetic, regard our worlds with envy and draw plans against us. We must be ready.

tech_interplanetary_commerce.name: Interplanetary Commerce
tech_interplanetary_commerce.description: With new planetary markets comes new opportunities for commerce. Business will be booming.

tech_space_trading.name: Offworld Trade Companies
tech_space_trading.description: Trade across interstellar distances presents a new set of challenges to overcome. It is critical to achieve the transfer of goods from one system to another in a timely and above all cost efficient manner.

tech_interstellar_economics.name: Interstellar Economics
tech_interstellar_economics.description: As we journeyed into the cosmos and ventured beyond our home system, we also entered a new era of economics. New markets are appearing a startling rate, and economic theorists are struggling to keep up.

tech_repeatable_improved_tile_food_outpu.name: Transgenic Crops
tech_repeatable_improved_tile_food_outpu.description: Transgenic crops offer the nutritional elements of several standard food crops in one convenient package.

tech_repeatable_improved_core_system_cap.name: Administrative Efficiency
tech_repeatable_improved_core_system_cap.description: Restructuring the managerial web linking core worlds to the capital can help alleviate the administrative stressors and information chokepoints that frequently arise within a budding empire.

tech_repeatable_improved_army_damage.name: Aggressive Conditioning
tech_repeatable_improved_army_damage.description: Iterating on the standard conditioning regimen for ground troops has proven to make them more effective in direct combat.

tech_repeatable_improved_army_health.name: Nerve Dampeners
tech_repeatable_improved_army_health.description: Careful tuning of pain receptors allow soldiers to fight through what would previously have been debilitating injuries.

tech_repeatable_improved_leader_life_spa.name: Cell Revitalization
tech_repeatable_improved_leader_life_spa.description: Regimens of periodic cell revitalization treatments keep the leader class spry and active beyond traditionally expected lifespans.

tech_repeatable_naval_cap.name: Fleet Management Procedures
tech_repeatable_naval_cap.description: Improved fleet management procedures will free up the resources needed to maintain a bigger fleet.

tech_repeatable_command_limit.name: Admiralty Support Staff
tech_repeatable_command_limit.description: Improving the support staff available to our commanders will increase the number of ships they can lead in a single fleet.

tech_repeatable_improved_starbase_capaci.name: Interstellar Expansion
tech_repeatable_improved_starbase_capaci.description: The immense logistical support networks needed to maintain an upgraded Starbase can be further improved, allowing us to support more of these stations.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_strike_craft.name: Synapse Interceptors
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_strike_craft.description: Increasing the speed at which fighter pilots can process and act upon enemy positioning data elevates strike craft a few steps up the food chain.

tech_repeatable_weapon_type_strike_craft.name: Iterative Pilot Training
tech_repeatable_weapon_type_strike_craft.description: By collecting and analyzing the performance data of the pilots that came before, we have exponentially improved our pilot training methods. Each one will be quicker than the one that came before.

tech_amoeba_strike_craft_1.name: Flagella Weaponization
tech_amoeba_strike_craft_1.description: By altering the breeding process of Space Amoebas, we can program their symbiotic flagella to act as organic strike craft for our navy.

tech_swarm_strike_craft_1.name: Swarm Spawning Pools
tech_swarm_strike_craft_1.description: Collecting specimens from defeated Prethoryn enables us to clone and genetically program a war-brood of our own.

tech_scourge_missile_1.name: Scourge Missiles
tech_scourge_missile_1.description: By analyzing the biological weaponry employed by the Swarm we can create self-propelled projectiles weapons spreading the very same horrific destruction.

tech_space_whale_weapon_1.name: Frequency Tuning
tech_space_whale_weapon_1.description: Adapting the Tiyanki method of siphoning energy from gaseous matter, it is possible to construct weapons draining energy from enemy ships.

tech_enhanced_cryosleep_sedatives.name: Enhanced Cryosleep Sedatives
tech_enhanced_cryosleep_sedatives.description: Sedatives based on a rare enzyme enable enhanced cryosleep, greatly improving organic species' tolerance of long-distance space travel.

tech_universal_marcophage.name: Universal Macrophage
tech_universal_marcophage.description: These powerful immunology boosters make disease a thing of the past, allowing organic populations to live fuller, healthier lives. May cause serious side effects.

tech_mine_living_metal.name: Living Metal
tech_mine_living_metal.description: Mining and processing the rare living metals is exceedingly difficult, but successful application of the mutable alloys yields incomparable advantages.

tech_mine_betharian.name: Betharian Refining
tech_mine_betharian.description: The Betharian minerals appear to have originated from singular source, but were scattered across the galaxy millennia ago. The minerals are most often encountered as pebble-sized clusters, and are highly flammable.

tech_mine_volatile_motes.name: Mote Stabilization
tech_mine_volatile_motes.description: Volatile Motes are fickle particles that are dangerous to work with. In order to safely harvest them without setting off a chain-reaction of explosions, energy fields must be used to stabilize the motes.

tech_volatile_motes.name: Volatile Material Plants
tech_volatile_motes.description: Aside from the obvious safety concerns, the artificial creation of Volatile Motes is an extremely delicate and complicated process that requires highly specialized equipment.

tech_mine_exotic_gases.name: Exotic Gas Extraction
tech_mine_exotic_gases.description: Pockets of Exotic Gas are rare and often inaccessible by conventional means. Such deposits can only be reached by using special extractor technology.

tech_exotic_gases.name: Exotic Gas Refining
tech_exotic_gases.description: Exotic Gas can be produced artificially, but it is a difficult process that requires advanced refinery equipment.

tech_mine_rare_crystals.name: Rare Crystal Mining
tech_mine_rare_crystals.description: Mining these crystals without damaging or even destroying them is an extremely delicate process. It requires advanced equipment capable of pinpoint precision.

tech_rare_crystals.name: Rare Crystal Manufacturing
tech_rare_crystals.description: The crystallization process is complicated and difficult, but synthetic crystals can be manufactured by using specialized industrial plants.

tech_robomodding_m.name: Machine Template System
tech_robomodding_m.description: Standardization of assembly templates allows for improved specialization of the machine population.

tech_robomodding.name: Machine Template System
tech_robomodding.description: Rewritable assembly templates allow for the creation of bespoke robot designs.

tech_robomodding_points_1.name: Cross-Model Standardization
tech_robomodding_points_1.description: Improved production practices allow for greater alterations to robots without compromising core functionality.

tech_robomodding_points_2.name: Fungible Circuitry
tech_robomodding_points_2.description: Improved production practices allow for fundamental changes to robots without compromising core functionality.

tech_binary_motivators.name: Binary Motivators
tech_binary_motivators.description: These advanced motivators are both smaller and lighter than previous versions, allowing robotic units to allocate additional space for subsystems.

tech_nanite_assemblers.name: Nanite Assemblers
tech_nanite_assemblers.description: Using programmable nanites to assist in the construction of new robotic units will allow for more advanced models that are equipped with an even greater array of subsystems.

tech_mega_assembly.name: Mega-Assembly Systems
tech_mega_assembly.description: Advanced templates allow us to drastically increase the assembly of new units.

tech_adaptive_combat_algorithms.name: Adaptive Combat Algorithms
tech_adaptive_combat_algorithms.description: Organics often fight using illogical and unpredictable tactics that can be difficult to effectively counter. Adaptive tactics and new, more maneuverable warforms should provide a decisive advantage.

tech_biomechanics.name: Biomechanics
tech_biomechanics.description: Millions of years of organic evolution will sometimes, through sheer persistence, produce elegant solutions that can also be applied to machine designs.

tech_micro_replicators.name: Micro-Replicators
tech_micro_replicators.description: Microscopic tools that can assist our replication units in creating the more complex circuitry needed for new drones.

tech_self_assembling_components.name: Self-Assembling Components
tech_self_assembling_components.description: Modelled on organic DNA, these microscopic machine intellects are capable of autonomously assembling most components needed for new drones.

building_colony_shelter.name: Reassembled Ship Shelter
building_colony_shelter.description: The remains of a Colony Ship, reassembled for planetside form and function.

building_capital.name: Planetary Administration
building_capital.description: Seat of the local ruling elite.

building_major_capital.name: Planetary Capital
building_major_capital.description: A sprawling complex of bureaucratic structures that acts as the administrative center for a major colony.

building_system_capital.name: System Capital-Complex
building_system_capital.description: A towering configuration of administrative bureaus and networked infrastructure, allowing the construction and operation of highly demanding facilities.

building_deployment_post.name: Deployment Post
building_deployment_post.description: The initial deployment post from which we will expand on this world.

building_machine_capital.name: Administrative Array
building_machine_capital.description: A semi-autonomous computer network that handles the various administrative functions on a planet.

building_machine_major_capital.name: Planetary Processor
building_machine_major_capital.description: A powerful administrative computer that has been designed to manage and oversee the various functions of a complex planetary settlement.

building_machine_system_capital.name: Primary Nexus
building_machine_system_capital.description: The administrative heart of the system. Hundreds of AIs process requests and manage the minute but critical details that are involved in running an efficient interstellar civilization.

building_hive_capital.name: Hive Core
building_hive_capital.description: The organizational core from which the Hive Mind coordinates planetside functions.

building_hive_major_capital.name: Hive Nexus
building_hive_major_capital.description: A sprawling capital complex from which the Hive Mind focuses planetary organization, coordination, and planning.

building_hab_capital.name: Habitat Administration
building_hab_capital.description: The administrative hub of the Habitat, serving as its capital and the seat of the local government.

building_hab_major_capital.name: Habitat Central Control
building_hab_major_capital.description: An extensive complex of bureaucratic offices that oversees the administration of a highly-populated habitat.

building_hab_system_capital.name: Habitat System Control
building_hab_system_capital.description: A huge sprawling complex of bureaucratic offices that oversees the administration of a highly-populated habitat.

building_resort_capital.name: Resort Administration
building_resort_capital.description: The central complex from where this planet-wide resort is administrated.

building_resort_major_capital.name: Resort Capital-Complex
building_resort_major_capital.description: A huge sprawling complex capable of administrating an even greater number of resorts and tourist attractions.

building_slave_capital.name: Governor's Palace
building_slave_capital.description: The lavish palace from which this Thrall-World is governed.

building_slave_major_capital.name: Governor's Estates
building_slave_major_capital.description: Sprawling and luxurious palaces that house the ruling elite of the Thrall-World.

building_imperial_capital.name: Imperial Palace
building_imperial_capital.description: A massive palace complex fit for the greatest empire history has ever seen. If there is a bright center to the galaxy, this is it.

building_imperial_machine_capital.name: Imperial Center
building_imperial_machine_capital.description: This colossal complex is the administrative heart of the Galactic Imperium. Thousands of AIs are constantly processing and evaluating the current state of the galaxy.

building_imperial_hive_capital.name: Imperial Complex
building_imperial_hive_capital.description: From this massive structure, the Hive Mind governs the Galactic Imperium. This is where the fate of the galaxy is decided.

building_robot_assembly_plant.name: Robot Assembly Plants
building_robot_assembly_plant.description: High-tech factories where skilled Roboticists assemble the latest robot models.

building_robot_assembly_complex.name: Robot Assembly Complex
building_robot_assembly_complex.description: An advanced assembly plant where skilled Roboticists assemble the latest robot models.

building_machine_assembly_plant.name: Machine Assembly Plants
building_machine_assembly_plant.description: A production line assembly plant where new units are constructed.

building_machine_assembly_complex.name: Machine Assembly Complex
building_machine_assembly_complex.description: An advanced assembly plant where new units are constructed.

building_spawning_pool.name: Spawning Pools
building_spawning_pool.description: Tended by the scientific and gentle care of specialists, these pools stimulate our spawn into faster growth.

building_offspring_nest.name: Offspring Nest
building_offspring_nest.description: This fortified nest safely harbors the local Offspring while also accelerating growth for the rest of the nearby hive.

building_noble_estates.name: Noble Estates
building_noble_estates.description: Palaces and mansions, resplendent in their glory, owned by the nobility. The surrounding countryside and the peasants that inhabit it are theirs as well.

building_slave_processing.name: Slave Processing Facility
building_slave_processing.description: This large and imposing facility is used to process slave labor and extinguish any trace of free will.

building_precinct_house.name: Precinct Houses
building_precinct_house.description: Monuments to law and order. Enforcers are based here.

building_hall_judgment.name: Hall of Judgment
building_hall_judgment.description: A massive complex dedicated to courts and law enforcement.

building_state_academy.name: State Academy
building_state_academy.description: Here the fundamentals deemed necessary for a healthy society are taught.

building_center_of_guidance.name: Center of Guidance
building_center_of_guidance.description: Covering every aspect of life in society. Within this massive complex of schools and training facilities any deviation can be corrected.

building_sentinel_posts.name: Sentinel Posts
building_sentinel_posts.description: These are the outposts from which Patrol Drones scan the Consciousness for signs of deviancy and malfunction.

building_order_keep.name: Order's Keep
building_order_keep.description: The seat of the Order is the home of its knights. It boasts vast archives of data, and is filled with trophies collected over its long and illustrious history.

building_order_castle.name: Order's Castle
building_order_castle.description: The Order of the Toxic God has established a castle on this habitat. A contingent of knights and squires have set up base here.

building_foundry_1.name: Alloy Foundries
building_foundry_1.description: The [Owner.GetAlloyProducerPlural] working in these foundries produce high-quality alloys.

building_foundry_2.name: Alloy Mega-Forges
building_foundry_2.description: These massive forges can assist the end-stage production of alloys in our industries across the planet.

building_foundry_3.name: Alloy Nano-Plants
building_foundry_3.description: Large industrial fabricators geared towards increasing the production of alloys on the planet.

building_factory_1.name: Civilian Industries
building_factory_1.description: A wide collection of civilian industries and manufactories where a variety of consumer goods are produced.

building_factory_2.name: Civilian Fabricators
building_factory_2.description: Large industrial fabricators geared towards increasing the production of consumer goods on the planet.

building_factory_3.name: Civilian Repli-Complexes
building_factory_3.description: Nearly anything can be replicated at the kiosks in these complexes.

building_refinery.name: Exotic Gas Refineries
building_refinery.description: These advanced refineries work day and night to produce exotic gases.

building_chemical_plant.name: Chemical Plants
building_chemical_plant.description: The unpredictable and sometimes unstable Volatile Motes are produced here artificially. No open flames are permitted within a five kilometer radius of the plants.

building_crystal_plant.name: Synthetic Crystal Plants
building_crystal_plant.description: Nearly identical to the real thing, the crystals produced here are of the highest quality.

building_research_lab_1.name: Research Labs
building_research_lab_1.description: Research Labs provide the basic facilities for general research.

building_research_lab_2.name: Research Complexes
building_research_lab_2.description: Upgraded research facilities with a very large staff capacity.

building_research_lab_3.name: Advanced Research Complexes
building_research_lab_3.description: These advanced research facilities have the very latest science equipment along with an extremely large staff capacity.

building_institute.name: Research Institute
building_institute.description: The Research Institute is a massive complex, gathering the cutting edges of disparate fields together for unprecedented synergy, improving the research output of the whole planet.

building_supercomputer.name: Planetary Supercomputer
building_supercomputer.description: A single colossal supercomputer which can carry out incredibly complex calculations, improving the research output of the whole planet.

building_shroud_observatory_1.name: Shroud Observation Tower
building_shroud_observatory_1.description: An observation tower built to research and analyze the Shroud, and the effects it has on living and mechanical beings.

building_shroud_observatory_2.name: Shroud Observatory
building_shroud_observatory_2.description: A large observatory dedicated to research and analysis of the Shroud.

building_shroud_observatory_3.name: Shroud Observation Complex
building_shroud_observatory_3.description: A grand observation complex built to research the Shroud, Zro, and their effects on our world.

building_archaeostudies_faculty.name: Faculty of Archaeostudies
building_archaeostudies_faculty.description: A series of laboratories dedicated to the studies of technological applications of minor artifacts retrieved from elder empires.

building_vultaum_reality_computer.name: Vultaum Reality Computer
building_vultaum_reality_computer.description: The reality computers of the Vultaums were unique processing units, dedicated to analyzing existence itself, not quite through physics, but rather by trying to reverse engineer reality's source code and find the glitch that would finally allow the Vultaums to take down the simulation where they believed they lived.

building_physics_lab_1.name: Field Dynamics Center
building_physics_lab_1.description: With processing speeds that defy classical limits, the potential of quantum computers is boundless. This revolutionary technology heralds a great leap into uncharted regions of problem-solving.

building_physics_lab_2.name: Quantum Relations Annex
building_physics_lab_2.description: The fundamental forces of the universe can be mediated by physical fields. Mastering this process allows us to play as gods - at least within the confines of the science lab.

building_physics_lab_3.name: Fundamental Research Nexus
building_physics_lab_3.description: We knew gravity and time were linked long before we reached the stars. Now, our understanding of this unique relationship has reached a tipping point, allowing us to manipulate forces on a previously unimaginable scale.

building_biolab_1.name: Xenobiological Lab
building_biolab_1.description: The study of alien life has moved beyond mere cataloging. By examining the structures and survival strategies of organisms evolved under foreign stars, we open new avenues in medicine, adaptation, and design.

building_biolab_2.name: Neurogenetics Institute
building_biolab_2.description: Through recursive axonal scaffolding and synaptic reticulation, we have developed methods for reorganizing the electrochemical topology of conscious matter. Neurons do not merely transmit - they entwine, organize, and remember. Now, they do so according to our design.

building_biolab_3.name: Life Systems Complex
building_biolab_3.description: Life, in all its staggering variety, is composed of repeating patterns and modular structures. By decoding and replicating these at every scale, we now wield a holistic blueprint of biology. There is little left in nature we do not understand, and less still we cannot recreate.

building_engineering_facility_1.name: Materials Workshop
building_engineering_facility_1.description: Further breakthroughs in mechanical engineering required us to descend to the nanometric scale. We are now able to manipulate physical systems in never-before-seen ways.

building_engineering_facility_2.name: Applied Mechanics Institute
building_engineering_facility_2.description: Much as organic neurons reforge lost connections by means of axonal sprouting, these circuits are capable of self-overhaul. Even the simplest computing systems are now expected to evolve while in use.

building_engineering_facility_3.name: Advanced Engineering Complex
building_engineering_facility_3.description: The quantum mechanical properties of these materials hold the key to superposition states, a revolutionary development for both material and industrial science.

building_commercial_zone.name: Commercial Zones
building_commercial_zone.description: These commercial zones are home to towering office buildings and business complexes.

building_commercial_megaplex.name: Commerce Megaplexes
building_commercial_megaplex.description: Great commercial spires and towers rising up towards the sky, blotting out the light.

building_galactic_stock_exchange.name: Galactic Stock Exchange
building_galactic_stock_exchange.description: By engaging in free trade of goods and services we allow for a more specialized economy, where an individual can excel in a narrow field and trade for their needs.

building_maintenance_depot.name: Logistics Hub
building_maintenance_depot.description: The beating heart of the collective's logistics apparatus, this massive storage facility's drones work to ensure resources are swiftly delivered wherever they are needed.

building_luxury_residence.name: Luxury Residences
building_luxury_residence.description: Intricately designed residential towers with luxurious apartments. Advanced zero-g technology is the only thing keeping the more outlandish terrace designs from collapsing.

building_paradise_dome.name: Paradise Dome
building_paradise_dome.description: A fully enclosed habitation dome with a self-contained ecosystem, a veritable private paradise for those rich or fortunate enough to live there.

building_communal_housing.name: Communal Housing
building_communal_housing.description: A block of uniform housing, equal in every way.

building_communal_housing_large.name: Utopian Communal Housing
building_communal_housing_large.description: An incredible feat of engineering that combines efficient, practical residences with carefully maintained idyllic landscapes.

building_drone_storage.name: Drone Storage
building_drone_storage.description: A storage area for Drones to undergo maintenance.

building_drone_megastorage.name: Upgraded Drone Storage
building_drone_megastorage.description: With the latest upgrades, while undergoing maintenance a portion of Drones' power-generation can be re-directed to the grid.

building_hive_warren.name: Hive Warren
building_hive_warren.description: A vast warren offers shelter for many Drones to rest.

building_expanded_warren.name: Expanded Warren
building_expanded_warren.description: By expanding the warrens, still more Drone can shelter within.

building_autochthon_monument.name: Autochthon Monument
building_autochthon_monument.description: A monument to the first pioneers to venture into space.

building_heritage_site.name: Heritage Site
building_heritage_site.description: An area dedicated to the early history of our empire and its people.

building_hypercomms_forum.name: Hypercomms Forum
building_hypercomms_forum.description: An immense facility equipped with avant-garde interpersonal communications equipment, the Forum allows for the exchange of multisensory ideas in casual discussions and rapid consensus-forming in debates.

building_bureaucratic_1.name: Administrative Offices
building_bureaucratic_1.description: A labyrinthine government complex of bureaucratic offices, sub-offices and sub-sub-offices.

building_bureaucratic_2.name: Administrative Park
building_bureaucratic_2.description: An area full of buildings dedicated to the glory of effective and meticulous paperwork.

building_bureaucratic_3.name: Administrative Complex
building_bureaucratic_3.description: A vast stretch of land covered in bureaucratic offices containing countless cubicles.

building_temple.name: Temple
building_temple.description: Simple constructs erected since time immemorial, temples are places of quiet contemplation and communion with that which unites us all.

building_holotemple.name: Holotemple
building_holotemple.description: An enhanced form of its rough-hewn predecessors, the latest in Spiritualist technology creates a mutable reality inside the Holotemple - all for deeper meditation and more intense devotion.

building_sacred_nexus.name: Sacred Nexus
building_sacred_nexus.description: The latest developments in field technology allow worshipers to directly experience the divine influence of sacred ground.

building_uplink_node.name: Uplink Node
building_uplink_node.description: An uplink node that decreases planetary latency.

building_network_junction.name: Network Junction
