building_network_junction.description: This powerful transceiver increases the bandwidth of the signals being continuously sent between the many different systems operating across our empire.

building_system_conflux.name: System Conflux
building_system_conflux.description: A massive hub facility that receives and forwards signals across interstellar distances from millions of different systems.

building_hive_node.name: Synaptic Nodes
building_hive_node.description: A center of massive, macroscopic synapses, these nodes - tended to and assisted by specialized drones - receive and transmit the will of the Hive.

building_hive_cluster.name: Synaptic Clusters
building_hive_cluster.description: Synaptic hive nodes networked and clustered together produce maximum meganeuron transmission per available surface area, strengthening the organization of the will to its drones.

building_hive_confluence.name: Confluence of Thought
building_hive_confluence.description: A massive nervous center of macroscopic neurology, billions of meganeurons fire along vast stretches of roiling protoplasmic fibers in the Confluence, spreading, strengthening, coordinating the will of the Hive.

building_sacrificial_temple_1.name: Sacrificial Temple
building_sacrificial_temple_1.description: A revered site in which solemn preachers and dedicated pupils pray and work towards each prosperous yet bloody cycle.

building_sacrificial_temple_2.name: Grim Holotemple
building_sacrificial_temple_2.description: Technological enhancements to this consecrated building allow for more rigorous study, and a more tangible sense of devotion to causes beyond its mutable walls.

building_sacrificial_temple_3.name: Temple of Grand Sacrifice
building_sacrificial_temple_3.description: A site of supreme consecration in which multi-sensory immersion fields allow the faithful to honor every [This.Owner.GetAdj] sacrifice - past, present and future.

building_galactic_memorial_1.name: Sanctuary of Repose
building_galactic_memorial_1.description: This humble memorial focuses thoughts and study upon the multi-faceted nature of death and endings.

building_galactic_memorial_2.name: Pillar of Quietus
building_galactic_memorial_2.description: A solemn place dedicated to the contemplation of death, in which many an ending may be chronicled.

building_galactic_memorial_3.name: Galactic Memorial
building_galactic_memorial_3.description: A monumental library of all that may or may not be understood about endings, chronicled for unknowable future ages.

building_simulation_1.name: Simulation Site
building_simulation_1.description: To advance our civilization we must run and evaluate complex simulations.

building_simulation_2.name: Simulation Center
building_simulation_2.description: To advance our civilization we must run and evaluate complex simulations.

building_simulation_3.name: Simulation Complex
building_simulation_3.description: To advance our civilization we must run and evaluate complex simulations.

building_corporate_monument.name: Corporate Culture Site
building_corporate_monument.description: A site dedicated to glorifying the unique corporate culture that permeates every business transaction conducted on the planet.

building_corporate_site.name: Business Management Nexus
building_corporate_site.description: A facility where crucial decisions concerning the business culture of the planet can by strategized and subconsciously focus-tested by sapient resource specialists.

building_corporate_forum.name: Synergy Forum
building_corporate_forum.description: A massive FTL communications forum capable of synergizing the corporate culture of millions of planetary corporate subdivisions.

building_sensorium_1.name: Sensorium Site
building_sensorium_1.description: To further understand the galaxy, our specialized sensory drones need to experience everything it has to offer.

building_sensorium_2.name: Sensorium Center
building_sensorium_2.description: To further understand the galaxy, our specialized sensory drones need to experience everything it has to offer.

building_sensorium_3.name: Sensorium Complex
building_sensorium_3.description: To further understand the galaxy, our specialized sensory drones need to experience everything it has to offer.

building_autocurating_vault.name: Auto-Curating Vault
building_autocurating_vault.description: A highly-specialized computerized network constantly acquires, analyzes, evaluates, and puts on display everyday artifacts it deems to be significant, creating a living museum of the present.

building_citadel_of_faith.name: Citadel of Faith
building_citadel_of_faith.description: A massive complex offering refuge and seclusion from the material world, for all comers.

building_corporate_vault.name: Vault of Acquisitions
building_corporate_vault.description: An enormous underground vault that serves the dual purpose of business coordination site and public museum to the long and profitable history of the Megacorporation that built it.

building_alpha_hub.name: Alpha Hub
building_alpha_hub.description: The nerve center of all intra-communication that occurs between the quintillions of semi-sapient systems that administers our empire.

building_military_academy.name: Military Academy
building_military_academy.description: Military Academies improve local recruitment rates and offer a higher standard of training.

building_dread_encampment.name: Dread Encampment
building_dread_encampment.description: It is best to shield the activities of the necromancers from the tender view of the public as they raise undead hordes to fight in our armies.

building_mote_harvesters.name: Mote Harvesting Traps
building_mote_harvesters.description: These intricate facilities trap Volatile Motes within energy fields, funneling them into special containment zones below ground where they can be stabilized and harvested.

building_gas_extractors.name: Gas Extraction Wells
building_gas_extractors.description: These hulking wells reach deep into the planet's mantle to access pockets of Exotic Gas.

building_crystal_mines.name: Crystal Mines
building_crystal_mines.description: Great care must be taken when excavating these mines to avoid damaging the crystals.

building_betharian_power_plant.name: Betharian Power Plant
building_betharian_power_plant.description: Betharian Power Plants consume Betharian Stone to produce vast amounts of Energy Credits.

building_xeno_zoo.name: Alien Zoo
building_xeno_zoo.description: A preserve dedicated to the conservation and study of local fauna.

building_crude_huts.name: Crude Huts
building_crude_huts.description: Primitive shelters constructed out of stone, clay or whatever other materials were available.

building_primitive_dwellings.name: Primitive Dwellings
building_primitive_dwellings.description: These small buildings provide a minimal amount of shelter, but they keep out the worst of the elements.

building_stone_palace.name: Stone Palaces
building_stone_palace.description: Primitive palaces built out of stone, where the local ruling elite resides.

building_primitive_factory.name: Basic Factories
building_primitive_factory.description: Primitive, inefficient factories spewing pollution while producing goods.

building_primitive_offices.name: Basic Offices
building_primitive_offices.description: These offices contain seemingly endless cubicles, with the sounds of pointless busywork.

building_primitive_research.name: Basic Research Labs
building_primitive_research.description: These basic research facilities managed to propel a civilization to the Space Age.

building_primitive_mine.name: Primitive Mine
building_primitive_mine.description: Primitive mining tunnels that snake through the ground.

building_primitive_power_plant.name: Primitive Power Plant
building_primitive_power_plant.description: A primitive and somewhat unreliable power plant that relies on coal or early atomic power, poisoning their atmosphere.

building_primitive_farm.name: Primitive Farms
building_primitive_farm.description: Primitive farmsteads working the soil for meager returns.

building_primitive_capital.name: Regional Capitals
building_primitive_capital.description: The regional capital buildings of the various nation-states inhabiting this primitive world.

building_urban_dwellings.name: Urban Dwellings
building_urban_dwellings.description: Cramped and often polluted jungles of concrete.

building_pre_ftl_radio_telescope.name: Radio Telescope Array
building_pre_ftl_radio_telescope.description: An array of radio telescopes in pursuit of discovering intelligent alien life.

building_hive_crude_huts.name: Simple Nests
building_hive_crude_huts.description: Using the simplest and low effort material available, these nests are barely enough to keep drones from freezing during the nights.

building_hive_primitive_dwellings.name: Early Colony
building_hive_primitive_dwellings.description: Starting to optimize the space available, these hexagon shaped buildings can house what could moderately be called a colony.

building_hive_stone_palace.name: Stone Hive
building_hive_stone_palace.description: In a world where you need to compete against your own species for survival, having stone walls is an advantage.

building_hive_primitive_factory.name: Basic Factories
building_hive_primitive_factory.description: Primitive, inefficient factories spewing pollution while producing goods.

building_hive_primitive_mine.name: Primitive Mine
building_hive_primitive_mine.description: Primitive mining tunnels that snake through the ground.

building_hive_primitive_power_plant.name: Primitive Power Plant
building_hive_primitive_power_plant.description: A primitive and somewhat unreliable power plant that relies on coal or early atomic power, poisoning their atmosphere.

building_hive_primitive_farm.name: Primitive Farms
building_hive_primitive_farm.description: Primitive farmsteads working the soil for meager returns.

building_hive_primitive_capital.name: Continental Nexus
building_hive_primitive_capital.description: The typical central point of the continent spanning hives vying for control over this world.

building_hive_urban_dwellings.name: Drone Storage
building_hive_urban_dwellings.description: A utilitarian solution for housing drones when they are undergoing their rest cycle. There are separate entrances and exits to maximize the hive's recharge process.

building_hive_primitive_node.name: Simple Synaptic Node
building_hive_primitive_node.description: Through this crude synaptic node, the will of the Hive will be strengthened.

building_machine_primitive_node.name: Simple Uplink Node
building_machine_primitive_node.description: An crude uplink node that decreases planetary latency.

building_primitive_clinic.name: Gene Clinics
building_primitive_clinic.description: Gene Clinics can offer advanced medical treatments, which statistically lead to a significantly healthier and longer-living population.

building_solarpunk_gaiaseeder.name: Gaia Seeders
building_solarpunk_gaiaseeder.description: Perfected atmospheric controls maintaining this planets pristine status.

building_solarpunk_ranger_lodge.name: Nature Preserve Lodge
building_solarpunk_ranger_lodge.description: A retreat to enjoy this planets beauty.

building_solarpunk_sapling.name: Grand Sapling
building_solarpunk_sapling.description: A titanic sapling, the result of centuries of floral research and manipulation, capable of feeding millions.

building_solarpunk_organic_paradise.name: Hanging Cities
building_solarpunk_organic_paradise.description: Cities covered in grand forests, bringing the inhabitants closer to nature.

building_junkheap.name: Junk Heap
building_junkheap.description: A rusting, irradiated jumble of collapsed infrastructure, destroyed buildings, and decaying wreckage from an unknown civilization.

building_akx_worm_3.name: Omega Alignment
building_akx_worm_3.description: The surface of this object angles space. The interior is not visible to any sensor or imaging technology available. But we all know what's in there.

building_great_pyramid.name: Great Pyramid
building_great_pyramid.description: A pyramid constructed by the local population to appease a deity descended from the sky.

building_artist_patron.name: Ministry of Culture
building_artist_patron.description: A fashionable headquarters for the Ministry of Culture, helping to spread knowledge, entertainment and art to the masses.

building_waste_reprocessing_center.name: Waste Reprocessing Center
building_waste_reprocessing_center.description: A planet's one stop center for converting industrial and bio-waste into mostly clean, mostly reusable energy and minerals. Designed by the Racket Industrial Enterprise, its construction is somewhat arcane, and largely non-reverse- engineerable.

building_nuumismatic_shrine.name: Numistic Shrine
building_nuumismatic_shrine.description: A shrine devoted to the worship of Numa, goddess of fortune.

building_crystal_plant_2.name: Kha'lanka Crystal Plant
building_crystal_plant_2.description: The discovery of new crystal manufacturing techniques, far below the surface in the city of the Kha'lanka lithoids, has effectivized artificial crystal manufacturing through oxidation of rapidly growing silicon-based cell-clusters.

building_zroni_equilibrator.name: Zroni Equilibrator
building_zroni_equilibrator.description: A rebuilt ancient structure stabilizing the connection between reality and the Shroud. It uses complex Zroni technology still beyond modern understanding.

building_composer_sanctum.name: Sanctum of the Composer
building_composer_sanctum.description: The Sanctum is a place dedicated to communion with the Composer. [GetComposerSanctumDesc]

building_eater_sanctum.name: Sanctum of the Eater
building_eater_sanctum.description: The Sanctum is a place dedicated to communion with the Eater. Here, the Shroud prepares us for war as we plan for the next [GetEaterSanctumDesc].

building_instrument_sanctum.name: Sanctum of the Instrument
building_instrument_sanctum.description: The Sanctum is a place dedicated to communion with the Instrument. [GetInstrumentSanctumDesc]

building_whisperers_sanctum.name: Sanctum of the Whisperers
building_whisperers_sanctum.description: The Sanctum is a place dedicated to communion with the Whisperers. [GetWhisperersSanctumDesc]

building_ancient_control_center.name: Ancient Control Center
building_ancient_control_center.description: The ancient control center of the ringworld is barely maintained by the tireless efforts of a legion of machine drones.

building_ancient_hive_capital.name: Venerable Nucleus
building_ancient_hive_capital.description: This ancient nexus of the hive's supremacy is where uncountable generations of drones have dutifully executed directives.

building_ancient_palace.name: Ancient Palace
building_ancient_palace.description: This immense palatial complex is a testament to an era long gone. Despite its luminous facade refusing to succumb to the passage of time, many of its wings lay abandoned in various states of disrepair.

building_fe_xeno_zoo.name: Xeno Preserve
building_fe_xeno_zoo.description: A highly sophisticated preserve that maintains the natural habitat of the "preserved" alien species perfectly.

building_hab_fe_capital.name: Habitat Administration
building_hab_fe_capital.description: The administrative hub of the Habitat, serving as its capital and the seat of the local government.

building_master_archive.name: Master Archive
building_master_archive.description: This repository houses knowledge from multiple galactic ages, yet the ability to operate its arcane retrieval system is lost. Extracted data scraps prove invaluable.

building_empyrean_shrine.name: Phased Empyrean Shrine
building_empyrean_shrine.description: Exclusively used for communing with the spirits of the Shroud, this temple manifests only partially in our dimension.

building_ancient_cryo_chamber.name: Ancient Cryo-Chamber
building_ancient_cryo_chamber.description: Rows upon rows of cryo-pods line this massive structure, containing the long-expired remains of billions of alien specimens frozen long ago.

building_private_mining_consortium.name: Private Mining Consortium
building_private_mining_consortium.description: A private mineral extraction company owned by a megacorporation. It employs local miners to access the planet's wealth.

building_food_conglomerate.name: Fast Food Chain
building_food_conglomerate.description: Affordable, fast, and with a perfectly acceptable nutritional value. Zero toxins* and zero hassle! * Food may contain traces of potassium benzoate, nitric acid, dark matter, soylent green and liquid smoke.

holding_garrison.name: Overlord Garrison
holding_garrison.description: A garrison established to oversee the local enforcers, occasionally reinforced by military battalions in more dire circumstances.

holding_orbital_assembly_complex.name: Orbital Assembly Complex
holding_orbital_assembly_complex.description: A soaring building filled with long assembly lines, creating everything one could dream of.

holding_propaganda_office.name: Ministry of Truth
holding_propaganda_office.description: A ministry overseeing local faiths, news, and political interest groups. With the right prod everything runs a tad smoother.

holding_satellite_campus.name: Satellite Campus
holding_satellite_campus.description: A large campus where domestic researchers and foreign scientists can come together to share ideas and conduct experiments.

holding_emporium.name: Emporium
holding_emporium.description: Large shopping malls filled with futuristic and exotic wares from distant planets.

holding_aid_agency.name: Aid Agency
holding_aid_agency.description: Agencies founded and staffed by foreign benefactors, bringing some of their culture and knowledge to the planet.

holding_energy_requisitorium.name: Ministry of Energy
holding_energy_requisitorium.description: A ministry overseeing taxation and the minting of energy credits, often coming into conflict with the domestic bureaucracy.

holding_material_requisitorium.name: Ministry of Extraction
holding_material_requisitorium.description: A ministry overseeing local mineral production, extraction, and purification. They often secure the best land purchases and reap the benefits for their patron.

holding_produce_requisitorium.name: Ministry of Acquisition
holding_produce_requisitorium.description: A ministry overseeing local produce. In addition to placing a small tax on this world, some products have a tendency to disappear into their convoluted, bureaucratic process.

building_low_tech_scrap_refinery.name: Scrap Refinery
building_low_tech_scrap_refinery.description: A small-scale refinery making use of scrap salvaged from our former masters' ship.

building_low_tech_admin_hub.name: Administrative Hub
building_low_tech_admin_hub.description: The state cabins and living quarters of our former masters, repurposed into offices.

building_low_tech_power_plant.name: Power Plant
building_low_tech_power_plant.description: A jerry-rigged assemblage of solar cells linked to the fusion reactor in our former masters' ship.

building_low_tech_farm.name: Makeshift Farms
building_low_tech_farm.description: Hardscrabble farmsteads tilling the soil for meager returns.

building_low_tech_capital.name: Command Center
building_low_tech_capital.description: The bridge of our former masters' ship, hastily refashioned into a command center.

building_low_tech_research_lab.name: Laboratory Complex
building_low_tech_research_lab.description: Experiments in multiple disciplines take place in what was once an engineering bay.

building_paragon_memory_vaults.name: Vaults of Knowledge
building_paragon_memory_vaults.description: Our society has always preserved the stories of heroes and prominent figures from the past. Their knowledge and experiences are digitized and gathered in the Vaults of Knowledge. Destroying this building will eradicate the data stored inside.

building_the_beholder.name: Murmuring Monolith
building_the_beholder.description: The Beholder's conduit into our plane of existence. A ship, feeding upon the planet's energy to amass Zro and sustain its connection to the Shroud.

building_contained_ecosphere.name: Contained Ecosphere
building_contained_ecosphere.description: Astrocreator Azaryn's legacy, left to us when she passed. It is but a small section of the Vivarium's internal ecosystem. Introduces a high concentration of Ecosphere Pheromones to a planet's atmosphere, applying positive effects to the population.

building_astral_siphon_1.name: Astral Siphon
building_astral_siphon_1.description: It is a delicate process to peel Astral Thread away from the fabric of reality. These structures prevent the border between realities from crumbling.

building_astral_siphon_2.name: Astral Funnel
building_astral_siphon_2.description: It is a delicate process to peel Astral Thread away from the fabric of reality. These structures prevent the border between realities from crumbling.

building_astral_siphon_3.name: Astral Nexus
building_astral_siphon_3.description: It is a delicate process to peel Astral Thread away from the fabric of reality. These structures prevent the border between realities from crumbling.

building_storm_attraction_center.name: Storm Attraction Center
building_storm_attraction_center.description: Through the careful manipulation of gravitational forces, these facilities attract nearby cosmic storms.

building_advanced_storm_attraction_cente.name: Advanced Storm Attraction Center
building_advanced_storm_attraction_cente.description: Advanced insights into dark energy allow us to supercharge each Storm Attraction Center and draw in cosmic storms even more efficiently.

building_storm_repellent_center.name: Storm Repulsion Center
building_storm_repellent_center.description: The further the storm, the safer our population - and the easier their minds. The complex astrometeorological instrumentation of these centers repels approaching storms.

building_advanced_storm_repellent_center.name: Advanced Storm Repulsion Center
building_advanced_storm_repellent_center.description: Any manipulation of spacetime is warranted if it keeps our world clear from cosmic tempests. This center does exactly that.

building_storm_resistant_production.name: Storm Relief Center
building_storm_resistant_production.description: This aid center assists local efforts to negate the impact of a cosmic storm on planetary production. Through efficient coordination and communication, the Storm Relief Center allows for quick deployment of rescue teams, as well as improving the conditions for planet-wide trade.

building_advanced_storm_resistant_produc.name: Storm Nullifier
building_advanced_storm_resistant_produc.description: By adding weather control systems to each Storm Relief Center, the negative effects of cosmic storms are significantly lessened. Additionally, rescue teams can be deployed even more efficiently and planetary trade is almost impervious to local weather conditions.

building_adakkaria_patriotic_institute.name: Patriotic Institute of Celebration
building_adakkaria_patriotic_institute.description: The Patriotic Institute of Celebration is a trove of advanced insights into the sentient condition. Here we empower people to cultivate their inner tempest while avoiding the luring song of the Convention's cruelty.

building_astrometeorology_observation_ce.name: Astrometeorology Observatory
building_astrometeorology_observation_ce.description: With delicate sensors, this observation center studies diverse environmental conditions to better our understanding of the natural universe.

building_storm_summoning_theater.name: Storm Summoning Theater
building_storm_summoning_theater.description: A merriment of art and technology, the excited gyrations of our Storm Dancers help to entice cosmic storms.

building_storm_holo_theater.name: Storm Holo Hall
building_storm_holo_theater.description: Broadcast over the entire planet and beyond, the Storm Holo Hall expands the reach of our hypnotic Storm Dancers.

building_storm_grand_theater.name: Storm Grand Theater
building_storm_grand_theater.description: Embodying the cutting edge of artistic and technical achievement, these grand theaters provide the perfect forum for the ultimate dance.

building_augmentation_bazaars.name: Augmentation Bazaar
building_augmentation_bazaars.description: A neon-lit maze of corridors, implant vendors and underground hardware clinics catering to all cybernetic implant needs - both over and under the counter.

building_transcendental_retreat.name: Genomic Services Center
building_transcendental_retreat.description: This advanced medical center studies and provides services that preserve the perfection of nature's ideal genetic code.

building_hive_transcendental_retreat.name: Genomic Safeguard Warren
building_hive_transcendental_retreat.description: This advanced medical warren is committed to understanding and nurturing the flawless essence of nature's ideal genetic code.

building_amphitheater_of_the_mind.name: Amphitheater of the Mind
building_amphitheater_of_the_mind.description: This localized processing shrine allows the semi-connected Choir of the Mind to debate, share, and explore the secrets of the material plane at the speed of light.

building_grand_concert_hall_of_the_mind.name: The Grand Concert Hall of the Mind
building_grand_concert_hall_of_the_mind.description: The state-of-the-art communication array housed in these resonant halls allows the Choir of the Mind to commune together in search of divinity. Joined by cyberware, their chanting will unravel the hidden melodies of the universe.

building_battlement_of_steel.name: Battlements of Steel
building_battlement_of_steel.description: This fortress church houses both the armory and training grounds for the battle-ready Templars of Steel. They stand ever vigilant to protect our divine flesh.

building_grand_battlements_of_steel.name: The Grand Battlements of Steel
building_grand_battlements_of_steel.description: May these magnificent walls of this grand fortress-cathedral never crumble. Its armory overflows with the hallowed implants of the Templars of Steel, each awaiting an anointed champion. In these halls, divinity dwells in the interface of flesh and steel.

building_sanctuary_of_toil.name: Sanctuary of Toil
building_sanctuary_of_toil.description: This sanctuary coordinates, repairs, and rejuvenates the flesh and augmentations of the Commune of Toil.

building_grand_cathedral_of_toil.name: Grand Cathedral of Toil
building_grand_cathedral_of_toil.description: Blessed be those who provide for the needs of the faithful. Let their weary souls rest in the Grand Cathedral of Toil. Its workshops and coordination centers guide and replenish the faithful laborers and their holy augmentations in all their divine duties.

building_forge_of_the_fellowship.name: Forge of the Fellowship
building_forge_of_the_fellowship.description: Here, the first forge of the Fellowship of the Hammer produces the highest quality construction materials. Hammers sing as the faithful pursue their divine work.

building_grand_forge_of_the_fellowship.name: Grand Forge of the Fellowship
building_grand_forge_of_the_fellowship.description: Well beyond the halls of the Grand Forge, the faithful can hear the litany of the Fellowship's never resting tools. At night, the ornate foundry-cathedral's glow outshines the stars above, just as our holy sparks shine for the divine.

building_the_sanctum_of_augmentation.name: Sanctum of Augmentation
building_the_sanctum_of_augmentation.description: In the spirit of shared faith, this sacred sanctum stands as a symbol of unity. Within these consecrated chambers, the faithful tend to the souls and augmentations of its flock.

building_the_united_sanctum_of_augmentat.name: United Sanctum of Augmentation
building_the_united_sanctum_of_augmentat.description: In reverence of the most sacred fusion, this majestic sanctum is a living testament. Within its consecrated chambers, the faithful gather, unwavering in their commitment to advance the divine fusion's noble cause.

building_identity_repository.name: Identity Repository
building_identity_repository.description: Before the body expires, the mind is digitized. Safe within, we continue to work for the good of society.

building_abandoned_gene_clinic.name: Abandoned Gene Clinic
building_abandoned_gene_clinic.description: After we lost the ability to procreate naturally, the medical community placed its hope in this state-of-the-art gene clinic. Like so much of our infrastructure, it now stands empty, a constant reminder of our plight and the dire need for new solutions.

building_lathe_capital.name: Processing Unit
building_lathe_capital.description: The quantic nature of the processing units of the Synaptic Lathe allows it to parallelize computing across multiple dimensional layers.

building_lathe_major_capital.name: Processing Unit: Parallelized
building_lathe_major_capital.description: This improved processing unit is now more capable of running parallel operations by rebounding the cognitive echoes of Neural Chips in contained gamma-space pockets.

building_lathe_super_capital.name: Processing Unit: Vectorial
building_lathe_super_capital.description: This upgraded processing unit streamlines computations through the creation of negative space vectors. This dimensional compartmentalization of processes yields extraordinary results in efficiency and stability.

building_lathe_resonator.name: Synaptic Resonator
building_lathe_resonator.description: Resonators harness and redirect the cognitive potential of stray thoughts and autonomic systems, leading every single chip to increase the efficiency of its closest processing neighbors.

building_lathe_stabilisator.name: Neural Stabilizer
building_lathe_stabilisator.description: Stabilization systems filter out the computing noise generated when physical distress overcomes Neural Chips. The reduction in interferences means an increase in global output.

building_lathe_overclocker.name: Synaptic Overclocker
building_lathe_overclocker.description: The Lathe has been designed to preserve its installed Neural Chips, keeping them productive for as long as possible. The overclocker can override these commands, resulting in a higher and faster output, but it comes with an increased failure rate.

building_lathe_preserver.name: Synaptic Preserver
building_lathe_preserver.description: The organic components of the network are especially vulnerable to energetic fluctuations, which can cause rapid axonal degeneration. The Preserver strives to reduce these fluctuations to protect the Synaptic Lathe's frailer parts.

building_lathe_reactor.name: Expanded Reactor
building_lathe_reactor.description: The more chips plugged into the network, the more energy is required to maintain it. Installing additional reactors will mitigate the complex logistics inherent in powering the Synaptic Lathe.

building_lathe_life_support.name: Synaptic Sustainer
building_lathe_life_support.description: Dedicated facilities organize the maintenance of the Lathe's critical components, allowing us to support more chips and a healthier network environment.

building_lathe_cogitator.name: Synaptic Cogitator
building_lathe_cogitator.description: Calculating hyperspatial supply chains is complex. Rerouting some processing power to the task will help even the largest fleet to delve deeper into enemy territory.

building_lathe_validator.name: Synaptic Validator
building_lathe_validator.description: While the primary purpose of the validator's specialized functions is to help formulate infinity theses, it can also be applied to more general aspects of computing.

building_augmentation_center.name: Augmentation Center
building_augmentation_center.description: A building for outfitting cybernetic implants. Part shopping mall, part operating center, and part mechanic shop.

building_cyberdome.name: Cyberdome
building_cyberdome.description: Hosts savage cybersports with augmented athletes for the entertainment of the imperial citizens. Enhanced gladiators, athletes and sprinters compete for our favor until damaged or dead.

building_identity_complex.name: Identity Complex
building_identity_complex.description: A cutting-edge hub for the research and development of synthetic identities.

building_nanolab_1.name: Nanite Research Facility
building_nanolab_1.description: Conducting research at a nanoscopic scale brings a whole new perspective on the universe.

building_nanolab_2.name: Nanite Research Complex
building_nanolab_2.description: How peculiar it is that the infinitely small and the infinitely big look so much alike.

building_nanotech_cauldron.name: Nanotech Cauldron
building_nanotech_cauldron.description: Operating at a molecular level, the swarm can easily reconfigure mineral structures into sturdy alloy lattices.

xeno_geology_holomuseum.name: Holo-Museum of Geology
xeno_geology_holomuseum.description: A multi-faceted institute dedicated to the preservation and study of mineral formations and precious stones.

aesthetic_wonders_holomuseum.name: Holo-Museum of Wonders
aesthetic_wonders_holomuseum.description: Where the wonder of our galaxy can be appreciated without interruption.

galactic_history_holomuseum.name: Holo-Museum of History
galactic_history_holomuseum.description: An informative archive populated with items that represent key events in our galaxy's history.

wildlife_ranch.name: Wildlife Ranch
wildlife_ranch.description: We live in partnership with our native creatures, taking the utmost care in the protection of their habitat and the sustainable growth of their species.

wildlife_ranch_2.name: Wildlife Expanse
wildlife_ranch_2.description: Careful ecosystem management improves the conditions for native creatures and facilitates ranching efforts.

wildlife_ranch_3.name: Wildlife Nexus
wildlife_ranch_3.description: A vast facility where animals are allowed to roam freely. They are offered comfort and luxury in an effort to maximize the quality of the resources they provide.

hunting_grounds.name: Hunting Grounds
hunting_grounds.description: A training complex used to master all manner of hunting techniques. From modern energy weapons to traditional martial implements, unmatched dexterity and skill is required to best fearsome predators and claim them as trophies.

hunting_grounds_2.name: Hunting Expanse
hunting_grounds_2.description: A training and surveillance facility providing optimal hunting conditions for local fauna. Heat-mapping technology helps identify recent animal trails and acquire trophy-quality game.

hunting_grounds_3.name: Hunting Nexus
hunting_grounds_3.description: A vast expanse supporting planetary hunting parties on a massive scale. Stocked with the highest quality weapons and tracking equipment, hunters are given high level training in maximizing the quantity and quality of game killed.

wildlife_sanctuary.name: Wildlife Sanctuary
wildlife_sanctuary.description: A protected reserve where wild animals are studied within their natural habitats. Safeguards are in place to prevent population instability or excessive disease. Studying these creatures is in itself a worthy academic endeavor, but crucially it teaches us more about our own nature.

wildlife_sanctuary_2.name: Advanced Sanctuary
wildlife_sanctuary_2.description: Creatures here are cared for on an individual basis, their unique dietary and medical needs provided with minimal disturbance to their natural habitats. Specialized ecosystems allow for the propagation and reintroduction of endangered species.

wildlife_sanctuary_3.name: Sanctuary Nexus
wildlife_sanctuary_3.description: Animals here are monitored and cared for using a carefully engineered infrastructure designed to seem as if it doesn't exist. Researchers are forbidden from interfering with the subjects' natural behavior, guaranteeing the collection of the highest possible quality research data.

primal_arena.name: Primal Arena
primal_arena.description: A colosseum where our strongest warriors are pitted against ferocious creatures in primal combat. There is no greater entertainment than watching heroes triumph over savage beasts - or die trying.

primal_arena_2.name: Primal Stadium
primal_arena_2.description: In this massive stadium, packs of animals are trained by skilled handlers in coordinating their attacks. No longer can beastfighters rely on simply overpowering their quarry: they must use out-think even their trainers in order to survive.

primal_arena_3.name: Primal Colosseum
primal_arena_3.description: An awe-inspiring arena designed to host beast-slaying battles of monumental proportions. Each engagement takes weeks of preparation and can support the attendance of millions of individuals.

symbiosis_nexus.name: Symbiosis Nodule
symbiosis_nexus.description: A natural preserve where wild partners are welcomed into our fold. Each creature has something unique to offer the mindweave.

symbiosis_nexus_2.name: Symbiosis Expanse
symbiosis_nexus_2.description: A central reserve that serves to group our wild partners into self-maintaining pods. Coordinating their lesser mental capacities provides stability of thought to the greater mindweave.

symbiosis_nexus_3.name: Symbiosis Nexus
symbiosis_nexus_3.description: An expansive hub that serves to unite the minds of every creature in powering our collective thought.

building_colony_shelter_wilderness.name: Planetary Tendrils
building_colony_shelter_wilderness.description: A pluricellular frontier of organisms weaves throughout this world, ensuring a stable presence for the Wilderness.

building_capital_wilderness.name: Planetary Root Bundle
building_capital_wilderness.description: A sprawling, vibrant mass of simple organisms that harmonizes with motile symbionts to improve their coordination and productivity.

building_major_capital_wilderness.name: Planetary Root Complex
building_major_capital_wilderness.description: A concentrated living mass, sufficiently dense that symbionts may live, toil and breed in one highly localized sphere.

building_system_capital_wilderness.name: Planetary Root Nexus
building_system_capital_wilderness.description: An immense union of diverse lifeforms working in concert, so vast that it cultivates its own ideal micro-climates.

building_imperial_capital_wilderness.name: Imperial Complex
building_imperial_capital_wilderness.description: The Wilderness governs the Galactic Imperium from within this massive and intricate structure. This is where the fate of the galaxy is decided.

building_cradle_of_rebirth.name: Cradle of Rebirth
building_cradle_of_rebirth.description: Rooted deep, this structure metabolizes decaying matter and captured prey into biomass, nourishing the body of the world with every silent pulse.

building_tendril_cradle_1.name: Tendril Cradle
building_tendril_cradle_1.description: A cluster of short, rooted threads extend from this site, drawing nearby materials toward key organs in the immediate area.

building_tendril_cradle_2.name: Threaded Span
building_tendril_cradle_2.description: Elongated tendrils stretch across the landscape, pulling resources from neighboring expanses before processing and redistributing.

building_tendril_cradle_3.name: Conveyroot Nest
building_tendril_cradle_3.description: Braided roots pulse and shift beneath the surface, shuttling biomass through layered channels toward distant biotic hubs.

building_tendril_cradle_4.name: Planetary Threadheart
building_tendril_cradle_4.description: Massive logistical tendrils radiate across the planet's body, pulling, pacing, and routing the Wilderness's resources with tireless synchronicity.

building_brain_node_1.name: Research Growth
building_brain_node_1.description: The work of playful, exploratory symbionts provides the basis of general research.

building_brain_node_2.name: Research Grove
building_brain_node_2.description: A habitat uniquely dedicated to promoting inquisitive behavior, facilitating the study of more advanced artifacts and phenomena.

building_brain_node_3.name: Exotic Research Enclosure
building_brain_node_3.description: These sprawling enclosures allow large numbers of extremophile symbionts to experiment with all manner of exotic and dangerous materials.

building_brain_node_4.name: Advanced Research Enclosure
building_brain_node_4.description: This fusion of exotic technology and vast, symbiont-grown enclosure facilitates cutting-edge research in a variety of sandbox environments.

building_commensal_clearing_1.name: Commensal Clearing
building_commensal_clearing_1.description: These islands of stillness allow motiles of all kinds to gather, rest, and reorient themselves within the Wilderness.

building_commensal_clearing_2.name: Commensal Grove
building_commensal_clearing_2.description: Ideal, sheltered venues for mass gatherings of symbionts. Here, their interactions yield further understanding of the distributed self.

building_commensal_clearing_3.name: Commensal Valley
building_commensal_clearing_3.description: Dense and highly varied communities of symbionts migrate through these pristine formations, strengthening the ties between each other.

building_commensal_clearing_4.name: Commensal Biome
building_commensal_clearing_4.description: Vast, interconnected habitats play host to myriad encounters, each one a vital spark of mutualistic unity.

building_massive_growth_1.name: Nutritious Dell
building_massive_growth_1.description: Small-scale geological sculpturing provides an ideal micro-climate for year-round, reliable crop growth.

building_massive_growth_2.name: Nutritious Undergrowth
building_massive_growth_2.description: A vast, semi-permeable canopy endows this undergrowth with all the environmental protection it needs to consistently produce rich and succulent food.

building_massive_growth_3.name: Contour Megaplantation
building_massive_growth_3.description: A haven for semi-aquatic micro-organisms and fauna alike, these sprawling terraces provide an abundance of protein matter and grains.

building_massive_growth_4.name: Sylviculture Plantation
building_massive_growth_4.description: Arrangements of undergrowth sheltered by leafy megaflora ensure a high yield of food crops to serve the entire food web.

building_bioelectric_stimulator_1.name: Chloroplastic Acclimator
building_bioelectric_stimulator_1.description: Clusters of lens-like bubbles focus solar rays inwards through a rich algal soup, converting and storing that energy for later use.

building_bioelectric_stimulator_2.name: Chloroplastic Accelerator
building_bioelectric_stimulator_2.description: Glassy bubbles packed full of photosynthesizing algae use solar energy to form tighter bio-chemical bonds, reducing self-discharge.

building_bioelectric_stimulator_3.name: Chloroplastic Lens Array
building_bioelectric_stimulator_3.description: Counter-balanced branches laden with solar collectors may rise and fall according to demand and capacity, making for a versatile and reliable power hub.

building_bioelectric_stimulator_4.name: Chloroplastic Cyst
building_bioelectric_stimulator_4.description: These glassy, algae-filled sacs may migrate and multiply wherever their energy is most needed, almost eliminating power loss over distance.

building_churning_tunnels_1.name: Lithic Bore
building_churning_tunnels_1.description: Plant matter of near-crystalline hardness is forced in and around existing extraction sites, withdrawing even greater yields of useful minerals.

building_churning_tunnels_2.name: Lithic Filters
building_churning_tunnels_2.description: Colonies of semi-permeable biofilms collect valuable minerals that would otherwise be lost in run-off from liquid mining operations.

building_churning_tunnels_3.name: Lithic Macerator
building_churning_tunnels_3.description: Powerful grinding plates and pincers help reduce earthen matter to a chemical slurry for easier mineral extraction.

building_churning_tunnels_4.name: Lithic Baths
building_churning_tunnels_4.description: A concert of macerators, bio-chemical agents, and biofilms permits extraction of minerals on-site, wherever they happens to be a rich seam.

building_natural_furnace_0.name: Smelting Pool
building_natural_furnace_0.description: Thermophilic symbionts work tirelessly to produce high-quality alloys in and around this natural heat source.

building_natural_furnace_1.name: Smelting Kiln
building_natural_furnace_1.description: Heat-resistant growths enable more efficient use of heat, and thus the production of superior alloys.

building_natural_furnace_2.name: Solid-Light Smelter
building_natural_furnace_2.description: Sophisticated litho-organic kilns, aided by hologram technology, enable the production of highly versatile alloys.

building_natural_furnace_3.name: Nano-Smelter
building_natural_furnace_3.description: Thermophilic nano-organisms inhabit these sweltering pools and kilns, ridding our alloys of unwanted impurities.

building_avatar_chamber_1.name: Avatar Cradle
building_avatar_chamber_1.description: A budding organ where the Wilderness begins to shape basic forms. Preparing its instincts for unfamiliar life and terrain beyond its native biosphere.

building_avatar_chamber_2.name: Avatar Chamber
building_avatar_chamber_2.description: Simulated bodies are grown and guided through internal trials, mimicking foreign organisms and ecosystems. Knowledge spreads by embodying the unknown.

building_avatar_chamber_3.name: Avatar Forest
building_avatar_chamber_3.description: This sprawling organ broadcasts avatar templates shaped after alien forms and landscapes. The Wilderness learns by living what it has never touched.

building_avatar_chamber_4.name: Avatar Cortex
building_avatar_chamber_4.description: A planetary-scale engine of embodiment, capable of simulating entire civilizations, xeno-ecologies, and environmental extremes. Here, the Wilderness rehearses its meeting with the galaxy.

building_mote_aggravator.name: Chemical Digester
building_mote_aggravator.description: An elegant system of vascular tissues and chemical metabolizers produces Volatile Motes from everyday earthen matter.

building_churning_stomach.name: Exotic Gas Filters
building_churning_stomach.description: Highly specialized microbes and nano-organisms react with mundane aerosols to produce these refined Exotic Gases.

building_crystal_growth.name: Crystal Bed
building_crystal_growth.description: Special canopies facilitate the precise humidity and temperature controls required to grow exacting, artificial Rare Crystals.

building_planetary_carapace.name: Bone Garrison
building_planetary_carapace.description: A plethora of fiercely territorial symbionts may be housed in this cocooned proving ground, poised in case they need ever be called upon.

building_planetary_carapace_2.name: Bone Fortress
building_planetary_carapace_2.description: This sprawling facility of hardy training grounds and accommodations ensures the defenders housed within are braced for any planetary incursion.

building_ozone_thickener.name: Planetary Shield Canopy
building_ozone_thickener.description: Generating a strong energy shield within a planetary atmosphere is a greater challenge than in the vacuum of space, but it offers a potent defense against orbital bombardment.

building_wilderness_storm_relief.name: Storm Relief Center
building_wilderness_storm_relief.description: A broad canopy of hardened, bioelectrically-charged leaves ensures the safety of symbionts in its vicinity, and allows for rapid responses to cosmic storm activity without endangering life or productivity.

building_subterranean_cache.name: Subterranean Cache
building_subterranean_cache.description: Massive resource silos and storage facilities where large quantities of resources can be safely kept.

building_pinniped_sanctuary.name: Pinniped Sanctuary
building_pinniped_sanctuary.description: A sanctuary for gigantic pinnipeds captured in the liquid nitrogen oceans of [event_target:pinnipeds_home_planet.GetName].

building_cryovault.name: Cryovault
building_cryovault.description: A sealed habitat that utilizes the subthermal dynamics of frozen climates to create a controlled and comfortable living space.

building_bio_furnace.name: Bio-Furnace
building_bio_furnace.description: By incorporating significant levels of simulated stellar radiation, this facility is capable of converting biological matter into alloys.

building_lifecrypt_1.name: Leeching Tower
building_lifecrypt_1.description: These monumental devices are capable of draining excess energies from dedicated populations in close proximity. Assigned individuals wear specialized equipment which funnel their life force into a central conduit where it can then be redistributed to those of higher status.

building_lifecrypt_2.name: Soul Siphon
building_lifecrypt_2.description: While their name may imply otherwise, Soul Siphons are based in practical science. Calibrated specifically to harvest energies from individuals via physical tether, they are capable of sapping immense amounts of metabolism from organisms without endangering their lives.

building_lifecrypt_3.name: Essence Conduit
building_lifecrypt_3.description: The boundaries of Essence Conduits must be clearly marked, for wandering within its area of influence can be fatal to those without the proper equipment. Assigned individuals are trained to regulate their metabolisms so as not to donate too much of their energy at once.

building_lifecrypt_machine_1.name: Siphon Battery
building_lifecrypt_machine_1.description: These monumental devices are capable of draining excess processing energy from dedicated drones in close proximity. Assigned workers wear specialized equipment which funnel their batteries into a central conduit where it can then be redistributed to those of higher purpose.

building_lifecrypt_machine_2.name: Battery Complex
building_lifecrypt_machine_2.description: Calibrated specifically to harvest energies from drones via physical tether, these devices are capable of sapping immense amounts of excess processing without inflicting critical faults.

building_lifecrypt_machine_3.name: Battery Nexus
building_lifecrypt_machine_3.description: The boundaries of the Battery Nexus must be clearly marked, as entering within its area of influence can be fatal to units without the proper insulative equipment.

building_lifecrypt_hive_mind_1.name: Leeching Tower
building_lifecrypt_hive_mind_1.description: These monumental devices are capable of draining excess energies from dedicated drones in close proximity. Assigned workers wear specialized equipment which funnel their life force into a central conduit where it can then be redistributed to those of higher caste.

building_lifecrypt_hive_mind_2.name: Soul Siphon
building_lifecrypt_hive_mind_2.description: While their name may imply otherwise, Soul Siphons are based in practical science. Calibrated specifically to harvest energies from drones via physical tether, they are capable of sapping immense amounts of metabolism from organisms without endangering their lives.

building_lifecrypt_hive_mind_3.name: Essence Conduit
building_lifecrypt_hive_mind_3.description: The boundaries of Essence Conduits must be clearly marked, as entering within its area of influence can be fatal to drones without the proper equipment. Assigned workers are trained to regulate their metabolisms so as not to donate too much of their energy at once.

building_lifecrypt_corporate_1.name: Synergy Headquarters
building_lifecrypt_corporate_1.description: These monumental devices are capable of draining excess energies from dedicated interns in close proximity. Assigned individuals wear specialized equipment which funnel their life force into a central conduit where it can then be redistributed to those in senior positions.

building_lifecrypt_corporate_2.name: Synergy Administration
building_lifecrypt_corporate_2.description: Calibrated specifically to harvest energies from individuals via physical tether, the Synergy Administration buildings are capable of sapping immense amounts of metabolism from interns without endangering their lives to any appreciable degree.

building_lifecrypt_corporate_3.name: Synergy Nexus
building_lifecrypt_corporate_3.description: The boundaries of the Synergy Nexus must be clearly marked, for wandering within its area of influence can be fatal to interns without the proper equipment. Assigned individuals are trained in advanced synergy techniques to ensure their ultimate survival throughout this process.

building_experimentation_chambers_1.name: Experimentation Chambers
building_experimentation_chambers_1.description: A top-secret facility for experimenting on incorrigible lawbreakers, mostly comprising prison cells and research laboratories.

building_experimentation_chambers_2.name: Experimentation Complex
building_experimentation_chambers_2.description: A campus of top-secret technology and internment facilities, where lawbreaking [Owner.GetIndividualNamePlural] are used as subjects in experiments led by the empire's top [Owner.GetResearchers].

building_experimentation_chambers_3.name: Experimentation Nexus
building_experimentation_chambers_3.description: A network of maximum-security technology and internment centers. Teams of elite [Owner.GetResearchers] conduct pioneering experiments on [Owner.GetIndividualNamePlural] drawn from the empire's underworld.

building_cradle_sanctum.name: Sanctum of the Cradle
building_cradle_sanctum.description: The Sanctum is a place dedicated to communion with the Cradle. [GetCradleSanctumDesc]

building_psionic_suppressor.name: Psionic Suppressor
building_psionic_suppressor.description: This complex supports an array of long-range psionic attenuators, which dissipate Psionic Auras throughout the star system and prevent their further spread.

building_ancient_ward_1.name: Ancient Ward
building_ancient_ward_1.description: This ancestral structure uses an array of psionic attenuators to insulate the entire planet against mind-invading forces.

building_ancient_ward_2.name: Grand Ward
building_ancient_ward_2.description: This ancestral structure has been upgraded with enhanced psionic attenuators, which are capable of protecting against Psionic Auras throughout the star system.

sponsored_colonizer.name: Private Colony Ship
sponsored_colonizer.description: Private Colony Ships are funded by unknown actors from the private sector. As a result the colonists may have ethics differing from the majority.

guided_sapience_colonizer.name: Genesis Ark
guided_sapience_colonizer.description: The specialized colony ship facilitates the genesis of pre-sapient species by selecting the most promising candidates and setting up the initial colony for our overseers.

military_station_small_fallen_empire.name: Outpost
military_station_small_fallen_empire.description: Military Station Small Fallen Empire Desc

military_station_large_fallen_empire.name: Fortress
military_station_large_fallen_empire.description: Military Station Large Fallen Empire Desc

crystal_ship_small_blue_elite.name: Elite Sapphire Crystal Shardling
crystal_ship_small_blue_elite.description: Crystal Ship Small Blue Elite Desc

crystal_ship_medium_blue_elite.name: Elite Sapphire Crystal Shard
crystal_ship_medium_blue_elite.description: Crystal Ship Medium Blue Elite Desc

crystal_ship_large_blue_elite.name: Elite Sapphire Crystal Quintessence
crystal_ship_large_blue_elite.description: Crystal Ship Large Blue Elite Desc

crystal_ship_small_green_elite.name: Elite Emerald Crystal Shardling
crystal_ship_small_green_elite.description: Crystal Ship Small Green Elite Desc

crystal_ship_medium_green_elite.name: Elite Emerald Crystal Shard
crystal_ship_medium_green_elite.description: Crystal Ship Medium Green Elite Desc

crystal_ship_large_green_elite.name: Elite Emerald Crystal Quintessence
crystal_ship_large_green_elite.description: Crystal Ship Large Green Elite Desc

crystal_ship_small_yellow_elite.name: Elite Topaz Crystal Shardling
crystal_ship_small_yellow_elite.description: Crystal Ship Small Yellow Elite Desc

crystal_ship_medium_yellow_elite.name: Elite Topaz Crystal Shard
crystal_ship_medium_yellow_elite.description: Crystal Ship Medium Yellow Elite Desc

crystal_ship_large_yellow_elite.name: Elite Topaz Crystal Quintessence
crystal_ship_large_yellow_elite.description: Crystal Ship Large Yellow Elite Desc

crystal_ship_small_red_elite.name: Elite Ruby Crystal Shardling
crystal_ship_small_red_elite.description: Crystal Ship Small Red Elite Desc

crystal_ship_medium_red_elite.name: Elite Ruby Crystal Shard
crystal_ship_medium_red_elite.description: Crystal Ship Medium Red Elite Desc

crystal_ship_large_red_elite.name: Elite Ruby Crystal Quintessence
crystal_ship_large_red_elite.description: Crystal Ship Large Red Elite Desc

space_amoeba.name: Space Amoeba
space_amoeba.description: Space Amoeba are lone predators, aggressive towards anything they encounter. Supported by partially-formed spawn known as "flagella", these creatures are adept at chasing down their prey.

blue_military_station_large_ai.name: Heavy Station
blue_military_station_large_ai.description: Blue Military Station Large Ai Desc

blue_military_station_small_ai.name: Light Station
blue_military_station_small_ai.description: Blue Military Station Small Ai Desc

crystal_splitter_ship_large_blue.name: Sapphire Crystal Quintessence
crystal_splitter_ship_large_blue.description: Crystal Splitter Ship Large Blue Desc

energy.name: Energy Credits
energy.description: £energy£ Energy Credits are stored units of transferrable energy that are essential for all space-faring ['concept_empires']. They are used for upkeep of ['concept_ships'] and ['concept_buildings'], to clear planetary £blocker£ ['concept_blockers'], and when making deals with others. To increase: - Build £district£ ['concept_generator_districts'] - Build £mining_station£ ['concept_mining_stations'] on energy-rich ['concept_celestial_objects'] - Buy on the £market£ ['concept_market'] Click ['concept_energy'] to open the Databank Click £energy£ in the menu to open the ['concept_market']

minerals.name: Minerals
minerals.description: £minerals£ Minerals cover the basic resources employed in construction. They are used to construct planetary £building£ ['concept_buildings'] and £mining_station£ £science_ship£ ['concept_civilian_space_stations']. They can also be refined into £alloys£ ['concept_alloys'] or £consumer_goods£ ['concept_consumer_goods']. To increase: - Build £district£ ['concept_mining_districts'] - Build £mining_station£ ['concept_mining_stations'] on mineral-rich ['concept_celestial_objects'] - Buy on the £market£ ['concept_market'] Click ['concept_minerals'] to open the Databank Click £minerals£ in the menu to open the ['concept_market']

food.name: Food
food.description: [GetConceptFood] Click ['concept_food'] to open the Databank Click £food£ in the menu to open the ['concept_market']

physics_research.name: Physics Research
physics_research.description: £physics£ Physics Research is one of the three fields of study, collecting technologies in areas like Computing, Field Manipulation, and Particles. Stored Research is received from certain events or when no research is selected. Each month, Stored Research equal to the Monthly Gain is used, increasing research speed. To increase: - Utilize certain £job£ ['concept_jobs'], for example from £building£ ['building:building_research_lab_1'] - Use £construction_ship£ ['concept_construction_ships'] to build £science_ship£ ['concept_research_stations'] around research-rich ['concept_celestial_objects'] Click ['concept_physics_research'] to open the Databank Click £physics£ in the menu to open Technology

society_research.name: Society Research
society_research.description: £society£ Society Research is one of the three fields of study, collecting technologies in areas like Biology, Statecraft, and New Worlds, Stored Research is received from certain events or when no research is selected. Each month, Stored Research equal to the Monthly Gain is used, increasing research speed. To increase: - Utilize certain £job£ ['concept_jobs'], for example from £building£ ['building:building_research_lab_1'] - Use £construction_ship£ ['concept_construction_ships'] to build £science_ship£ ['concept_research_stations'] around research-rich ['concept_celestial_objects'] Click ['concept_society_research'] to open the Databank Click £society£ in the menu to open Technology

engineering_research.name: Engineering Research
engineering_research.description: £engineering£ Engineering Research is one of the three fields of study, collecting technologies in areas like Industry, Propulsion, and Voidcraft, Stored Research is received from certain events or when no research is selected. Each month, Stored Research equal to the Monthly Gain is used, increasing research speed. To increase: - Utilize certain £job£ ['concept_jobs'], for example from £building£ ['building:building_research_lab_1'] - Use £construction_ship£ ['concept_construction_ships'] to build £science_ship£ ['concept_research_stations'] around research-rich ['concept_celestial_objects'] Click ['concept_society_research'] to open the Databank Click £society£ in the menu to open Technology

influence.name: Influence
influence.description: [GetConceptInfluence] Click ['concept_influence'] to open the Databank Click £influence£ in the menu to open Claims

unity.name: Unity
unity.description: [GetConceptUnity] Click ['concept_unity'] to open the Databank Click £unity£ in the menu to open Traditions

trade.name: Trade
trade.description: £trade£ Trade represents the everyday economic activity, flow of commerce, and logistics capacity within an ['concept_empire']. It is used for ['concept_ship_upkeep'], ['concept_colony_upkeep'], and to buy other resources. To increase: - Construct £building£ ['concept_buildings'] with £job£ ['concept_jobs'] that produce £trade£ Trade - Build £mining_station£ ['concept_mining_stations'] on interstellar trade deposits - Sell resources on the £market£ ['concept_market'] Click ['concept_trade'] to open the Databank Click £trade£ in the menu to open the ['concept_market']

consumer_goods.name: Consumer Goods
consumer_goods.description: [GetConceptConsumerGoods] Click ['concept_consumer_goods'] to open the Databank Click £consumer_goods£ in the menu to open the ['concept_market']

alloys.name: Alloys
alloys.description: £alloys£ Alloys are advanced resources with significant military applications. Among other things, they are used to construct ['concept_civilian_ships'], ['concept_military_ships'], ['concept_starbases'], and ['concept_megastructures']. To increase: - Build £zone£ Mixed Industry or £zone£ Heavy Industry - Build £building£ ['building:building_foundry_1'] - Buy on the £market£ ['concept_market'] Click ['concept_alloys'] to open the Databank Click £alloys£ in the menu to open the ['concept_market']

volatile_motes.name: Volatile Motes
volatile_motes.description: These preternatural particles contain a tremendous amount of energy which could be exploited in energy production, as fuel or even as explosives.

exotic_gases.name: Exotic Gases
exotic_gases.description: Rare and exotic gases with a variety of different uses, particularly in the operation of advanced energy-based weaponry and force fields. Some of the gases can also be used as starship fuel or even as recreational drugs.

rare_crystals.name: Rare Crystals
rare_crystals.description: These crystals have properties that make them extremely effective at focusing laser beams, and they are also a critical component in most advanced electronics. In addition, many cultures treasure them as decorations and adornments.

sr_living_metal.name: Living Metal
sr_living_metal.description: This inorganic metal shows characteristics usually seen only in biological life forms. It will always attempt to regenerate back into the shape it was stabilized into.

sr_zro.name: Zro
sr_zro.description: An extremely rare aerosol of exotic particles. It has been deposited on a number of worlds through meteor impacts, but its true origin is a mystery. If [GetIngestedLoc] by psionically-gifted [GetIndividualNamePlural], zro acts as a very potent (and addictive) [GetDrugLoc] that enhances psionic abilities.

sr_dark_matter.name: Dark Matter
sr_dark_matter.description: This exotic substance has many properties that seemingly defy several natural laws. Harvestable concentrations can only be found near Black Holes or in certain nebulas.

nanites.name: Nanites
nanites.description: Simple but powerful nanoactuators, allowing for complex manipulations and experiments of mesoscopic scales.

minor_artifacts.name: Minor Artifacts
minor_artifacts.description: Minor Artifacts ( £minor_artifacts£ ) represent obscure technology and half-forgotten lore recovered from archaic civilizations, only partially understood by our own science. They are more common than Relics, and can be spent to enact various empire-wide effects.

astral_threads.name: Astral Threads
astral_threads.description: £astral_threads£ Astral Threads are filaments of condensed space-time: the result of dimensional planes colliding with one another. They can be spent to enact various empire-wide effects.

biomass.name: Biomass
biomass.description: £biomass£ Biomass is the raw organic potential generated by biological activity across the worlds of ['concept_owned_systems']. It is used for constructing planetary £building£ ['concept_buildings'] and ['concept_terraforming'] new ['concept_colonies']. To increase: - Grow more £pop£ ['concept_pops'] - Build £building£ ['building:building_cradle_of_rebirth']

menace.name: Menace
menace.description: Menace is a measure of our resonance with the calamitous energies of the Shroud.

advanced_logic.name: Advanced Logic
advanced_logic.description: Advanced Logic measures our understanding of the universe's deepest secrets.

feral_insight.name: Feral Insight
feral_insight.description: We are studying the feeding and behavioral cycles of mega-organisms.

entropy_crystals.name: Crystallized Entropy
entropy_crystals.description: This jagged, shimmering matrix of raw energy is somehow stable, just enough to be transported as fuel or embedded into equipment.

trait_ruler_corvette_focus.name: Corvette Production Focus
trait_ruler_corvette_focus.description: This leader is intent on promoting the construction of Corvettes.

trait_ruler_destroyer_focus.name: Destroyer Production Focus
trait_ruler_destroyer_focus.description: This leader is intent on promoting the construction of Destroyers.

trait_ruler_cruiser_focus.name: Cruiser Production Focus
trait_ruler_cruiser_focus.description: This leader is intent on promoting the construction of Cruisers.

trait_ruler_battleship_focus.name: Battleship Production Focus
trait_ruler_battleship_focus.description: This leader is intent on promoting the construction of Battleships.

leader_trait_fleet_logistician.name: Fleet Logistician
leader_trait_fleet_logistician.description: This leader has mastered the field of logistics, and knows how to manage supplies to keep upkeep costs down.

leader_trait_skirmisher.name: Skirmisher
leader_trait_skirmisher.description: This leader prefers to skirmish against their opponents before engaging them in fair combat.

leader_trait_aggressive.name: Aggressive
leader_trait_aggressive.description: This leader is notoriously aggressive, overwhelming the enemy with numerous barrages from their fleet's weapons.

leader_trait_cautious.name: Cautious
leader_trait_cautious.description: This leader is a cautious commander, avoiding unnecessary risks and taking care to always maintain formations in which fleet units can mutually support each other against the enemy.

leader_trait_unyielding.name: Unyielding
leader_trait_unyielding.description: This leader would prefer to fight to the death than admit defeat.

leader_trait_engineer.name: Engineer
leader_trait_engineer.description: This leader is a natural engineer, having the knowledge and skills to organize and oversee starship repairs while on missions.

leader_trait_trickster.name: Trickster
leader_trait_trickster.description: This leader fights deviously, relying on misdirection and surprise to get the better of the enemy.

leader_trait_wrecker.name: Wrecker
leader_trait_wrecker.description: This leader is not concerned with leaving enemy ships in a salvageable state for research, preferring to vaporize them if possible.

leader_trait_annihilator.name: Annihilator
leader_trait_annihilator.description: This leader focuses on the quick destruction of planetary defenses.

leader_trait_artillerist.name: Artillerist
leader_trait_artillerist.description: This leader favors heavy ordinance and alpha strike techniques.

leader_trait_artillerist_2.name: Artillerist II
leader_trait_artillerist_2.description: This leader favors heavy ordinance and alpha strike techniques.

leader_trait_commanding_presence.name: Commanding Presence
leader_trait_commanding_presence.description: This leader holds a special place in the navy, attracting the most skilled captains and logisticians.

leader_trait_commanding_presence_2.name: Commanding Presence II
leader_trait_commanding_presence_2.description: This leader holds a special place in the navy, attracting the most skilled captains and logisticians.

leader_trait_corsair.name: Material Liberator
leader_trait_corsair.description: This leader is dedicated to collecting any useful items from defeated enemy ships.

leader_trait_corsair_2.name: Material Liberator II
leader_trait_corsair_2.description: This leader is dedicated to collecting any useful items from defeated enemy ships.

leader_trait_demolisher.name: Demolisher
leader_trait_demolisher.description: This leader is exceptionally skilled at demolishing stationary defenses.

leader_trait_shipbreaker.name: Shipbreaker
leader_trait_shipbreaker.description: This leader dismantles defeated enemy ships after every battle, recycling the alloys.

leader_trait_shipbreaker_2.name: Shipbreaker II
leader_trait_shipbreaker_2.description: This leader dismantles defeated enemy ships after every battle, recycling the alloys.

leader_trait_archaeo_specialization.name: Archaeotech Focus
leader_trait_archaeo_specialization.description: This leader favors ancient technology, convinced that they will bring unexpected advantages to the battlefield.

leader_trait_artillery_specialization.name: Artillery Focus
leader_trait_artillery_specialization.description: This leader favors long-range engagement with artillery playing the main role in their fleet.

leader_trait_shroudwalker.name: Shroudwalker Teacher
leader_trait_shroudwalker.description: An adept of the [shroudwalker_enclave_country.GetName], skilled in instructing in the ways of the Shroud.

leader_trait_master_salvager.name: Master Salvager
leader_trait_master_salvager.description: A veteran of Salvage operations from the [salvager_enclave_country.GetName], sharing their expertise for a small fee.

leader_trait_curator.name: Curator
leader_trait_curator.description: This leader hails from the Curator Order. Their understanding of technology and exploration is unmatched.

leader_trait_enclave_trader.name: Enclave Trader
leader_trait_enclave_trader.description: Recruited from one of the independent merchant Enclaves, this leader is particularly adept at maximizing Trade.

leader_trait_xuracorp_liaison.name: XuraCorp Liaison
leader_trait_xuracorp_liaison.description: Recruited from XuraCorp, this leader holds shares in several Exotic Gas production facilities.

leader_trait_riggan_liaison.name: Riggan Liaison
leader_trait_riggan_liaison.description: Recruited from the Riggan Commerce Exchange, this leader spends their spare time dealing in Volatile Mote futures.

leader_trait_muutagan_liaison.name: Muutagan Liaison
leader_trait_muutagan_liaison.description: Recruited from the Muutagan Merchant Guild, this leader owns several private Rare Crystal mines.

leader_trait_defence_engineer.name: Defense Engineer
leader_trait_defence_engineer.description: This leader focuses on making orbital defenses into an impenetrable wall of death against potential invasion forces.

leader_trait_butcher.name: Butcher
leader_trait_butcher.description: This leader is ruthless, giving no quarter to the enemy.

leader_trait_restrained.name: Careful
leader_trait_restrained.description: This leader is concerned with minimizing loss and avoiding unnecessary deaths among soldiers and non-combatants.

leader_trait_dreaded.name: Dreaded
leader_trait_dreaded.description: This leader fills their enemies with dread.

leader_trait_dreaded_2.name: Dreaded II
leader_trait_dreaded_2.description: This leader fills their enemies with dread.

leader_trait_heavy_hitter.name: Heavy Hitter
leader_trait_heavy_hitter.description: This leader employs rapid dominance during ground combat.

leader_trait_heavy_hitter_2.name: Heavy Hitter II
leader_trait_heavy_hitter_2.description: This leader employs rapid dominance during ground combat.

leader_trait_interrogator.name: Interrogator
leader_trait_interrogator.description: This leader will attempt to extract valuable information from enemy prisoners.

leader_trait_crusader.name: Crusader
leader_trait_crusader.description: This leader is focused on destroying our enemies. [Root.GetHisHerCap] dedication to the cause is unwavering

leader_trait_crusader_2.name: Crusader II
leader_trait_crusader_2.description: This leader is focused on destroying our enemies. [Root.GetHisHerCap] dedication to the cause is unwavering

leader_trait_overseer.name: Overseer
leader_trait_overseer.description: This leader focuses on maintaining order and loyalty among vassal empires.

leader_trait_overseer_2.name: Overseer II
leader_trait_overseer_2.description: This leader focuses on maintaining order and loyalty among vassal empires.

trait_ruler_from_the_ranks.name: From the Ranks
trait_ruler_from_the_ranks.description: This leader rose through the ranks of military command.

trait_ruler_from_the_ranks_2.name: Trait Ruler From The Ranks 2
trait_ruler_from_the_ranks_2.description: Trait Ruler From The Ranks 2 Desc

trait_ruler_recruiter.name: Recruiter
trait_ruler_recruiter.description: This leader is particularly charismatic, and fresh recruits are practically lining up to serve their nation.

trait_ruler_recruiter_2.name: Recruiter II
trait_ruler_recruiter_2.description: This leader is particularly charismatic, and fresh recruits are practically lining up to serve their nation.

leader_trait_consul_general.name: Consul-General
leader_trait_consul_general.description: This leader is responsible for maintaining diplomatic protocols.

leader_trait_consul_general_2.name: Consul-General II
leader_trait_consul_general_2.description: This leader is responsible for maintaining diplomatic protocols.

leader_trait_shadow_broker.name: Shady Contacts
leader_trait_shadow_broker.description: This leader keeps a network of clandestine operatives at their disposal.

leader_trait_home_guard.name: Home Guard
leader_trait_home_guard.description: This leader's elaborate planetary defense systems are a good preparation against enemy invasion.

leader_trait_hardy.name: Hardy
leader_trait_hardy.description: This leader conducts quality training exercises to ensure their troops are always in prime physical condition.

leader_trait_hardy_2.name: Hardy II
leader_trait_hardy_2.description: This leader conducts quality training exercises to ensure their troops are always in prime physical condition.

leader_trait_martinet.name: Martinet
leader_trait_martinet.description: Managing planetary defenses means criminals have a hard time operating on the planet. This leader is especially troublesome for any potential gangs and dissidents.

leader_trait_warden.name: Warden
leader_trait_warden.description: This leader likes to boost their forces with planetary volunteers and mercenaries.

leader_trait_warden_2.name: Warden II
leader_trait_warden_2.description: This leader likes to boost their forces with planetary volunteers and mercenaries.

leader_trait_reinforcer.name: Reinforcer
leader_trait_reinforcer.description: This leader focuses on building emergency bomb shelters and reinforced bunkers in case of orbital bombardment.

leader_trait_guardian.name: Guardian
leader_trait_guardian.description: This leader focuses on maintaining starbase defenses to bolster system security.

leader_trait_guardian_2.name: Guardian II
leader_trait_guardian_2.description: This leader focuses on maintaining starbase defenses to bolster system security.

leader_trait_conscripter.name: Conscription Agent
leader_trait_conscripter.description: This leader knows how to handle recruits and streamline the process of enlisting new volunteers into the army.

leader_trait_taskmaster.name: Grand Taskmaster
leader_trait_taskmaster.description: Taskmasters focus not only on strategy, but the minutia of every soldier's daily routine.

leader_trait_fortress_cracker.name: Fortress Cracker
leader_trait_fortress_cracker.description: It takes a combination of force, cunning, and experience to topple a well-designed defensive structure. This commander takes pleasure in the challenge and succeeds where others would give it up as a lost cause.

leader_trait_chainbreaker.name: Chainbreaker
leader_trait_chainbreaker.description: No sentient being should be enslaved and exploited for the profit of others. This leader's reputation precedes them, with the enslaved and oppressed gladly taking up arms when called.

leader_trait_honored_warmaster.name: Honored Warmaster
leader_trait_honored_warmaster.description: Warmasters are commanders of renown. This leader instills pride and courage, making people eager to grab a weapon and enlist.

leader_trait_academia_recruiter.name: Academic Recruiter
leader_trait_academia_recruiter.description: At our academic institutions, recruiters are extolling the virtues of military service to our best and brightest minds. The practical experience gained on the battlefield can't be taught in a classroom, and should lead to advances in engineering and technology.

leader_trait_supreme_warrior.name: Supreme Warrior
leader_trait_supreme_warrior.description: This leader is one of the few commanders to have attained this title. They lead their troops in person, inspiring allies and overwhelming even the toughest of foes.

leader_trait_spymaster.name: Shadow Broker
leader_trait_spymaster.description: Far from a simple spy, this leader spins a web of informants, smugglers, and assassins. When something needs doing quietly, this can prove an enormous asset.

leader_trait_totalitarian.name: Herald of the Empire
leader_trait_totalitarian.description: A title of honor and repute, the Herald is a master player in the great game of nations. Such diplomats provide a trusted link between an overlord and its vassals.

leader_trait_bellicose.name: Esteemed Quartermaster
leader_trait_bellicose.description: With a genius for logistics, this commander maintains the efficiency of military operations with deceptively simple solutions.

leader_trait_armchair_commander.name: Armchair Commander
leader_trait_armchair_commander.description: This leader commands from the rear, which demoralizes front-line troops.

leader_trait_uninspiring.name: Uninspiring
leader_trait_uninspiring.description: This leader lacks charisma and makes no effort to reward or encourage, leaving their soldiers demotivated.

leader_trait_slothful.name: Slothful
leader_trait_slothful.description: This leader's reluctance to organize training drills affects [Root.GetHisHer] army's combat prowess.

leader_trait_victory_or_death.name: Disrespectful
