leader_trait_victory_or_death.description: This leader has no respect for their soldiers' lives, willing to throw them away for honor and little else.

leader_trait_victory_or_death_2.name: Leader Trait Victory Or Death 2
leader_trait_victory_or_death_2.description: Leader Trait Victory Or Death 2 Desc

leader_trait_disorganized.name: Disorganized
leader_trait_disorganized.description: This leader's lack of organizational skills causes their troops to function more like a war band than a proper military.

leader_trait_lawless.name: Lawless
leader_trait_lawless.description: This leader is in the pocket of local gangs and pirates.

leader_trait_aturion_organizer.name: Aturion Efficiency
leader_trait_aturion_organizer.description: With strict control over matters of state, this leader resides at the center of a labyrinthian set of rules, laws, and bureaucratic procedures, all designed to enhance their own power.

leader_trait_tzrynn_tithe.name: Tzynn Tithe
leader_trait_tzrynn_tithe.description: On Tzynnia it is customary for the winner of any conflict to take a third of whatever the loser values most. Gia'Zumon keeps this tradition alive.

leader_trait_adventurous_spirit.name: Adventurous Spirit
leader_trait_adventurous_spirit.description: This leader has a yearning for adventure and an overt distaste for boardroom politics.

leader_trait_eager.name: Eager
leader_trait_eager.description: This leader is particularly eager for an assignment.

leader_trait_resilient.name: Resilient
leader_trait_resilient.description: This leader is resilient and in excellent physical condition, increasing their life expectancy.

leader_trait_adaptable.name: Adaptable
leader_trait_adaptable.description: This leader is quick to adopt new methods and ideas that prove superior.

leader_trait_politician.name: Politician
leader_trait_politician.description: This leader has an affinity for politics, and is well-versed when it comes to fiery debates.

leader_trait_capitalist.name: Energy Mogul
leader_trait_capitalist.description: This leader is a major player in the competitive energy market.

leader_trait_capitalist_2.name: Energy Mogul II
leader_trait_capitalist_2.description: This leader is a major player in the competitive energy market.

leader_trait_private_mines.name: Private Mines
leader_trait_private_mines.description: This leader owns and maintains private sources of minerals.

leader_trait_private_mines_2.name: Private Mines II
leader_trait_private_mines_2.description: This leader owns and maintains private sources of minerals.

leader_trait_homesteader.name: Homesteader

trait_ruler_feedback_loop.name: Feedback Loop
trait_ruler_feedback_loop.description: Efficient feedback loops and action-reaction analysis make this unit far better at predicting outcomes.

trait_ruler_logistic_understanding.name: Logistic Understanding
trait_ruler_logistic_understanding.description: This leader is well aware of the importance of properly-structured supply chains.

trait_ruler_logistic_understanding_2.name: Logistic Understanding II
trait_ruler_logistic_understanding_2.description: This leader is well aware of the importance of properly-structured supply chains.

trait_ruler_eye_for_talent.name: Eye for Talent
trait_ruler_eye_for_talent.description: This leader is considered to be unusually perceptive, spotting talent where others see only eccentricity or incompetence.

trait_ruler_eye_for_talent_2.description: This leader is considered to be unusually perceptive, spotting talent where others see only eccentricity or incompetence.

trait_pc_cosmogenesis_world_preference.description: The species is unfit for survival outside of the life support pods of a Synaptic Lathe. They crave a blissful coma, not the relentless assaults of reality.

trait_machine_pc_nanotech_preference.description: This species is well suited to living in a symbiotic relationship with nanite swarms. However their dependence on the nanoforms renders them quite helpless when forced to live in different conditions.

trait_hive_mind.name: Hive-Minded
trait_hive_mind.description: This species is made up of semi-autonomous individuals bound up in a single, unfathomably vast consciousness.

trait_machine_unit.name: Machine
trait_machine_unit.description: This species is made up of highly advanced machines.

trait_presapient_starborn.name: Starborn
trait_presapient_starborn.description: This species has always, consciously or not, longed to traverse the void between the stars.

trait_presapient_earthbound.name: Earthbound
trait_presapient_earthbound.description: Members of this species are very possessive of the planets they call home.

trait_presapient_natural_intellectuals.name: Natural Intellectuals
trait_presapient_natural_intellectuals.description: Members of this species are more philosophically inclined than most.

trait_presapient_proles.name: Proles
trait_presapient_proles.description: This species has traditionally shunned intellectual pursuits in favor of physical labor.

trait_presapient_conservative.name: Conservative
trait_presapient_conservative.description: Members of this species often prefer old wisdom over new experiences.

trait_presapient_irradiated.name: Irradiated
trait_presapient_irradiated.description: This species has evolved to thrive in environments subject to extremely high levels of background radiation.

trait_presapient_docile_livestock.name: Docile Livestock
trait_presapient_docile_livestock.description: Docile and delicious, this species has had its higher brain functions genetically altered to create a kind of harmless livestock that can care for itself, without the pesky need for social interaction or self-determination.

trait_presapient_forcefully_devolved.name: Forcefully Devolved
trait_presapient_forcefully_devolved.description: The brutal devolution process endured by this species had a strong negative impact upon their abilities.

trait_presapient_unintelligent.name: Unintelligent
trait_presapient_unintelligent.description: This species is unable to complete even the simplest tasks. Their only skill is the incredible speed at which they reproduce.

trait_presapient_stage.name: Pre-Sapient
trait_presapient_stage.description: Spending a brief time bereft of conscious thought, this species will soon grow up to be a fully sapient being.

trait_auto_mod_biological.name: Vocational Genomics
trait_auto_mod_biological.description: Advanced genetic strings feature epigenetic triggers that adapt to occupational demands, dynamically optimizing gene expression for the host's work environment.

trait_agrarian.name: Agrarian
trait_agrarian.description: This species has a deep connection to the land, and make expert farmers and gardeners.

trait_ingenious.name: Ingenious
trait_ingenious.description: Members of this species are good at 'thinking outside the box' and know how to maximize the efficiency of their infrastructure and power grids.

trait_industrious.name: Industrious
trait_industrious.description: Members of this species are known for their diligent and hard-working nature, always going above and beyond.

trait_intelligent.name: Intelligent
trait_intelligent.description: This species is highly intelligent, and enjoys faster technological progress.

trait_thrifty.name: Thrifty
trait_thrifty.description: This species is instinctively economical and is always looking to make a good profit, whatever corners need cutting.

trait_natural_engineers.name: Natural Engineers
trait_natural_engineers.description: Members of this species have a natural inclination towards engineering and material sciences.

trait_natural_physicists.name: Natural Physicists
trait_natural_physicists.description: Members of this species have a natural inclination towards theoretical physics and astral phenomena.

trait_natural_sociologists.name: Natural Sociologists
trait_natural_sociologists.description: Members of this species have a natural inclination towards sociology and biological studies.

trait_extremely_adaptive.name: Extremely Adaptive
trait_extremely_adaptive.description: This species is remarkably adept at adapting to any foreign environments.

trait_adaptive.name: Adaptive
trait_adaptive.description: This species is highly adaptive when it comes to foreign environments.

trait_nonadaptive.name: Nonadaptive
trait_nonadaptive.description: This species does not adapt well to foreign environments.

trait_rapid_breeders.name: Rapid Breeders
trait_rapid_breeders.description: This species reproduces at a very rapid rate, increasing population growth.

trait_slow_breeders.name: Slow Breeders
trait_slow_breeders.description: This species reproduces at a slow rate, lowering population growth.

trait_talented.name: Talented
trait_talented.description: Member of this species are born with a natural aptitude.

trait_quick_learners.name: Quick Learners
trait_quick_learners.description: Members of this species are quick to learn from their experiences.

trait_slow_learners.name: Slow Learners
trait_slow_learners.description: Members of this species are slow to learn from their experiences.

trait_traditional.name: Traditional
trait_traditional.description: Certain aspects of this species' cognition make it predisposed toward historical precedence and the value of collective unity.

trait_auto_mod_robotic.name: Adaptive Frames
trait_auto_mod_robotic.description: This system dynamically reconfigures hardware to meet operational demands, optimizing performance for every designated task.

trait_robot_power_drills.name: Power Drills
trait_robot_power_drills.description: Outfit a robot with a battery of power drills, and everything looks like a mineral deposit.

trait_robot_harvesters.name: Harvesters
trait_robot_harvesters.description: A suite of tools, from nutrient solution diagnostics and on-site balancing to per-stalk micro-threshing, enables robotic workers to increase produce yields.

trait_robot_superconductive.name: Superconductive
trait_robot_superconductive.description: The use of superconductive materials in units has cut energy transmission losses to zero percent.

trait_robot_efficient_processors.name: Efficient Processors
trait_robot_efficient_processors.description: These highly efficient processors increase the potential workload and endurance of all units.

trait_robot_logic_engines.name: Logic Engines
trait_robot_logic_engines.description: Efficiently navigating the increasingly complex frontiers of science requires new states, beyond the simple half-truths of ternary and quaternary logic.

trait_robot_loyalty_circuits.name: Loyalty Circuits
trait_robot_loyalty_circuits.description: Loyalty as an ideal is a distinctly organic concept. Instead, imagine loyalty as a physiological need in even the remotest of terminals.

trait_robot_domestic_protocols.name: Domestic Protocols
trait_robot_domestic_protocols.description: Specialized equipment and behavior protocols for all conceivable domestic needs. Full functionality guaranteed.

trait_robot_double_jointed.name: Double-Jointed
trait_robot_double_jointed.description: Collapsible labor units with flexible joints that enable them to fold neatly into stacks during transportation, then self-assemble on site.

trait_robot_bulky.name: Bulky
trait_robot_bulky.description: These highly advanced mega-machines were not designed to traverse the universe in a box.

trait_robot_enhanced_memory.name: Enhanced Memory
trait_robot_enhanced_memory.description: All autonomous units are fitted with memory cells using a revolutionary new technique for magnetic induction, improving their performance significantly.

trait_robot_emotion_emulators.name: Emotion Emulators
trait_robot_emotion_emulators.description: Complex social predictive models help autonomous units to not only emulate appropriate emotions but to elicit favorable responses from organics and synthetics alike.

trait_robot_uncanny.name: Uncanny
trait_robot_uncanny.description: These monstrous machines were created in the image of one of the most horrific species in the universe, and the resemblance is uncanny.

trait_robot_durable.name: Durable
trait_robot_durable.description: Protected by exoskeletons of chrome-plated titanium, these heavy-duty machines were designed to excel under harsh conditions and require less maintenance.

trait_robot_high_maintenance.name: High Maintenance
trait_robot_high_maintenance.description: These machines were designed with a complete disregard for longevity and are prone to malfunction. They will require frequent maintenance.

trait_robot_learning_algorithms.name: Learning Algorithms
trait_robot_learning_algorithms.description: Sophisticated, self-learning algorithms that stimulate the rapid evolution of a unit's neural clusters.

leader_trait_brainslug.name: Brain Slug Host
leader_trait_brainslug.description: This leader is enjoying the presence of a neural symbiont: a helpful slug that attaches itself to the brain stem of its host.

leader_trait_admiral_hells_heart.name: Hell's Heart
leader_trait_admiral_hells_heart.description: When it comes to warfare, this leader is mercilessly obsessive, and singular in purpose.

leader_trait_admiral_warform.name: Corrosive Survivor
leader_trait_admiral_warform.description: The blessing of the Animator of Clay has allowed the warform to survive in the most hostile conditions, and adapt to its corrosive environment.

leader_trait_admiral_warform_node.name: Corrosive Survivor Teachings
leader_trait_admiral_warform_node.description: The unique knowledge of the warform has become our own.

leader_trait_governor_gray.name: Nanite Entity
leader_trait_governor_gray.description: Gray is a dense swarm of billions of advanced nanites.

leader_trait_govenor_caretaker.name: Caretaker
leader_trait_govenor_caretaker.description: Ensuring nutrients are available, that the workspace is clean, and that the wards are properly stimulated all fall under the purview of a Caretaker.

leader_trait_govenor_caretaker_node.name: Caretaker Teachings
leader_trait_govenor_caretaker_node.description: The unique knowledge of the Caretaker has become our own.

trait_brainslug.name: Brain Slug Host
trait_brainslug.description: This species is enjoying the presence of a neural symbiont: a helpful slug that attaches itself to the brain stem of its host.

trait_nivlac.name: Nivlac
trait_nivlac.description: This species possesses perplexing adaptability, allowing it to thrive in most environments and survive virtually everywhere.

trait_robot_notofthisworld.name: Not of This World
trait_robot_notofthisworld.description: These machines are not from this universe and are degrading slowly.

trait_notofthisworld.name: Not of This World
trait_notofthisworld.description: This species is not from this universe and is degrading slowly.

leader_trait_caravan_counter.name: Caravan Counter
leader_trait_caravan_counter.description: This leader has ample experience stopping the flighty Caravaneer fleets dead in their tracks.

trait_nuumismatic_administration.name: Numistic Administration
trait_nuumismatic_administration.description: This species has been trained in the holy art of Numistic administration.

leader_trait_waste_management_specialist.name: Waste Management Specialist
leader_trait_waste_management_specialist.description: This leader has an almost uncanny ability to reduce and repurpose industrial waste. How do they do it? It's best not to ask.

leader_trait_nuumismatic_priest.name: Merchant of Numa
leader_trait_nuumismatic_priest.description: A level nine Shakvah with enhanced mind focus and inner gaze...

leader_trait_traumatized.name: Traumatized
leader_trait_traumatized.description: Recently sustained psychological trauma is interfering with this leader's performance.

leader_trait_maimed.name: Maimed
leader_trait_maimed.description: This leader has sustained irreversible physical injury that has lowered their life expectancy significantly.

leader_trait_inspired_archaeologist.name: Inspired Archaeologist
leader_trait_inspired_archaeologist.description: This leader has had a sudden stroke of inspiration.

leader_trait_inspired_researcher.name: Inspired Researcher
leader_trait_inspired_researcher.description: This leader has had a sudden stroke of inspiration.

leader_trait_inspired_surveyor.name: Inspired Surveyor
leader_trait_inspired_surveyor.description: This leader has had a sudden stroke of inspiration.

trait_adaptive_lithoid.name: Adaptive
trait_adaptive_lithoid.description: This species is highly adaptive when it comes to foreign environments.

trait_rapid_breeders_lithoid.name: Rapid Breeders
trait_rapid_breeders_lithoid.description: This species reproduces at a very rapid rate, increasing population growth.

trait_delicious.name: Delicious
trait_delicious.description: This species has the curious evolutionary adaptation of being highly nutritious when eaten.

trait_nerve_stapled.name: Nerve Stapled
trait_nerve_stapled.description: Inessential neural pathways relating to self-preservation and free will are severed, creating a docile and obedient client species.

trait_fertile.name: Fertile
trait_fertile.description: The natural fecundity and geniality of this species has been dramatically enhanced through aggressive physical and behavioral sculpting.

trait_robust.name: Robust
trait_robust.description: Bio-optimized organs with redundant functions have made this species extraordinarily resistant to environmental hazards and disease.

trait_erudite.name: Erudite
trait_erudite.description: Biological engineering has unlocked previously dormant parts of this species' brain, greatly increasing mental acuity.

trait_vat_grown.name: Vat-Grown
trait_vat_grown.description: Artificially grown in cloning vats, the natural reproductive abilities of this species have been negatively impacted.

trait_felsic.name: Felsic
trait_felsic.description: This species has been engineered to be especially mineral-rich.

trait_ductile.name: Ductile
trait_ductile.description: This species has been engineered to grow reusable alloy compounds.

trait_natural_machinist.name: Natural Machinist
trait_natural_machinist.description: This species has been engineered to have an incredible knack at working with machinery.

trait_drake_scaled.name: Drake-Scaled
trait_drake_scaled.description: This species has the genetic material from a stellar dragon spliced into its DNA. As such, they shed scales which can be recycled into useful alloys.

trait_voidling.name: Voidling
trait_voidling.description: This species has the genetic material from the Voidspawn spliced into its DNA. Subsisting off cosmic radiation, they are highly resistant to hostile environments.

trait_tiyanki.name: Polymelic
trait_tiyanki.description: This species has added genetic material from the Tiyanki Matriarch into their DNA sequence. This has granted them rapid asexual reproduction, as well as a few unexpected tentacles.

leader_trait_bulwark_watcher.name: Bulwark Watcher
leader_trait_bulwark_watcher.description: Vigilant crews stand ready to detect enemy fleets daring to attempt furtive and cowardly incursions.

leader_trait_bulwark_retaliator.name: Bulwark Retaliator
leader_trait_bulwark_retaliator.description: With a righteous commander at the helm, fleets stand ready to avenge any insult to our sovereignty.

leader_trait_bulwark_sentinel.name: Bulwark Sentinel
leader_trait_bulwark_sentinel.description: Courageous crews hold the line against invaders, ready to repel anyone foolish enough to invade our domain!

leader_trait_scholarium_investigator.name: Scholarium Investigator
leader_trait_scholarium_investigator.description: Scholarium specialists view the universe as one large puzzle, waiting to be solved.

leader_trait_scholarium_explorer.name: Scholarium Explorer
leader_trait_scholarium_explorer.description: The curiosity of Scholarium specialists will drive them to the ends of the universe, and probably beyond.

leader_trait_scholarium_observer.name: Scholarium Observer
leader_trait_scholarium_observer.description: No mystery shall be left unsolved in a Scholarium scholar's wake.

leader_trait_prospectorium_extractor.name: Prospectorium Extractor
leader_trait_prospectorium_extractor.description: Energy, alloys, and minerals all empower our ambitions. Extractors maximize their acquisition.

leader_trait_prospectorium_optimizer.name: Prospectorium Optimizer
leader_trait_prospectorium_optimizer.description: Keeping a populace healthy and productive requires resources, and optimizers are ideally suited to manage them.

leader_trait_prospectorium_refiner.name: Prospectorium Refiner
leader_trait_prospectorium_refiner.description: Refiners have the rarefied expertise necessary to improve our acquisition of exotic gases, motes, and crystals.

leader_trait_admiral_mind_wipe_01.name: Shroud-Touched Commander
leader_trait_admiral_mind_wipe_01.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this commander's mind now swirls with new ideas to enhance ship performance.

leader_trait_admiral_mind_wipe_02.name: Shroud-Touched Commander
leader_trait_admiral_mind_wipe_02.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this commander's mind now swirls with new ideas to enhance weapon systems.

leader_trait_general_mind_wipe_01.name: Shroud-Touched Commander
leader_trait_general_mind_wipe_01.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this commander's mind now swirls with new ideas to increase the potency of our armies.

leader_trait_general_mind_wipe_02.name: Shroud-Touched Commander
leader_trait_general_mind_wipe_02.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this commander's mind now swirls with new ideas to enhance the performance of our armies.

leader_trait_scientist_mind_wipe_01.name: Shroud-Touched Scientist
leader_trait_scientist_mind_wipe_01.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this scientist's mind now swirls with new ideas to boost research performance.

leader_trait_scientist_mind_wipe_02.name: Shroud-Touched Scientist
leader_trait_scientist_mind_wipe_02.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this scientist's mind now swirls with new ideas to assist archaeological research.

leader_trait_ruler_mind_wipe_01.name: Shroud-Touched Architect
leader_trait_ruler_mind_wipe_01.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this leader's mind now swirls with new ideas to assist construction efforts.

leader_trait_ruler_mind_wipe_02.name: Shroud-Touched Logistician
leader_trait_ruler_mind_wipe_02.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this leader's mind now swirls with new ideas to boost fleet performance.

gestalt_trait_commander_mind_wipe_01.name: Shroud-Touched Naval Drone
gestalt_trait_commander_mind_wipe_01.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone is now capable of enhancing ship performance.

gestalt_trait_commander_mind_wipe_02.name: Shroud-Touched Naval Drone
gestalt_trait_commander_mind_wipe_02.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone is now capable of enhancing weapon systems.

gestalt_trait_general_mind_wipe_01.name: Shroud-Touched Assault Drone
gestalt_trait_general_mind_wipe_01.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone's uplink to our armies has been enhanced.

gestalt_trait_general_mind_wipe_02.name: Shroud-Touched Assault Drone
gestalt_trait_general_mind_wipe_02.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone's uplink to our armies has been improved.

gestalt_trait_scientist_mind_wipe_02.name: Shroud-Touched Research Drone
gestalt_trait_scientist_mind_wipe_02.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone is now capable of enhanced archaeological research.

gestalt_trait_ruler_mind_wipe_01.name: Shroud-Touched Command Drone
gestalt_trait_ruler_mind_wipe_01.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; this drone is now capable of enhancing our construction techniques.

gestalt_trait_ruler_mind_wipe_02.name: Shroud-Touched Command Drone
gestalt_trait_ruler_mind_wipe_02.description: Passage through the Shroud is not lightly taken; is now capable of boosting fleet performance.

trait_incubator.name: Incubators
trait_incubator.description: When isolated or few in numbers, a species with this trait naturally adapts and is able to focus on procreation with an intentness others would consider extreme. However, when in large numbers, this effect is reversed, and they find reproduction more difficult.

trait_inorganic_breath.name: Inorganic Breath
trait_inorganic_breath.description: The slightly toxic digestive methods of this species have resulted in a highly exotic breath composition.

trait_noxious.name: Noxious
trait_noxious.description: Extremely unpleasant to be in the vicinity of, beings with this trait take vindication from being insufferable to everyone else.

trait_exotic_metabolism.name: Exotic Metabolism
trait_exotic_metabolism.description: A metabolism based on exotic - and expensive - gases has vastly enhanced this species' abilities.

trait_auto_mod_overtuned.name: Fleeting Excellence
trait_auto_mod_overtuned.description: Advanced epigenetic triggers boost physical and cognitive performance in the workplace, dramatically shortening life expectancy. After all, fading away is never as much fun as burning out.

trait_spliced_adaptability.name: Spliced Adaptability
trait_spliced_adaptability.description: A few genetic snips and slices here and there and they can survive nearly anywhere. The process comes with an acceptable number of deaths from side effects.

trait_juiced_power.name: Juiced Power
trait_juiced_power.description: Adrenaline released on demand and hyper-potent growth hormones have led to a massive increase in strength. Just ignore the occasional internal tearing.

trait_farm_hands.name: Farm Appendages
trait_farm_hands.description: The more appendages, the higher the farming output. Some appendages can even operate while their host is asleep. Rumors of hosts strangled by their new limbs have been deemed unfounded in our latest investigation.

trait_crack_miner.name: Dedicated Miner
trait_crack_miner.description: Supreme hand-eye coordination, near endless endurance and self-purifying lungs have created entire crack teams of miners. Sadly they get brittle without sunlight.

trait_technical_skill.name: Technical Talent
trait_technical_skill.description: Extra internal organs grant a vastly increased innate sensitivity to electricity and magnetic fields. Reports of recipients hearing screams and voices from the reactors should be ignored.

trait_commercial_genius.name: Commercial Genius
trait_commercial_genius.description: By tweaking agreeability and dialing down empathy, it is possible to artificially kindle a spark of trading genius. The pursuit of unmatched commercial dominance outweighs any potential side effects.

trait_crafted_smiles.name: Crafted Smiles
trait_crafted_smiles.description: Slightly shifted facial features, a mix of enhanced and slackened muscular development - and of course outside chemicals - have created the perfect smile. Forever.

trait_low_maintenance.name: Low Maintenance
trait_low_maintenance.description: Reduced consumption, excretion, and rest rates have resulted in twice the beings for half the price. However, demand for protein-rich meals has increased.

trait_artificial_intelligence.name: Augmented Intelligence
trait_artificial_intelligence.description: More brains equals more brain power. Extra thinking organs have been added in strategic areas of the recipient's body to ensure maximum cognitive capacity. Even if they don't always agree.

trait_gene_mentorship.name: Gene Mentorship
trait_gene_mentorship.description: By combining genetically redesigned 'instinctive knowledge' and outside chemical stimuli, we have succeeded in vastly accelerating our learning capacities. Although it has resulted in some extremely paranoid individuals.

trait_expressed_tradition.name: Expressed Tradition
trait_expressed_tradition.description: Fanaticism on demand: faith is merely a cocktail of hormones, one we have perfected. Where that faith eventually leads is a matter of subsequent guidance.

trait_elevated_synapses.name: Elevated Synapses
trait_elevated_synapses.description: As a computational device, a brain does not run at 100% capacity. However, we have gone beyond the standard usage. If issues are encountered, try turning it off and on again.

trait_preplanned_growth.name: Pre-Planned Growth
trait_preplanned_growth.description: Scheduled fertility, scheduled interest, scheduled compatibility. Population growth on demand for a strong and stable population - with a few minor edits here and there. Jealous individuals are to be directed to the nearest Fertility Center for mandatory training.

trait_excessive_endurance.name: Excessive Endurance
trait_excessive_endurance.description: The greatest in adaptability genes have been hyper-expressed in these specimens. Mutation rates around 30% indicate a somewhat stable and successful experiment.

leader_trait_ambassador_ear_to_the_groun.name: All-knowing
leader_trait_ambassador_ear_to_the_groun.description: This leader has eyes everywhere. Plus [root.species.GetEarNamePlural]. And other assorted sensory organs.

leader_trait_ambassador_whisper_networks.description: Feigning a penchant for gossip, this official is a master at forming contacts with loose-lipped leaders in high places.

leader_trait_ambassador_bully.description: Spite can be a powerful motivator. This leader has mastered the art of turning bitter complaints into calls to action.

leader_trait_ambassador_favor_maker.name: Opportunist
leader_trait_ambassador_favor_maker.description: This sly ambassador is quick to turn every perceived slight into blackmail material.

leader_trait_federal_negotiator.name: Camaraderie
leader_trait_federal_negotiator.description: This leader firmly believes in the uniting power of Federations. [Root.GetHisHer] dedication is an inspiration for us all.

leader_trait_federal_greeter.name: Greeter
leader_trait_federal_greeter.description: This delegate is quick to greet new Federation members and knows how to make them feel part of the group.

leader_trait_federal_sweet_talker.name: Peacemaker
leader_trait_federal_sweet_talker.description: We may have different beliefs, but we share the same goal, the same Federation, the same dreams. Conflict only makes us weak.

leader_trait_federal_sweet_talker_2.name: Leader Trait Federal Sweet Talker 2
leader_trait_federal_sweet_talker_2.description: Leader Trait Federal Sweet Talker 2 Desc

leader_trait_federal_sweet_talker_3.name: Leader Trait Federal Sweet Talker 3
leader_trait_federal_sweet_talker_3.description: Leader Trait Federal Sweet Talker 3 Desc

leader_trait_federal_joint_navy.name: Joint Exercise
leader_trait_federal_joint_navy.description: Unity is strength. Sometimes, that strength is inside us. Sometimes, it just means having a bigger fleet.

leader_trait_federal_joint_navy_2.name: Leader Trait Federal Joint Navy 2
leader_trait_federal_joint_navy_2.description: Leader Trait Federal Joint Navy 2 Desc

leader_trait_federal_joint_navy_3.name: Leader Trait Federal Joint Navy 3
leader_trait_federal_joint_navy_3.description: Leader Trait Federal Joint Navy 3 Desc

leader_trait_diplo_weight.name: Gravitas
leader_trait_diplo_weight.description: There's a certain... something in the way this leader behaves that commands respect. When this delegate speaks, everyone stops to listen.

leader_trait_supporting_voter.name: Mutual Support
leader_trait_supporting_voter.description: This leader is always eager to congratulate others for their success.

leader_trait_gorky.name: AI Assistant 'Gorky'
leader_trait_gorky.description: This little assistant helps out with sorting data and analyzing it. Its AI is a unique mix of research and companion bots.

leader_trait_legendary_leader.name: Luminary
leader_trait_legendary_leader.description: The Luminary grows in power over time. The Unification Wars were a brutal affair. In the end, [Root.GetName] brought peace and purpose to us all. The Luminary is the living symbol of what our species can achieve, and an inspiration to all.[This.Paragon_Origin_Ascension_Desc]

leader_trait_legendary_offspring.name: Luminary Bloodline
leader_trait_legendary_offspring.description: The Heir to the Luminary. Living up to their predecessor's legacy will be a challenge, but this leader already shows great promise.

leader_trait_governor_psionic_communion.name: Psionic Communion
leader_trait_governor_psionic_communion.description: This leader's psionic abilities improve the populace's mental wellbeing, building trust and providing a sense of safety.

leader_trait_legendary_terraformation_nu.name: Terraformation Nuclei
leader_trait_legendary_terraformation_nu.description: The buds on Astrocreator Azaryn's back. She is secretive about them. Three buds remain.

leader_trait_legendary_terraformation_nu.name: Terraformation Nuclei
leader_trait_legendary_terraformation_nu.description: The buds on Astrocreator Azaryn's back. Her health seems reliant on them. Two buds remain.

leader_trait_legendary_terraformation_nu.name: Terraformation Nucleus
leader_trait_legendary_terraformation_nu.description: The buds on Astrocreator Azaryn's back, and the source of her powers. Azaryn needs them to survive. A single bud remains.

leader_trait_legendary_far_from_home.name: Nebulous Past
leader_trait_legendary_far_from_home.description: Where does he come from? Who placed him in cryostasis, and why was he released? The unanswered questions of his past fuel this leader's thirst for knowledge.

leader_trait_legendary_ancestors_knowled.name: Ancestral Inheritance
leader_trait_legendary_ancestors_knowled.description: This leader's body is itself a vast storehouse of knowledge and skill; a genetic inheritance granted by the sacrifice of his ancestors.

leader_trait_legendary_military_knowledg.name: Inspired Commander
leader_trait_legendary_military_knowledg.description: A brilliant military commander, loved by the troops.

leader_trait_legendary_gunboat_diplomacy.description: This leader favors displays of power. A well-placed threat is sometimes worth a thousand words.

leader_trait_legendary_natural_ruler.name: Enlightened Ruler
leader_trait_legendary_natural_ruler.description: Charismatic, caring and selfless, this leader seeks to improve quality of life for all.

leader_trait_legendary_natural_ruler_3.name: Leader Trait Legendary Natural Ruler 3
leader_trait_legendary_natural_ruler_3.description: Leader Trait Legendary Natural Ruler 3 Desc

leader_trait_legendary_industry_titan.name: Titan of Industry
leader_trait_legendary_industry_titan.description: This leader sees a healthy economy as the foundation of any great nation.

leader_trait_legendary_industry_titan_2.name: Leader Trait Legendary Industry Titan 2
leader_trait_legendary_industry_titan_2.description: Leader Trait Legendary Industry Titan 2 Desc

leader_trait_legendary_industry_titan_3.name: Leader Trait Legendary Industry Titan 3
leader_trait_legendary_industry_titan_3.description: Leader Trait Legendary Industry Titan 3 Desc

leader_trait_legendary_great_inventor.name: Great Inventor
leader_trait_legendary_great_inventor.description: This leader is a pioneer in robotics and our lead researcher in workforce automation.

leader_trait_legendary_great_inventor_2.name: Leader Trait Legendary Great Inventor 2
leader_trait_legendary_great_inventor_2.description: Leader Trait Legendary Great Inventor 2 Desc

leader_trait_legendary_great_inventor_3.name: Leader Trait Legendary Great Inventor 3
leader_trait_legendary_great_inventor_3.description: Leader Trait Legendary Great Inventor 3 Desc

leader_trait_legendary_genetic_purist.name: Genome Artist
leader_trait_legendary_genetic_purist.description: This leader's flair for genetic manipulation is legendary.

leader_trait_legendary_genetic_purist_2.name: Leader Trait Legendary Genetic Purist 2
leader_trait_legendary_genetic_purist_2.description: Leader Trait Legendary Genetic Purist 2 Desc

leader_trait_legendary_genetic_purist_3.name: Leader Trait Legendary Genetic Purist 3
leader_trait_legendary_genetic_purist_3.description: Leader Trait Legendary Genetic Purist 3 Desc

leader_trait_legendary_evervigilant.name: Ever Vigilant
leader_trait_legendary_evervigilant.description: This leader is extremely rigorous with security and encryption protocols, and personally oversees our intelligence department.

leader_trait_legendary_unfriendly.name: Blunt
leader_trait_legendary_unfriendly.description: Callous and very direct, this leader regularly makes diplomatic blunders.

leader_trait_legendary_warmonger.name: Warmonger
leader_trait_legendary_warmonger.description: Provocative and adversarial, this leader enjoys conflict, be it social or martial.

leader_trait_legendary_dreamlike.name: Absent-Minded
leader_trait_legendary_dreamlike.description: This leader is easily distracted and often forgets about less important tasks.

leader_trait_legendary_harsh_ruler.name: Brutal
leader_trait_legendary_harsh_ruler.description: This leader's answer to any issue is brutal oppression, which alienates the local population.

leader_trait_legendary_too_open.name: Naive
leader_trait_legendary_too_open.description: This leader is too trusting and forgiving. Others find it easy to abuse these qualities.

leader_trait_legendary_hoplofobia.name: Fearful
leader_trait_legendary_hoplofobia.description: Terrified of risks, this leader is overly cautious, and implements excessive checks and redundancies in their workflow.

leader_trait_legendary_bad_meritocracy.name: Elitist
leader_trait_legendary_bad_meritocracy.description: This leader abhors mediocrity, often dismissing talented people for even the slightest mistake.

trait_auto_mod_cyborg.name: Universal Augmentations
trait_auto_mod_cyborg.description: Universal plug-and-play connection ports allow augmentations to be replaced as needed, aligning their capabilities with current operational demands.

trait_cyborg_power_drills.name: Power Drills
trait_cyborg_power_drills.description: Outfit a cyborg with a battery of power drills, and suddenly everything looks like a mineral deposit.

trait_cyborg_harvesters.name: Harvesters
trait_cyborg_harvesters.description: A suite of tools, from nutrient solution diagnostics and on-site balancing to per-stalk micro-threshing, enables cybernetic workers to increase produce yields.

trait_cyborg_superconductive.name: Superconductive
trait_cyborg_superconductive.description: The use of superconductive materials in units have cut energy transmission losses to zero percent.

trait_cyborg_efficient_processors.name: Efficient Processors
trait_cyborg_efficient_processors.description: These highly efficient processors increase the both workload and endurance.

trait_cyborg_logic_engines.name: Logic Engines
trait_cyborg_logic_engines.description: Efficiently navigating the increasingly complex frontiers of science requires parallel processors to augment organic brains.

trait_cyborg_loyalty_circuits.name: Loyalty Circuits
trait_cyborg_loyalty_circuits.description: Loyalty as an ideal is a distinctly organic concept. It is much more efficient to simply program compliance.

trait_cyborg_double_jointed.name: Double-Jointed
trait_cyborg_double_jointed.description: Collapsible labor units with flexible joints enable them to fold neatly into stacks during transportation, then self-assemble on site.

trait_cyborg_bulky.name: Bulky
trait_cyborg_bulky.description: These highly advanced mega-machines were not designed to traverse the universe in a box.

trait_cyborg_enhanced_memory.name: Enhanced Memory
trait_cyborg_enhanced_memory.description: A revolutionary technique fits autonomous units with memory cells using a revolutionary, new technique for magnetic induction, improving their performance significantly.

trait_cyborg_durable.name: Durable
trait_cyborg_durable.description: Protected by exoskeletons of chrome-plated titanium, these heavy-duty machines were designed to excel under harsh conditions and require less maintenance.

trait_cyborg_high_maintenance.name: High Maintenance
trait_cyborg_high_maintenance.description: These machines were designed with a complete disregard for longevity and are prone to malfunction. They will require frequent maintenance.

trait_cyborg_learning_algorithms.name: Learning Algorithms
trait_cyborg_learning_algorithms.description: Sophisticated, self-learning algorithms that stimulate the rapid evolution of a unit's neural clusters.

trait_cyborg_power_intensive.name: Power Intensive
trait_cyborg_power_intensive.description: These cybernetic components require frequent recharging from an external power source.

leader_trait_fotd_scientist.name: Cunning
leader_trait_fotd_scientist.description: This scientist's experience has resulted in valuable insights into cloaking tech.

leader_trait_fotd_commander.name: Cunning
leader_trait_fotd_commander.description: This commander's upbringing taught them to use cloaking in ways our own commanders could never imagine.

leader_trait_preftl_haggler.name: Business Mind
leader_trait_preftl_haggler.description: Coming from a [Owner.GetPreFTLUpper] country, this leader has displayed an exceptionally keen mind for business.

leader_trait_plague_hardened.name: Plague-Hardened Commander
leader_trait_plague_hardened.description: Having gazed into the abyss, this commander possesses a keen and tempered mind.

trait_stargazer.name: Stargazer
trait_stargazer.description: This species has always, consciously or not, longed to traverse the void between the stars.

leader_trait_rift_warped.name: Rift Warped
leader_trait_rift_warped.description: This leader has crossed the astral planes; the effects of such a journey are both lasting and profound.

leader_trait_partially_digested.name: Partially Digested
leader_trait_partially_digested.description: This leader has had an unfortunate encounter with a giant worm from another dimension. While no longer whole of body, they have gained some unique insight into molecular Biology.

leader_trait_obelisk_curse.name: Obelisk's Curse
leader_trait_obelisk_curse.description: A servant of the black obelisk, this leader claims to seek to restore the balance we have disrupted.

leader_trait_planar_theorist.name: Planar Theorist
leader_trait_planar_theorist.description: This leader specializes in the study of Astral Rifts and the behavior of dimensions outside of our own.

leader_trait_academic_astral_rift_expert.name: Riftwalker
leader_trait_academic_astral_rift_expert.description: The Rift beckons. The scholar answers the call.

leader_trait_academic_astral_rift_expert.name: Leader Trait Academic Astral Rift Expert 2
leader_trait_academic_astral_rift_expert.description: Leader Trait Academic Astral Rift Expert 2 Desc

leader_trait_academic_astral_rift_expert.name: Leader Trait Academic Astral Rift Expert 3
leader_trait_academic_astral_rift_expert.description: Leader Trait Academic Astral Rift Expert 3 Desc

leader_trait_foreign_consciousness.name: Foreign Consciousness
leader_trait_foreign_consciousness.description: This leader provides a vessel for a psionic, rift-born entity, allowing for greater understanding of the strange physics within the astral planes.

leader_trait_black_light_blinded.name: Black Light Blinded
leader_trait_black_light_blinded.description: Blinded by a dark sun in the astral planes, this leader has gained an insatiable hunger for knowledge.

leader_trait_sanitary_drone.name: Sanitary Drone Assistant
leader_trait_sanitary_drone.description: This leader learned how to clean well.

leader_trait_spacebender.name: Spacebender
leader_trait_spacebender.description: Deeply attuned to the spaces between space, this leader is capable of slipping easily across galaxies.

leader_trait_energy_weapon_specialist.name: Energy Weapon Specialist
leader_trait_energy_weapon_specialist.description: The calculations and precise focusing it takes to properly calibrate energy weapons can be incredibly time consuming, but such skills come naturally to this commander.

leader_trait_blorg_insight.name: Blorg Insight
leader_trait_blorg_insight.description: Centuries of studying the broadcasts and culture of a certain species of upright mammal has made this individual brazenly eager to please. Some would say, annoyingly so.

trait_plasmic.name: Plasmic
trait_plasmic.description: The external membrane and amorphous body of this species allows them to adapt to any environment and renders them immune to a wide variety of diseases.

trait_exd.name: Extradimensional
trait_exd.description: This species originates from another dimension and requires a great deal of energy to survive in our universe.

trait_storm_touched.name: Storm Touched
trait_storm_touched.description: Being inside a cosmic storm fills the Storm Touched with devotional aspiration.

leader_trait_storm_rider_commander.name: Storm Rider
leader_trait_storm_rider_commander.description: Storm Riders revel in the rush of adrenaline, unlocking their true potential in the torrent of a cosmic storm. Council positions replace their field bonuses with council bonuses.

leader_trait_storm_rider_scientist.name: Storm Rider
leader_trait_storm_rider_scientist.description: Storm Riders revel in the rush of adrenaline, unlocking their true potential in the torrent of a cosmic storm. Council positions replace their field bonuses with council bonuses.

leader_trait_storm_rider_official.name: Storm Rider
leader_trait_storm_rider_official.description: Storm Riders revel in the rush of adrenaline, unlocking their true potential in the torrent of a cosmic storm. Council positions replace their field bonuses with council bonuses.

trait_storm_fused.name: Storm Fused
trait_storm_fused.description: The Storm Fused learned to cultivate their Inner Storm as they strain for enlightenment.

trait_pathogenic_genes.name: Pathogenic Genes
trait_pathogenic_genes.description: A novel genetic disease prevents this species from producing offspring. It has resisted all known gene therapy methods.

trait_limited_cybernetic.name: Limited Cybernetic
trait_limited_cybernetic.description: This species has the least amount of implants necessary to function in a cybernetic society.

leader_trait_limited_cyborg.name: Limited Cyborg
leader_trait_limited_cyborg.description: This leader has the least amount of implants necessary to function in a cybernetic society.

leader_trait_robotic_surrogate.name: Robotic Surrogate
leader_trait_robotic_surrogate.description: Cumbersome and slow, this robot body is a surrogate for a digitized leader in the Identity Repository.

leader_trait_ritualistic_implants_cyborg.name: Ritualistic Implants
leader_trait_ritualistic_implants_cyborg.description: These implants are proudly adorned by the faithful. Their dedication to the divine is an inspiration to all.

trait_cetanas_prisoner.name: Reawakened
trait_cetanas_prisoner.description: Extracted from Cetana's storage Matrix, these individuals have been reborn in synthetic forms. Their adjustment to this new existence is fraught with challenges. Their outward compliance masks a more profound struggle, as vacant expressions reveal the indelible scars left by Cetana's manipulations.

leader_trait_buccaneer.name: Buccaneer
leader_trait_buccaneer.description: A master of battlefield salvage, this leader is able to extract every ounce of value from even the most damaged wrecks.

leader_trait_trailblazer.name: Trailblazer
leader_trait_trailblazer.description: Enthralled by the rewarding prospects of the galactic frontier, this leader hopes to chart the furthest reaches of space.

leader_trait_treasure_hoarder.name: Treasure Hoarder
leader_trait_treasure_hoarder.description: No bounty is high enough to satisfy this leader's ambition. The accumulation of valuable resources is their primary motivation.

leader_trait_pirate_queen.name: Pirate Queen
leader_trait_pirate_queen.description: Years of skulduggery and outlandish exploits have created a leader who never leaves with less than she came for.

leader_trait_trophy_hunter.name: Trophy Hunter
leader_trait_trophy_hunter.description: Tempered by hardship and armed with a lifetime of experience, this commander has an uncanny understanding of Space Fauna. The key to a successful hunt is to think like one's prey, but of course, only the perfect shot will produce a perfect trophy.

leader_trait_gifted_trapper.name: Gifted Trapper
leader_trait_gifted_trapper.description: A skilled researcher who takes the utmost care in the safe capture and transportation of live specimens. This leader's commitment to creature welfare inspires others to improve research standards across all disciplines.

leader_trait_void_hunter.name: Void Hunter
leader_trait_void_hunter.description: A knowledgeable hunter, well-suited for taking down big game. Patient in their approach, and precise when they strike.

leader_trait_void_hunter_2.name: Void Hunter II
leader_trait_void_hunter_2.description: A knowledgeable hunter, well-suited for taking down big game. Patient in their approach, and precise when they strike.

leader_trait_void_tracker.name: Void Tracker
leader_trait_void_tracker.description: This leader's talent for capturing wild Space Fauna efficiently and safely is unparalleled.

leader_trait_void_tracker_2.name: Void Tracker II
leader_trait_void_tracker_2.description: This leader's talent for capturing wild Space Fauna efficiently and safely is unparalleled.

leader_trait_cutholoid_victim.name: Cutholoid Victim
leader_trait_cutholoid_victim.description: This leader was trapped for some time in the digestive system of a spaceborne Cutholoid. While no longer whole of body, they have gained some unique insight into molecular Biology.

trait_leader_second_chanced.name: Second Chance
trait_leader_second_chanced.description: This leader was saved from certain death by their unique biology, it will not happen again.

trait_ruler_apex_predator.name: Apex Predator
trait_ruler_apex_predator.description: A people defined by Evolutionary Predation would allow none but their most adaptable to lead them. This apex ruler not only harvests the genomes of defeated foes, but also appropriates their cunning and resolve, turning every victory into a step toward perfect mastery.

trait_leader_genetic_purist.name: Genetic Purist
trait_leader_genetic_purist.description: This leader's work is guided by an unshakable vision of genetic perfection, and an intolerance for imperfection in all its forms.

trait_egg_laying.name: Egg Laying
trait_egg_laying.description: The young of this species do not develop inside a parent, but inside the protective shell of an egg. This allows for rapid growth during times of plenty.

trait_seasonal_dormancy.name: Seasonal Dormancy
trait_seasonal_dormancy.description: This species has evolved on a planet with cyclical seasons that support hibernation. In the modern age, these seasonal triggers can be artificially simulated to efficiently store less productive members of society.

trait_hollow_bones.name: Hollow Bones
trait_hollow_bones.description: The fragile bones of this species allow them to move elegantly and with ease. However, they are also more susceptible to the gravitational effects of their world.

trait_rooted.name: Rooted
trait_rooted.description: This species literally takes root in whichever environment they find themselves, making removal a highly traumatic experience.

trait_acidic_vascularity.name: Acidic Vascularity
trait_acidic_vascularity.description: The internal fluids of this species serve as their most potent defense. Highly corrosive and lethal, these liquids ensure that any enemies regret poking holes.

trait_shelled.name: Shelled
trait_shelled.description: Whether naturally grown or found by chance (or design), this species carries their homes with them. These shells provide a protective sanctuary, ensuring there is always a place to rest for the night.

trait_camouflage.name: Camouflage
trait_camouflage.description: Masters of disguise, this species seamlessly merges with their surroundings, rendering themselves nearly invisible to predators and prey alike. Their innate understanding of optics gives them an edge in guerilla warfare.

trait_chromalogs.name: Chromalogs
trait_chromalogs.description: Harnessing the artistry of color, this species has transcended mere camouflage, evolving to communicate through the vibrant and intricate patterns displayed on their bodies.

trait_brittle.name: Brittle
trait_brittle.description: Plagued by inherent fragility, this species must exercise extreme caution in daily activities to avoid cracking up during even the most mundane tasks.

trait_familial.name: Familial
trait_familial.description: Bound by deep, enduring relationships with their closest relatives, this species forms highly efficient and cohesive collectives.

trait_permeable_skin.name: Permeable Skin
trait_permeable_skin.description: Specially developed skin that requires ideal conditions coats this species. As long as this species does not stray far from their home climate that shouldn't be a problem.

trait_genetic_memory.name: Genetic Memory
trait_genetic_memory.description: Passing down knowledge and learnings from one generation to the next has been the start of many civilizations. This species has taken it a step further by encoding survival insights directly into their genetic code, ensuring that each generation is born with the accumulated wisdom of their ancestors.

trait_nascent_stage.name: Nascent Stage
trait_nascent_stage.description: This species gives birth at an early stage of development, resulting in a prolonged period where the young are incapable of contributing to society. During this time, they remain blissfully unaware of the responsibilities and burdens that come with sapience.

trait_flight.name: Flight
trait_flight.description: This species soars above the constraints of the earth, freely navigating the skies. Their cities feature unique, dense layouts, optimized for aerial inhabitants. In conflict, they prove to be elusive and difficult targets.

trait_spatial_mastery.name: Spatial Mastery
trait_spatial_mastery.description: Not only capable of flight, this species possesses unique cerebral adaptations, enabling them to instinctively process and navigate three-dimensional spaces. These abilities make them unparalleled in planning battles, surveying planets, and managing cities.

trait_spare_organs.name: Spare Organs
trait_spare_organs.description: This species evolved redundant organs to survive even the most grievous injuries - a successful adaptation, as evidenced by their continued existence.

trait_malleable_genes.name: Malleable Genes
trait_malleable_genes.description: This species does not stick as rigidly to identifiable features and organs as most other species do. Instead they grow the best appendage for the job. However this instability has some drawbacks.

trait_malleable_minerals.name: Malleable Claws
trait_malleable_minerals.description: With diamond-hard digits, this adaptation allows for easier extraction of minerals.

trait_malleable_energy.name: Malleable Insulators
trait_malleable_energy.description: A thick insulating layer safeguards against accidents, especially in high-energy environments.

trait_malleable_food.name: Malleable Plows
trait_malleable_food.description: An extra appendage with a hardened shovel-like digit speeds up tilling and planting. Adapting to various terrain types, these malleable plows are always the right tool for the job.

trait_malleable_research.name: Malleable Cortex
trait_malleable_research.description: While an engorged central cortex is slightly uncomfortable, it dramatically accelerates problem-solving and innovation.

trait_malleable_unity.name: Malleable Sense Organs
trait_malleable_unity.description: Enhanced sensory organs facilitate a deeper understanding and appreciation of diverse perspectives. Before you can thrive, you must first observe.

trait_malleable_forge.name: Malleable Calluses
trait_malleable_forge.description: When handling scalding or corrosive materials, extra-thick calluses can be invaluable.

trait_malleable_trade.name: Malleable Pheromones
trait_malleable_trade.description: Highly adaptive pheromones can be incredibly persuasive during negotiations.

trait_malleable_ameneties.name: Malleable Harmonics
trait_malleable_ameneties.description: A series of highly-calibrated holes allows this species to produce soothing, and harmonious sounds simply by moving about.

trait_adaptive_mutations.name: Adaptive Mutations
trait_adaptive_mutations.description: By introducing hyper-adaptive nucleotides into the genetic structure of this species, they are capable of evolutionary changes in real time.

trait_adaptive_minerals.name: Adaptive Claws
trait_adaptive_minerals.description: With diamond-hard digits, this adaptation allows for easier extraction of minerals.

trait_adaptive_energy.name: Adaptive Insulators
trait_adaptive_energy.description: A thick insulating layer safeguards against accidents, especially in high-energy environments.

trait_adaptive_food.name: Adaptive Plows
trait_adaptive_food.description: An extra appendage with a hardened shovel-like digit speeds up tilling and planting. Adapting to various terrain types, these malleable plows are always the right tool for the job.

trait_adaptive_research.name: Adaptive Cortex
trait_adaptive_research.description: While an engorged central cortex is slightly uncomfortable, it dramatically accelerates problem-solving and innovation.

trait_adaptive_unity.name: Adaptive Sense Organs
trait_adaptive_unity.description: Enhanced sensory organs facilitate a deeper understanding and appreciation of diverse perspectives. Before you can thrive, you must first observe.

trait_adaptive_forge.name: Adaptive Calluses
trait_adaptive_forge.description: When handling scalding or corrosive materials, extra-thick calluses can be invaluable.

trait_adaptive_trade.name: Adaptive Pheromones
trait_adaptive_trade.description: Highly adaptive pheromones can be incredibly persuasive during negotiations.

trait_adaptive_amenities.name: Adaptive Harmonics
trait_adaptive_amenities.description: A series of highly-calibrated holes allows this species to produce soothing, and harmonious sounds simply by moving about.

trait_wilderness.name: Wilderness
trait_wilderness.description: This species exists as part of a mutualistic entity, made indistiguishable from its environment in its thoughts and productive output.

leader_trait_altered_metabolism.name: Altered Metabolism
leader_trait_altered_metabolism.description: Fieldwork exposure to foreign agents has left a lasting impact on this leader.

leader_trait_hardened_survivalist.name: Hardened Survivalist
leader_trait_hardened_survivalist.description: This leader has unparalleled knowledge of inhospitable environments.

leader_trait_judicial_subjugation.name: Judicial Subjugation
leader_trait_judicial_subjugation.description: There will be productive lawful order, or there will be consequences.

leader_trait_judicial_execution.name: Judicial Execution Routines
leader_trait_judicial_execution.description: There can be no repeat offenders when the sentence is death.

trait_slimeborn.name: Slimespawn
trait_slimeborn.description: This species spawns rapidly from a thick and mucilaginous slime with the aid of a gestational catalyst.

trait_inner_darkness.name: Inner Darkness
trait_inner_darkness.description: Their bodies enhanced following saturation in Dark Matter, they now vent trace amounts of non-baryonic particles at regular intervals but will burn through their expected lifespan more quickly.

trait_geleboric_mutations.name: Geleboric Mutations
trait_geleboric_mutations.description: Unfortunate reactions to experimentation drastically altered this species' physiology.

trait_psionic_ephapse.name: Psionic Ephapse
trait_psionic_ephapse.description: After long-term exposure to mind-altering bacteria, this species' digestive system produces psionic probiotics that promote telepathic communication between affected individuals.

trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positives_3.name: Cyber Commandos
trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positives_3.description: Total limb replacements and bonded nanomesh body armor ensure these cyborgs can wage war with brutal efficiency. As a consequence, several non-military bodily functions have been sacrificed.

leader_trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positi.name: Cyber Commando
leader_trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positi.description: This leader has delegated several core body functions to hardware which prioritizes combat awareness.

trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positives_2.name: Cyber Shock Troops
trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positives_2.description: These cyborgs benefit from a holistic approach to embodied loadouts. Rather than fully-integrated body armor, swappable augments allow for a modicum of non-military function.

leader_trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positi.name: Cyber Shock Troop
leader_trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positi.description: This leader is able to integrate seamlessly and directly with military and civilian systems, at significant cost to their organic senses.

trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positives_1.name: Cyborg Soldiers
trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positives_1.description: Elegant augmentations to these cyborgs' senses, glands, and motor nerves ensure they remain fierce and capable warriors while only marginally impacting their reproductive capabilities.

leader_trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positi.name: Cyborg Soldier
leader_trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positi.description: Significant augmentation of this leader's senses and immune systems ensures longevity, reliability, and only minor loss of reproductive function.

trait_unplugged_cybernetic_negatives_3.name: Unplugged
trait_unplugged_cybernetic_negatives_3.description: Several of these cyborgs' augments were designed to utilize a battlefield network which no longer exists, causing intense stress and discomfort.

trait_unplugged_cybernetic_negatives_2.name: Disconnected
trait_unplugged_cybernetic_negatives_2.description: The ill-fitting nature of these cyborgs' imposed, military augments greatly reduces their quality of life and increases their bodies' demands during periods of rehabilitation.

trait_unplugged_cybernetic_negatives_1.name: Haunted
trait_unplugged_cybernetic_negatives_1.description: Auditory hallucinations and other sensory echoes from their former machine consciousness still haunt these cyborgs, causing them to suffer severe bouts of depression and anxiety.

trait_unplugged_decyberized.name: De-Cyberized
trait_unplugged_decyberized.description: These ex-cyborgs have disabled or cast off the augments which had once been forced upon them, reclaiming many of their species' organic, inherited attributes.

trait_unplugged_neurocalmed.name: Neuro-Calmed
trait_unplugged_neurocalmed.description: These cyborgs have their Neuroxene levels downregulated, reducing impulsivity and aggression, driving individuals to de-prioritize personal gain in favor of societal norms.

trait_unplugged_neurosavant.name: Neuro-Savant
trait_unplugged_neurosavant.description: These cyborgs have their Cognivex levels upregulated, enhancing synaptic plasticity, information retention, and problem-solving abilities.

trait_unplugged_regenoptimized.name: Regen-Optimized
trait_unplugged_regenoptimized.description: These cyborgs have their Regenol-X levels upregulated, harmonizing biological and synthetic systems, allowing cybernetic implants to self-repair at the molecular level.

trait_infernal.name: Thermophile
trait_infernal.description: This species evolved tissues of metallic alloys to grow and thrive on hot planets where traditional organics would cook. These alloyed cells are slower to degrade and are replaced infrequently, delaying the onset of age-related diseases. They also conduct cold temperatures, which can threaten their health in colder climates.

trait_unbreakable_resolve.name: Unbreakable Resolve
trait_unbreakable_resolve.description: Bound by an intricate web of mirror neurons, these individuals possess an innate ability to synchronize their will. Duty is not a burden, but a shared purpose, and hardship is met with unwavering unity.

leader_trait_whispering_mind.name: Whispering Mind
leader_trait_whispering_mind.description: This leader's mind is flooded with whispers, each with unique intent. They commune with not one entity, but thousands.

leader_trait_shroud_warped.name: Shroud-Warped
leader_trait_shroud_warped.description: Absorbed and reconstructed by the Shroud, the ethereal wisdom bestowed upon this leader grants them the power to observe the unobservable, and amplify the psionic potential of those around them.

leader_trait_shroudshaper.name: Shroudshaper
leader_trait_shroudshaper.description: This leader is an everlasting being that wields incredible psionic power, helping shape the Shroud to our own will.

leader_trait_iron_will.name: Iron Will
leader_trait_iron_will.description: A masterful commander of the Mindwardens, renowned for expertise in heavy fortifications and psychic resistance.

leader_trait_disciple_of_the_cradle.name: Disciple of the Cradle
leader_trait_disciple_of_the_cradle.description: The more we see the more we know, the Cradle of Souls grows more secure as we observe our neighbors.

leader_trait_disciple_of_the_eater.name: Bloodbringer
leader_trait_disciple_of_the_eater.description: This leader has taken a blood vow with the Eater of Worlds.

leader_trait_disciple_of_the_instrument.name: Heart of Avarice
leader_trait_disciple_of_the_instrument.description: Deeply attuned to the Instrument of Desire, this leader can divine the presence of resources even in the most inhospitable corners of the galaxy.

leader_trait_disciple_of_the_composer.name: Strand Afflicted
leader_trait_disciple_of_the_composer.description: The more flesh they shape, the more their own unravels. The Composer of Strands remakes all who dare to learn its forbidden art.

leader_trait_disciple_of_the_composer_2.name: Leader Trait Disciple Of The Composer 2
leader_trait_disciple_of_the_composer_2.description: Leader Trait Disciple Of The Composer 2 Desc

leader_trait_disciple_of_the_whisperers.name: Shrouded Whispers
leader_trait_disciple_of_the_whisperers.description: This leader hears the Whisperers in the Void echoing through the Shroud, granting rare scientific insight into the hidden mechanisms of the physical universe.

leader_trait_disciple_of_the_end.name: Apostle of the End
leader_trait_disciple_of_the_end.description: A devoted apostle of the End of the Cycle, their unshakable faith in the coming of the Reckoning echoes through every battle they wage.

leader_trait_blinded.name: Blinded
leader_trait_blinded.description: There are such sights yet to be seen.

trait_tankbound.name: Tankbound
trait_tankbound.description: This species lives out its existence suspended in a vat of specialized bio-fluids. As such, they are heavily reliant on assistive equipment and incapable of engaging directly in physical work.

trait_uncanny_intuition.name: Uncanny Intuition
trait_uncanny_intuition.description: This species exhibits an inexplicable ability to navigate through complex problems on its first attempt.

trait_cranial_hypertrophy.name: Cranial Hypertrophy
trait_cranial_hypertrophy.description: The frame of this species' neural encasement has inflated to the point where its physical capabilities have become somewhat limited.

trait_cranial_megatrophy.name: Cranial Megatrophy
trait_cranial_megatrophy.description: The frame of this species' neural encasement has inflated to its ultimate biological limit.

trait_haunting_visions.name: Haunting Visions
trait_haunting_visions.description: Entities from other dimensions send maddening visions into the minds of this species, affecting their ability to perform complex tasks.

trait_blindness.name: Blind
trait_blindness.description: Where we are going, we won't need [Species.GetEyeNamePlural] to see.

trait_marked.name: Marked
trait_marked.description: In a gruesome display of devotion, this species has branded its flesh with the mark of 'The End'.

subclass_commander_admiral.name: Admiral
subclass_commander_admiral.description: The stoic presence of a decisive Admiral steels the nerves of the crew as they engage the enemy.

subclass_commander_general.name: General
subclass_commander_general.description: The presence of a General allows for improved coordination of planetary invasions.

subclass_commander_governor.name: Commissioner
subclass_commander_governor.description: Commissioners specialize in imposing order through force, governing planets and sectors with military rigor and a strong vision.

subclass_commander_councilor.name: Strategist
subclass_commander_councilor.description: Strategists are focused on the bigger picture. Instead of leading the battle up front, they prefer to maintain cohesion in the military and draw galaxy-spanning war plans.

subclass_official_delegate.name: Delegate
subclass_official_delegate.description: As the public face of our empire, Delegates represent our interests in Federations and in the Galactic Community.

subclass_official_governor.name: Industrialist
subclass_official_governor.description: Knowledge and skills in maintaining production quotas or material procurement come naturally to this leader.

subclass_official_diplomacy_councilor.name: Ambassador
subclass_official_diplomacy_councilor.description: Ambassadors maintain our relationships with other empires, both overtly and in more subtle ways. The art of diplomacy and the subtle craft of espionage both fall under their domain.

subclass_official_economy_councilor.name: Advisor
subclass_official_economy_councilor.description: The budget of our empire is in the hand of our Advisors, a class of leaders who specialize in economic theory.

subclass_scientist_explorer.name: Explorer
subclass_scientist_explorer.description: To explore unknown worlds, catalog new species, and encounter new civilizations: this leader is the embodiment of such ideals.

subclass_scientist_scholar.name: Scholar
subclass_scientist_scholar.description: The galaxy is full of mysteries, and Scholars exist to solve them. These adventurous researchers excel in the study of dig sites, spacial anomalies and other mysteries.

subclass_scientist_governor.name: Analyst
subclass_scientist_governor.description: Being at the forefront of science, conducting experiments, and researching new technologies to better the empire is the main concern of any determined Analyst.

subclass_scientist_councilor.name: Statistician
subclass_scientist_councilor.description: Statisticians are the driving force behind the management of research teams and projects. Focusing on new technologies, these individuals pursue knowledge relentlessly.

leader_trait_sentinel.name: Sentinel Training
leader_trait_sentinel.description: Sentinel fleet commanders possess detailed knowledge of Prethoryn anatomy and tactics.

leader_trait_hive_affinity.name: Hive Affinity
leader_trait_hive_affinity.description: The Prethoryn creatures operating under this fleet consciousness have managed to attain an unusual level of affinity to one another. Their firing discipline has greatly improved, leading to a higher rate of fire.

leader_trait_void_swimmer.name: Void Hunter
leader_trait_void_swimmer.description: The hunting instincts of this fleet consciousness has driven the Prethoryn creatures under its dominion into a frenzy. Their eagerness for battle drives them ever forward.

leader_trait_ethereal.name: Ethereal
leader_trait_ethereal.description: Some extradimensional fleet lords have learned to use the ethereal nature of their vessels to greatly enhance their evasive capabilities in combat.

leader_trait_dimensional_stutter.name: Dimensional Stutter
leader_trait_dimensional_stutter.description: For unknown reasons, the vessels under the command of this extradimensional fleet lord seem to rapidly stutter in and out of existence as they move, which has the effect of increasing their sublight speeds.

leader_trait_cybrex.name: Cybrex Databases
leader_trait_cybrex.description: This Cybrex leader is equipped with ancient tactical databases from their civilization's violent past.

leader_trait_great_khan.name: The Great Khan
leader_trait_great_khan.description: The Great Khan is a charismatic leader, a brilliant tactician, and, if the rumors are true, a powerful psychic.

ethic_fanatic_authoritarian.name: Fanatic Authoritarian
ethic_fanatic_authoritarian.description: A single voice, a single throne, a single state. It is the solemn duty of the masses to obey those enlightened few who have been charged with the great responsibility of leadership.

tr_adaptability_finish.name: Adaptability Traditions Finished
tr_adaptability_finish.description: Increases Colony Designation Bonuses for all colony types.

tr_adaptability_recycling.name: Enhanced Recycling
tr_adaptability_recycling.description: Building and District £rare_crystals£ £exotic_gases£ £volatile_motes£ Strategic Resource Cost and Upkeep reduced by -15%.

tr_adaptability_survival_fittest.name: Survival of the Fittest
tr_adaptability_survival_fittest.description: Orbital Bombardment Damage reduced by 25% and Defense Army Damage increased by +25%.

tr_adaptability_adaptive_ecology.name: Adaptive Ecology
tr_adaptability_adaptive_ecology.description: All our planets gain 1 Free Building Slot.

tr_aptitude_the_empire_needs_you.name: The Empire Needs You!
tr_aptitude_the_empire_needs_you.description: Tr Aptitude The Empire Needs You Desc

tr_aptitude_champions_of_the_empire.name: Champions of the Empire
tr_aptitude_champions_of_the_empire.description: Per £commander£ Commander and £general£ General level Naval Capacity: +2 Per £official£ Official level Empire Size: -2 Per £scientist£ Scientist level Leader Experience Gain: +0.5%

tr_diplomacy_the_federation.name: The Federation
tr_diplomacy_the_federation.description: Unlocks Diplomacy: Form Federation Available Envoys are increased by 1.

tr_diplomacy_entente_coordination.name: Entente Coordination
tr_diplomacy_entente_coordination.description: The amount we contribute towards the Federation Naval Capacity counts for twice as much.

tr_diplomacy_diplomatic_networking.name: Diplomatic Networking
tr_diplomacy_diplomatic_networking.description: Embassies: +3 £unity£ Unity Allows Advanced Diplomatic Actions without an Embassy

tr_diplomacy_eminent_diplomats.name: Eminent Diplomats
tr_diplomacy_eminent_diplomats.description: Diplomatic Acceptance: +5 Envoys Improving Relations have a 1% chance each month of acquiring a Favor.

tr_discovery_adopt.name: Discovery Traditions
tr_discovery_adopt.description: Unlocks Edict: Map the Stars Anomaly Research Speed increased by +20%.

tr_discovery_to_boldly_go.name: To Boldly Go
tr_discovery_to_boldly_go.description: Survey Speed increased by +35% and Science Ship Disengage Chance increased by +50%.

tr_discovery_databank_uplinks.name: Databank Uplinks
tr_discovery_databank_uplinks.description: Unlocks Edict: Research Subsidies Resources Produced from Research Stations increased by 20%. Research from Starbase Constructions increased by 20%.

tr_discovery_science_division.name: Science Division
tr_discovery_science_division.description: Research Alternatives increased by 1 and Scientist Level Cap increased by 2.

tr_discovery_polytechnic_education.name: Polytechnic Education
tr_discovery_polytechnic_education.description: Leader Experience Gain increased by +25% and Leader Level Cap increased by 1.

tr_discovery_faith_in_science.name: Faith in Science
tr_discovery_faith_in_science.description: Tr Discovery Faith In Science Desc

tr_domination_imperious_architecture.name: Imperious Architecture
tr_domination_imperious_architecture.description: £building£ Capital Buildings provide £housing£ Housing and [politician.GetIcon] [politician.GetName] Jobs scaling with Tier.

tr_enmity_adopt.name: Enmity Traditions
tr_enmity_adopt.description: £mod_logistic_growth_mult£ Pop Growth per neighboring Rival: +3% £mod_planet_pop_assembly_mult£ Pop Assembly per neighboring Rival: +3%

tr_enmity_finish.name: Enmity Finished
tr_enmity_finish.description: Available Envoys: +1 Unlocks the Antagonistic Diplomatic Stance. Ascension Perks Unlocked: +1

tr_enmity_rise_to_the_occasion.name: Rise to the Occasion
tr_enmity_rise_to_the_occasion.description: Tr Enmity Rise To The Occasion Desc

tr_expansion_colonization_fever.name: Colonization Fever
tr_expansion_colonization_fever.description: New colonies start with 100 additional £pop£ Pops.

tr_expansion_courier_network.name: Courier Network
tr_expansion_courier_network.description: Empire Size from Systems and Colonies is reduced by 25%.

tr_harmony_the_greater_good.name: The Greater Good
tr_harmony_the_greater_good.description: Tr Harmony The Greater Good Desc

tr_harmony_utopian_dream.name: Utopian Dream
tr_harmony_utopian_dream.description: £stability£ Stability increased by 5% on all our planets.

tr_harmony_mind_and_body.name: Mind and Body
tr_harmony_mind_and_body.description: Tr Harmony Mind And Body Desc

tr_mercantile_trickle_up_economics.name: Trickle Up Economics
tr_mercantile_trickle_up_economics.description: £trade£ Trade per 100 [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural]: +1 £mod_planet_amenities_add£ Amenities per 100 [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural]: +100 £consumer_goods£ Consumer Goods Upkeep per 100 [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural]: +0.1

tr_mercantile_commercial_enterprise.name: Commercial Enterprise
tr_mercantile_commercial_enterprise.description: £mod_planet_amenities_add£ Amenities per 100 [trader.GetIcon] [trader.GetNamePlural]: +200 £district£ City Districts with a £zone£ Commercial Nexus, and £building£ Trade Buildings, receive additional [trader.GetIcon] [trader.GetName] Jobs.

tr_mercantile_adaptive_economic_policies.name: Adaptive Economic Policies
tr_mercantile_adaptive_economic_policies.description: Unlocks Consumer Benefits and Marketplace of Ideas Trade Policies, which allow us to convert a portion of our £trade£ Trade into £consumer_goods£ Consumer Goods or £unity£ Unity.

tr_mercantile_marketplace_of_better_idea.name: Marketplace of Better Ideas
tr_mercantile_marketplace_of_better_idea.description: Tr Mercantile Marketplace Of Better Ideas Desc

tr_politics_adopt.name: Politics Traditions
tr_politics_adopt.description: +1 Envoy £official£ Officials assigned to the [GetGalCommunityOrGalImperium] now produce 0.1 £influence£ Influence per Skill Level.

tr_politics_finish.name: Politics Traditions Finished
tr_politics_finish.description: +10% £diplo_weight£ Diplomatic Weight Unlocks 4 special Resolutions in the [GetGalCommunityOrGalImperium]. Ascension Perks Unlocked: +1

tr_politics_quid_pro_quo.name: Quid Pro Quo
tr_politics_quid_pro_quo.description: Whenever a Resolution that you supported passes, gain 1 Favor on the empire that proposed it.

tr_politics_gravitas.name: Gravitas
tr_politics_gravitas.description: -25% £influence£ Influence cost to veto or propose Resolutions £official£ Officials assigned to the [GetGalCommunityOrGalImperium] provide an additional 2.5% £diplo_weight£ Diplomatic Weight per Skill Level.

tr_politics_national_agenda.name: National Agenda
tr_politics_national_agenda.description: Whenever a resolution you propose passes, gain 18 months worth of £unity£ Unity.

tr_politics_persistent_petitioners.name: Persistent Petitioners
tr_politics_persistent_petitioners.description: After a resolution is passed by another empire, gain +25% £diplo_weight£ Diplomatic Weight until one of your own resolutions passes.
