tr_politics_extraordinary_powers.name: Extraordinary Powers
tr_politics_extraordinary_powers.description: -25% £time£ Cooldown on Council Actions (Emergency Measures and Veto).

tr_prosperity_sct.name: Standard Construction Templates
tr_prosperity_sct.description: Buildings and Districts have their Build Cost reduced by 10% and Build Speed increased by +25%.

tr_prosperity_administrative_operations.name: Administrative Operations
tr_prosperity_administrative_operations.description: Building Upkeep and District Upkeep reduced by 10%.

tr_prosperity_public_works.name: Public Works Division
tr_prosperity_public_works.description: City Districts provide 100 additional £housing£ Housing. Ring World City Segments and Ecumenopolis Residential Arcologies also provide additional £housing£ Housing.

tr_prosperity_pursuit_of_profit.name: The Pursuit of Profit
tr_prosperity_pursuit_of_profit.description: Tr Prosperity Pursuit Of Profit Desc

tr_statecraft_inspiring_agendas.name: Inspiring Agendas
tr_statecraft_inspiring_agendas.description: Unlocks Agenda: Rightful Claims Unlocks Agenda: Oppose the Fallen

tr_statecraft_shared_benefits.name: Shared Benefits
tr_statecraft_shared_benefits.description: Whenever an Agenda is Launched: All Councilors gain $150|G0$ Experience per Skill Level

tr_subterfuge_adopt.name: Subterfuge Traditions
tr_subterfuge_adopt.description: Subterfuge-related technologies appear at 5 times the normal rate.

tr_subterfuge_finish.name: Subterfuge Traditions Finished
tr_subterfuge_finish.description: Successful Operations refund 50% of their Infiltration Level Cost. Ascension Perks Unlocked: +1

tr_supremacy_finish.name: Supremacy Traditions Finished
tr_supremacy_finish.description: Unlocks the War Doctrines Policies. Ascension Perks Unlocked: +1

tr_supremacy_fleet_logistical_corps.name: Fleet Logistics Corps
tr_supremacy_fleet_logistical_corps.description: Ship Upkeep reduced by 10% and Naval Capacity increased by 20%.

tr_supremacy_war_games.name: War Games
tr_supremacy_war_games.description: Fleet Command Limit increased by +20 and Admiral Level Cap is increased by 2.

tr_supremacy_overwhelming_force.name: Overwhelming Force
tr_supremacy_overwhelming_force.description: Ship Fire Rate increased by +10% and Orbital Bombardment Damage increased by +20%.

tr_synchronicity_adopt.name: Synchronicity Traditions
tr_synchronicity_adopt.description: Unlocks Agenda: Growth Revision Unlocks Agenda: Cognitive Revision Unlocks Agenda: Regulatory Revision Unlocks Agenda: Legion Revision Pop Upkeep: -10%

tr_synchronicity_integrated_preservation.name: Integrated Preservation
tr_synchronicity_integrated_preservation.description: [evaluator.GetNamePlural] reduce Deviancy by 3 Automatic Resettlement Chance: +30%

tr_unyielding_bulwark_of_harmony.name: Bulwark of Harmony
tr_unyielding_bulwark_of_harmony.description: While in a defensive war with another empire, Ship Build Speed is increased by +33%. In addition, the Ship Fire Rate is increased by +15% for ships within your borders.

tr_unyielding_defensive_zeal.name: Defensive Zeal
tr_unyielding_defensive_zeal.description: Starbases and Defense Platforms have their Hull Points and Damage increased by 33%.

tr_versatility_material_analysis.name: Material Analysis
tr_versatility_material_analysis.description: Upkeep of all £job£ Pop Jobs is reduced by 5%.

tr_cloning_biochemical_composure_clones.name: Regenerative Cloning
tr_cloning_biochemical_composure_clones.description: Tr Cloning Biochemical Composure Clones Desc

tr_cybernetics_adopt.name: Cybernetic Traditions
tr_cybernetics_adopt.description: Starts a Situation to grant the founding species the Cybernetic trait

tr_cybernetics_transubstantiation_synthe.name: Transubstantiation Synthesis
tr_cybernetics_transubstantiation_synthe.description: The new world has no room for those not infused with the machine.

tr_cybernetics_metabolic_reprocessing.name: Metabolic Reprocessing
tr_cybernetics_metabolic_reprocessing.description: Reprocessing metabolic waste into digestible chemical components reduces the required chemical upkeep for our population.

tr_cybernetics_integrated_anatomy.name: Integrated Anatomy
tr_cybernetics_integrated_anatomy.description: Only by alloying [Owner.Species.GetFleshTypeCyberCreed], steel, and nano-carbon composite can we truly reach perfection.

tr_cybernetics_augmentation_overload.name: Augmentation Overload
tr_cybernetics_augmentation_overload.description: The only way to keep up with people's demand for implants is more Augmentors.

tr_cybernetics_modular_cybernetics.name: Modular Cybernetics
tr_cybernetics_modular_cybernetics.description: Improving the compatibility of our cybernetic enhancements will reduce downtime while retrofitting.

tr_cybernetics_assimilator_adopt.name: Cybernetic Traditions
tr_cybernetics_assimilator_adopt.description: Assimilating £pop£ Organic Pops now generates £engineering£ Engineering Research. Resources generated from Assimilating £pop£ Organic Pops are increased.

tr_cybernetics_assimilator_inevitable_as.name: Inevitable Assimilation
tr_cybernetics_assimilator_inevitable_as.description: Allows the Assimilation of £pop£ Hive-Minded Pops.

tr_cybernetics_assimilator_metabolic_rep.name: Metabolic Reprocessing
tr_cybernetics_assimilator_metabolic_rep.description: Cyborg Upkeep: -10% Empire Size from Cyborg Pops: -10%

tr_cybernetics_assimilator_integrated_an.name: Integrated Anatomy
tr_cybernetics_assimilator_integrated_an.description: Unlocks Cybernetic Traits for Species Modification.

tr_cybernetics_assimilator_modular_cyber.name: Modular Cybernetics
tr_cybernetics_assimilator_modular_cyber.description: Tr Cybernetics Assimilator Modular Cybernetics Desc

tr_genetics_resequencing.name: Genetic Resequencing
tr_genetics_resequencing.description: Can remove Positive Traits and add Negative Traits with Species Modification

tr_genetics_creation.name: Engineered Genesis
tr_genetics_creation.description: Can alter Pop appearance with Species Modification Allows the Assimilation of Pops into or out of a Hive-Mind

tr_genetics_enhanced_expression.name: Allelic Expression
tr_genetics_enhanced_expression.description: Unlocks Advanced Traits for Species Modification

tr_genetics_efficient_cloning.name: Stem Cell Stimulation
tr_genetics_efficient_cloning.description: ['building:building_clone_vats'] produce an additional +1.5 Monthly Organic Pop Growth

tr_psionics_finish.name: Psionic Traditions Finished
tr_psionics_finish.description: Unlocks a Special Project to form a Covenant. Edict Fund: +50 Ascension Perks Unlocked: +1

tr_psionics_psionic_assimilation.name: Great Awakening
tr_psionics_psionic_assimilation.description: All Latent Psionic species will unlock their full psionic potential. Allows Psionic Assimilation of other species, unlocking their latent abilities. [GetPsionicAssimilationEffectShroud]

tr_psionics_breach_shroud.name: Breach the Shroud
tr_psionics_breach_shroud.description: Unlocks a Special Project to Breach the Shroud. Job Efficiency for Psionic Pops per 100 [telepath.GetIcon] [telepath.GetNamePlural]: +5%

tr_psionics_shroud_adopt.name: Psionic Traditions
tr_psionics_shroud_adopt.description: Starts a Situation to grant the founding species the Psionic trait.

tr_psionics_shroud_psi_corps.name: Psi Corps
tr_psionics_shroud_psi_corps.description: Tr Psionics Shroud Psi Corps Desc

tr_psionics_shroud_great_awakening.name: Great Awakening
tr_psionics_shroud_great_awakening.description: Tr Psionics Shroud Great Awakening Desc

tr_psionics_shroud_telekinesis.name: Telekinesis
tr_psionics_shroud_telekinesis.description: Psionic Pops Habitability: +$0.1|0%$ Psionic Pops Happiness: +$0.1|0%$

tr_synthetics_adopt.name: Synthetic Traditions
tr_synthetics_adopt.description: Starts a Situation to transform the founding species into a Mechanical species.

tr_synthetics_transubstatiation_synthesi.name: Transubstantiation Synthesis
tr_synthetics_transubstatiation_synthesi.description: Grants access to the Assimilation Citizenship Species Right, allowing future additions to the populace to be turned into Synths.

pc_desert.name: Desert World
pc_desert.description: Dry, rocky world with a nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere. Precipitation and major bodies of surface water are relatively rare. Significant temperature variations between day and night cycles. Vegetation is scarce, but even moderate precipitation can make the desert bloom.

pc_arid.name: Arid World
pc_arid.description: Dry, rocky world with a nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere. The dust-covered terrain consists largely of mesas and canyons. Forests can be found in the more temperate polar regions, but vegetation is otherwise scarce.

pc_savannah.name: Savanna World
pc_savannah.description: Rocky world dominated by dry, arid plains covered by a nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere. The small hydrosphere allows for brief wet seasons, but aside from a few ubiquitous grasses, vegetation is largely concentrated around shallow oases.

pc_tropical.name: Tropical World
pc_tropical.description: Humid, rocky world with a thick nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere. Seasons with significant precipitation are interchanged with drier periods. Most landmasses are covered in dense vegetation.

pc_continental.name: Continental World
pc_continental.description: Rocky world with a nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere. Active and stable hydrosphere. Great landmasses are separated by oceans, with large climate variations depending on latitude and precipitation.

pc_ocean.name: Ocean World
pc_ocean.description: Rocky world with a nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere and a significant hydrosphere. Oceans cover more than 90% of the surface, with scattered islands making up the remaining percentage.

pc_tundra.name: Tundra World
pc_tundra.description: Cold and rocky world with a nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere. Permafrost covers most of the surface except for the more temperate equatorial regions. A stable biosphere exists but vegetation is mostly limited to mosses and lichens.

pc_arctic.name: Arctic World
pc_arctic.description: Frigid, rocky world with a nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere. The poles are big, and significant water deposits can be found permanently frozen as glacial ice. However, the planet experiences seasonal variations and the equatorial band is covered by vegetation.

pc_alpine.name: Alpine World
pc_alpine.description: Mountainous world with a nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere. Snow covers the mountaintops, and frozen-over lakes dot the valleys. While the planet experiences minimal seasonal variations, the still-liquid water beneath the frozen surface of the lakes is enough to sustain some hardy vegetation.

pc_volcanic.name: Volcanic World
pc_volcanic.description: Rocky world with a sulfur rich atmosphere and a partially liquid lithosphere. The ash and basalt covered surface is interspersed with fresh volcanic activity, lava lakes and rivers. Only extremophile life forms can be found, if any.

pc_gas_giant.name: Gas Giant
pc_gas_giant.description: Gaseous planet with an atmosphere primarily composed of hydrogen and helium surrounding a dense core.

pc_asteroid.name: Asteroid
pc_asteroid.description: A larger asteroid or planetoid standing out in the dense cluster of smaller bodies.

pc_ice_asteroid.name: Ice Asteroid
pc_ice_asteroid.description: A larger asteroid or planetoid composed primarily of frozen H2O.

pc_rare_crystal_asteroid.name: Crystalline Asteroid
pc_rare_crystal_asteroid.description: A large asteroid covered in some kind of crystalline outcroppings.

pc_molten.name: Molten World
pc_molten.description: Rocky world that is scorching hot. The atmosphere is thin or non-existent, and lava from the interior flows freely due to constant volcanic eruptions. This type of planet cannot sustain organic life.

pc_barren.name: Barren World
pc_barren.description: Barren and rocky world with a thin or non-existent atmosphere. The surface is covered in meteor impact craters and is completely devoid of life.

pc_barren_cold.name: Barren World
pc_barren_cold.description: Barren and rocky world with a thin or non-existent atmosphere. The surface is covered in meteor impact craters and is completely devoid of life.

pc_toxic.name: Toxic World
pc_toxic.description: A rocky planet with a thick atmosphere that is lethal to all known higher forms of life.

pc_frozen.name: Frozen World
pc_frozen.description: Rocky world covered in a thick layer of permanently frozen ice. Low temperatures and a very thin atmosphere preclude the existence of life on the surface.

pc_nuked.name: Tomb World
pc_nuked.description: A rocky world with a nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere. It is currently experiencing a nuclear winter, with dense layers of sooty aerosols in the atmosphere. High levels of surface radiation. Minimal signs of life.

pc_hive.name: Hive World
pc_hive.description: This entire world is a giant living organism, psionically connected with the Hive Mind that shaped it. Any beings not part of the Hive that set foot here will be attacked by the very terrain itself.

pc_machine.name: Machine World
pc_machine.description: Rocky world covered with artificial structures. The thin atmosphere consists mostly of industrial pollutants and is not capable of supporting biological life.

pc_machine_broken.name: Broken AI World
pc_machine_broken.description: Rocky world covered with artificial structures. The thin atmosphere consists mostly of industrial pollutants. There are strong energy emissions coming from across the entire surface, but no organic life signs.

pc_ai.name: AI World
pc_ai.description: Rocky world covered with artificial structures. The thin atmosphere consists mostly of industrial pollutants. There are strong energy emissions coming from across the entire surface, but no organic life signs.

pc_infested.name: Infested World
pc_infested.description: The surface of this world is covered by some kind of biological contaminant.

pc_gaia.name: Gaia World
pc_gaia.description: An ideal, temperate world with a nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere and a resilient ecosystem. Optimal conditions for all known higher forms of life at different latitudes.

pc_cybrex.name: Ring Segment
pc_cybrex.description: Part of a Ring World, an immense band encircling the system's sun. Built to allow for numerous artificial habitation zones along its inner span, freed from the restrictions and mundanity of planet-bound, spherical existence.

pc_nanotech.name: Nanite World
pc_nanotech.description: The flood has profoundly transformed this planet. Its landscape is now dominated by a dynamic sea of nanites in constant flux.

pc_b_star.name: Class B Star
pc_b_star.description: The large class B main-sequence stars are very bright and blue. Although somewhat rare, the luminosity of these stars make them among the most visible to the naked eye.

pc_a_star.name: Class A Star
pc_a_star.description: These relatively young white or bluish-white main-sequence stars are typically among the most visible to the naked eye. They are large and rotate very quickly, but will eventually evolve into slower and cooler red giants.

pc_f_star.name: Class F Star
pc_f_star.description: F-type stars are fairly large and often referred to as yellow-white dwarfs. Although they often emit significant amounts of UV radiation, their wide habitable zones have a good chance of supporting life-bearing worlds.

pc_g_star.name: Class G Star
pc_g_star.description: Often referred to as yellow dwarfs, G-type stars actually range in color from white to slightly yellow. Main-sequence stars fuse hydrogen for roughly 10 billion years before they expand and become red giants. Although their lifespans are shorter than K-type stars, worlds inside the habitable zone of a G star often enjoy optimal conditions for the development of life.

pc_k_star.name: Class K Star
pc_k_star.description: These main-sequence stars, sometimes referred to as orange dwarfs, are a fairly common sight. They are stable on the main-sequence for up to 30 billion years, meaning that worlds orbiting a K-type star have a longer than average window to evolve life.

pc_m_star.name: Class M Star
pc_m_star.description: The most common stars in the universe, often referred to as red dwarfs. Their low luminosity means they are difficult to observe with the naked eye from afar. Although they typically have an extremely long lifespan, red dwarfs emit almost no UV light resulting in unfavorable conditions for most forms of life.

pc_m_giant_star.name: Class M Red Giant
pc_m_giant_star.description: With a large radius and comparatively low surface temperature, red giants are stars of moderate mass in a late stage of stellar evolution. Their expanded stellar atmospheres and high luminosity make for distant habitable zone orbits.

pc_t_star.name: Class T Brown Dwarf
pc_t_star.description: Brown dwarfs are substellar objects that lack the mass to sustain hydrogen fusion. Roughly the size of large gas giants, they have a much greater density. Their low luminosity and comparatively small heat generation means that planets orbiting them are unlikely to support life.

pc_black_hole.name: Black Hole
pc_black_hole.description: Typically formed as a result of the collapse of a very massive star at the end of its life cycle, black holes have extremely strong gravity fields that prevent anything - including light - from escaping once the event horizon has been crossed. The gravitational waves emitted by black holes interfere with FTL drives, making it harder for ships to escape from combat.

pc_neutron_star.name: Neutron Star
pc_neutron_star.description: These incredibly dense stellar remnants are sometimes created when a massive star suffers a rapid collapse and explodes in a supernova. Although their diameter is typically as little as ten kilometers, their mass is many times greater than an average G-type star. The gravitational waves and radiation emitted by neutron stars must be carefully navigated around, slowing the sublight speed of ships.

pc_pulsar.name: Pulsar
pc_pulsar.description: Pulsars are highly magnetized neutron stars that emit beams of electromagnetic radiation. As the star rotates, the radiation beam is only visible when it is pointing directly at the observer. This results in a very precise interval of pulses, which sometimes is so exact that it can be used to measure the passage of time with extreme accuracy. The radiation emitted by pulsars interferes with deflector technology, rendering ship and station shields inoperable.

pc_ringworld_habitable.name: Ring Segment
pc_ringworld_habitable.description: Part of a Ring World, an immense band encircling the system's sun. Built to allow for numerous artificial habitation zones along its inner span, freed from the restrictions and mundanity of planet-bound, spherical existence.

pc_ringworld_habitable_damaged.name: Damaged Ring Segment
pc_ringworld_habitable_damaged.description: Part of a Ring World, an immense band encircling the system's sun. This section of the megastructure appears irreparably damaged.

pc_ringworld_tech.name: Ring Segment
pc_ringworld_tech.description: Part of a Ring World, an immense band encircling the system's sun. Built to allow for numerous artificial habitation zones along its inner span, freed from the restrictions and mundanity of planet-bound, spherical existence.

pc_ringworld_tech_damaged.name: Damaged Ring Segment
pc_ringworld_tech_damaged.description: Part of a Ring World, an immense band encircling the system's sun. This section of the megastructure appears irreparably damaged.

pc_ringworld_seam.name: Ring Segment
pc_ringworld_seam.description: Part of a Ring World, an immense band encircling the system's sun. Built to allow for numerous artificial habitation zones along its inner span, freed from the restrictions and mundanity of planet-bound, spherical existence.

pc_ringworld_seam_damaged.name: Damaged Ring Segment
pc_ringworld_seam_damaged.description: Part of a Ring World, an immense band encircling the system's sun. This section of the megastructure appears irreparably damaged.

pc_shattered_ring_habitable.name: Shattered Ring Segment
pc_shattered_ring_habitable.description: Part of a Ring World, an immense band encircling the system's sun. This section of the megastructure has sustained damage - especially to some of its more advanced districts - but it does not appear irreparable.

pc_habitat.name: Orbital Habitat
pc_habitat.description: An artificial deep-space arcology offering planet-like - if decidedly urban - living conditions. Hydroponics and advanced filtering technologies make it near-self-sustaining, and station-borne facilities can mine the station's host planet for raw materials.

pc_cosmogenesis_world.name: Synaptic Lathe
pc_cosmogenesis_world.description: A colossal reservoir computing system designed to connect billions of sentient beings, organic or synthetic, via an intricate array of cables, transistors, and life support pods. The intensive strain on individual processing organs will inevitably lead to brain damage for any networked 'component.'

pc_shrouded.name: Shrouded World
pc_shrouded.description: Our sensors are unable to penetrate the thick fog surrounding the planet. Ships that enter it do not return.

pc_broken.name: Broken World
pc_broken.description: World devastated by some catastrophic event. Whatever properties it may once have had are no longer discernible.

pc_shattered.name: Shattered World
pc_shattered.description: The charred, broken remnants of what was once a planet. A massive energy surge has detonated this world's core, leaving only drifting slabs of rock.

pc_toxoid_star.name: Viridescent Lightbringer
pc_toxoid_star.description: Millennia of exposure to the Toxic Entity have caused alterations in the makeup of this star. Though once it was a fairly standard G-type star, now it emits an eerie green haze unlike any seen elsewhere in the galaxy.

pc_rift_star.name: Astral Scar
pc_rift_star.description: In place of a star, the celestial bodies in this system orbit an ancient Astral Rift.

pc_astral_scar.name: Astral Scar
pc_astral_scar.description: This is an anomalous fold in space and time. Strange material leaks from its edges, but we cannot penetrate any further.

pc_egg_cracked.name: Cracked World
pc_egg_cracked.description: The cracked shards of an enormous planet-sized egg.

pc_crystal_asteroid.name: Crystalline Asteroid
pc_crystal_asteroid.description: A large asteroid covered in some kind of crystalline outcroppings.

pc_ringworld_shielded.name: Shielded Segment
pc_ringworld_shielded.description: This Ring World segment is encased in some kind of impenetrable energy barrier. It blocks all scans of the surface.

pc_habitat_shielded.name: Shielded Habitat
pc_habitat_shielded.description: This Habitat station is encased in some kind of impenetrable energy barrier. It blocks all scans of its interior.

pc_city.name: Ecumenopolis
pc_city.description: World completely engulfed by urban-industrial sprawl. Its natural lithosphere is no longer discernible from orbit.

pc_relic.name: Relic World
pc_relic.description: A city once stretched across this entire world. Only ancient and abandoned ruins remain now, their original inhabitants long since departed.

pc_shattered_2.name: Shattered World
pc_shattered_2.description: The charred, broken remnants of what was once a planet. A massive energy surge has detonated this world's core, leaving only drifting slabs of rock.

pc_cutholoid.name: Asteroid
pc_cutholoid.description: A larger asteroid or planetoid standing out in the dense cluster of smaller bodies.

pc_junk.name: Junk Moon
pc_junk.description: A large body of magnetized space junk composed of scrap metal, satellite remnants, and recaptured megastructure parts.

d_engineering_8.name: £engineering£ +8
d_engineering_8.description: A vast plain covered in wreckage. Amazingly, some still seems to be semi-functional.

d_consumer_goods_obsessional_directive.name: Spire of Commodities
d_consumer_goods_obsessional_directive.description: This towering spire of commodities is stockpiled on the planet for future use.

d_arid_highlands.name: Arid Highlands
d_arid_highlands.description: An elevated, dry ecoregion bearing sparse vegetation of desert grasses and scrubs.

d_hot_springs.name: Hot Springs
d_hot_springs.description: Groundwater heated by geothermal processes steams from the surface of these springs.

d_rushing_waterfalls.name: Rushing Waterfalls
d_rushing_waterfalls.description: Picturesque vistas formed when rivers flow over the cliff-sides of steep mountainsides.

d_searing_desert.name: Searing Desert
d_searing_desert.description: With little precipitation, extreme temperatures and limited vegetation, these sandy deserts are hostile to most forms of life.

d_frozen_gas_lake.name: Frozen Gas Lake
d_frozen_gas_lake.description: Formed under immense pressure in a bygone age, deep-freeze temperatures have kept the gases dissolved in these rimy lakes in a solid state.

d_geothermal_vent.name: Geothermal Vents
d_geothermal_vent.description: These fumaroles vent steam and noxious gases from deep within the planet's crust.

d_underwater_vent.name: Underwater Vents
d_underwater_vent.description: Metalliferous sediments react with superheated water in the planet's crust, venting chemicals along the seabed where tectonic plates diverge.

d_tempestous_mountain.name: Tempestuous Mountain
d_tempestous_mountain.description: Wind-torn vegetation clings to the high crags and stormy cliffs of these rainy mountains.

d_veiny_cliffs.name: Ore-Veined Cliffs
d_veiny_cliffs.description: Bands of valuable mineral ores run like veins through these exposed cliff faces.

d_mineral_fields.name: Mineral Fields
d_mineral_fields.description: Geological upheaval exposed these useful minerals to the planet's surface long ago.

d_prosperous_mesa.name: Prosperous Mesa
d_prosperous_mesa.description: This flat-topped hill has steep sides lined with useful resources.

d_ore_rich_caverns.name: Ore-Rich Caverns
d_ore_rich_caverns.description: These deep caverns are rife with metallic and mineral ore deposits.

d_rich_mountain.name: Rich Mountain
d_rich_mountain.description: These mountainsides glint with rich ore resources and precious stones.

d_submerged_ore_veins.name: Submerged Ore Veins
d_submerged_ore_veins.description: Useful ore deposits line parts of the ocean floor, providing opportunities for deep-sea mining.

d_lichen_fields.name: Lichen Fields
d_lichen_fields.description: Dewy moss, lichens and fungi form a plush carpet that stretches across these rocky lands.

d_bountiful_plains.name: Bountiful Plains
d_bountiful_plains.description: Fertile soils and tall grasses cover these sweeping plains, providing rich potential for farmlands.

d_rugged_woods.name: Rugged Woods
d_rugged_woods.description: Cold, rocky woods with herbaceous understories.

d_green_hills.name: Green Hills
d_green_hills.description: Rolling hills covered in greenery and fertile soils.

d_forgiving_tundra.name: Fair Tundra
d_forgiving_tundra.description: Sedges, shrubs and lichens cover this high-latitude biome, where the subsoil permafrost is nevertheless covered in more fertile sediment.

d_boggy_fens.name: Boggy Fens
d_boggy_fens.description: These low-lying wetlands provide a wealth of plant nutrients.

d_nutritious_mudland.name: Nutritious Mudlands
d_nutritious_mudland.description: A watery slurry of clay, silt, and loam stretches across the horizon, where low vegetation flourishes.

d_fungal_caves.name: Fungal Caves
d_fungal_caves.description: These extensive cave networks are covered in many species of edible fungi, which require neither sunlight nor fertile soil to flourish.

d_lush_jungle.name: Lush Jungle
d_lush_jungle.description: With a dense canopy and nigh-impenetrable vegetation density, these jungles are poor in soil quality, but rich in plant life and fruit-bearing trees.

d_fertile_lands.name: Fertile Lands
d_fertile_lands.description: This vast stretch of open plains provides ideal farmland.

d_great_river.name: Great River
d_great_river.description: A slow-flowing river of enormous volume provides water and vegetation for a rich abundance of life.

d_black_soil.name: Black Soil
d_black_soil.description: With a remarkably high moisture capacity and high amounts of chemicals integral to plant life, these soils promise impressive agricultural yields.

d_teeming_reef.name: Teeming Reef
d_teeming_reef.description: A vibrant ecosystem brimming with corals, fish, mollusks, mammals, invertebrates, and all kinds of edible marine life.

d_marvelous_oasis.name: Marvelous Oasis
d_marvelous_oasis.description: A shimmering jewel of water and greenery in a barren wasteland.

d_tropical_island.name: Tropical Island
d_tropical_island.description: From fruit-laden trees to plentiful fauna, the bounties of this paradisaical island promise a rich harvest.

d_fungal_forest.name: Fungal Forest
d_fungal_forest.description: In lieu of trees, towering mushrooms dominate these fecund forests, the enormous caps of fungal giants blotting out sunlight to create the perfect environment for a rich variety of smaller specimens.

d_dust_caverns.name: Dust Caverns
d_dust_caverns.description: Rare Volatile Motes condense in these sandy caves and hidden hollows.

d_dust_desert.name: Dust Desert
d_dust_desert.description: A vast expanse of sand that covers scattered pockets of rare and valuable Volatile Motes. Extraction is possible with the right equipment.

d_bubbling_swamp.name: Bubbling Swamp
d_bubbling_swamp.description: A hotbed of aquatic plants, insects, and swamp gas, this wetland is characterized by slow-moving water and rich vegetation.

d_fuming_bog.name: Fuming Bog
d_fuming_bog.description: A noxious quagmire covered in low vegetation, mosses and fungi, where gases steam from the water's surface.

d_crystalline_caverns.name: Crystalline Caverns
d_crystalline_caverns.description: Like enormous geodes, these caves are filled on all sides with rare crystals.

d_crystal_forest.name: Crystal Forest
d_crystal_forest.description: Glittering crystals grow like hoarfrost in these exotic forests.

d_crystal_reef.name: Crystal Reef
d_crystal_reef.description: Crystal lattices glimmer amongst the rocks and corals of this sandy reef.

d_betharian_deposit.name: Betharian Fields
d_betharian_deposit.description: Thousands upon thousands of valuable Betharian stones glint like stars in these fields.

d_alien_pets_deposit.name: Isolated Valley
d_alien_pets_deposit.description: This pristine valley lies sheltered amongst the surrounding mountains, its fauna shielded from roving predators.

d_buzzing_plains.name: Buzzing Plains
d_buzzing_plains.description: These windy plains crackle with static electricity.

d_mineral_striations.name: Mineral Striations
d_mineral_striations.description: Shallow faults have brought rich mineral veins to the surface.

d_natural_farmland.name: Natural Farmland
d_natural_farmland.description: These plains are naturally subdivided into alarmingly regular geometric shapes, ready for agricultural exploitation.

d_hab_gas_1.name: Exotic Gas Deposit
d_hab_gas_1.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable exotic gas deposit.

d_hab_gas_2.name: Exotic Gas Deposit
d_hab_gas_2.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable exotic gas deposit.

d_hab_gas_3.name: Exotic Gas Deposit
d_hab_gas_3.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable exotic gas deposit.

d_hab_gas_4.name: Exotic Gas Deposit
d_hab_gas_4.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable exotic gas deposit.

d_hab_gas_5.name: Exotic Gas Deposit
d_hab_gas_5.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable exotic gas deposit.

d_hab_crystal_1.name: Rare Crystal Deposit
d_hab_crystal_1.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable rare crystal deposit.

d_hab_crystal_2.name: Rare Crystal Deposit
d_hab_crystal_2.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable rare crystal deposit.

d_hab_crystal_3.name: Rare Crystal Deposit
d_hab_crystal_3.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable rare crystal deposit.

d_hab_crystal_4.name: Rare Crystal Deposit
d_hab_crystal_4.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable rare crystal deposit.

d_hab_crystal_5.name: Rare Crystal Deposit
d_hab_crystal_5.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable rare crystal deposit.

d_hab_mote_1.name: Volatile Mote Deposit
d_hab_mote_1.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable volatile mote deposit.

d_hab_mote_2.name: Volatile Mote Deposit
d_hab_mote_2.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable volatile mote deposit.

d_hab_mote_3.name: Volatile Mote Deposit
d_hab_mote_3.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable volatile mote deposit.

d_hab_mote_4.name: Volatile Mote Deposit
d_hab_mote_4.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable volatile mote deposit.

d_hab_mote_5.name: Volatile Mote Deposit
d_hab_mote_5.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable volatile mote deposit.

d_hab_zro_1.name: Zro Deposit
d_hab_zro_1.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable zro deposit.

d_hab_zro_2.name: Zro Deposit
d_hab_zro_2.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable zro deposit.

d_hab_zro_3.name: Zro Deposit
d_hab_zro_3.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable zro deposit.

d_hab_zro_4.name: Zro Deposit
d_hab_zro_4.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable zro deposit.

d_hab_zro_5.name: Zro Deposit
d_hab_zro_5.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable zro deposit.

d_hab_dark_matter_1.name: Dark Matter Deposit
d_hab_dark_matter_1.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable dark matter deposit.

d_hab_dark_matter_2.name: Dark Matter Deposit
d_hab_dark_matter_2.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable dark matter deposit.

d_hab_dark_matter_3.name: Dark Matter Deposit
d_hab_dark_matter_3.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable dark matter deposit.

d_hab_dark_matter_10.name: Dark Matter Deposit
d_hab_dark_matter_10.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable dark matter deposit.

d_hab_living_metal_1.name: Living Metal Deposit
d_hab_living_metal_1.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable living metal deposit.

d_hab_alloy_1.name: Alloy Deposit
d_hab_alloy_1.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable source of alloys.

d_hab_alloy_2.name: Alloy Deposit
d_hab_alloy_2.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable source of alloys.

d_hab_alloy_3.name: Alloy Deposit
d_hab_alloy_3.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable source of alloys.

d_hab_alloy_4.name: Alloy Deposit
d_hab_alloy_4.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable source of alloys.

d_hab_alloy_5.name: Alloy Deposit
d_hab_alloy_5.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable source of alloys.

d_hab_alloy_10.name: Alloy Deposit
d_hab_alloy_10.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable source of alloys.

d_hab_alloy_25.name: Alloy Deposit
d_hab_alloy_25.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable source of alloys.

d_hab_consumer_goods_2.name: Consumer Goods Deposit
d_hab_consumer_goods_2.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable source of consumer goods.

d_hab_nanites_3.name: Nanite Deposit
d_hab_nanites_3.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable source of nanites.

d_hab_harvester_nanites_1.name: Nanite Deposit
d_hab_harvester_nanites_1.description: Swarms of nanites proliferate under the careful guidance of the Nanite Harvester.

d_hab_harvester_nanites_2.name: Nanite Deposit
d_hab_harvester_nanites_2.description: Swarms of nanites proliferate under the careful guidance of the Nanite Harvester.

d_hab_harvester_nanites_3.name: Nanite Deposit
d_hab_harvester_nanites_3.description: Swarms of nanites proliferate under the careful guidance of the Nanite Harvester.

d_metal_boneyard.name: Metal Boneyards
d_metal_boneyard.description: The hollowed-out metal skeletons of fallen infrastructure seem almost to groan as the wind whistles through them.

d_migrating_forests.name: Migrating Forests
d_migrating_forests.description: The mobile forests of this world frequently migrate en masse to new regions, disrupting efforts at building roads, power lines and other infrastructure.

d_migrating_forest_reserve.name: Migrating Forest Reserve
d_migrating_forest_reserve.description: This entire region has been set aside for the migrating forests that are native to this world. Here they can roam in peace, without causing damage to urban areas.

d_junk_wastes.name: Junk Wastes
d_junk_wastes.description: The wastes stretch as far as one can see, with occasional pieces of larger junk jutting up out of the ground.

d_junk_canals.name: Junk Canals
d_junk_canals.description: These narrow canals snake around the junk piles, and some of the adjacent soil is surprisingly fertile.

d_junk_hollows.name: Junk Hollows
d_junk_hollows.description: These hollows deep beneath the surface junk would serve well as isolated reactor chambers.

d_irradiated_valley.name: Irradiated Valley
d_irradiated_valley.description: A solar flare has washed this isolated valley with heavy radiation.

d_valley_of_zanaam.name: Valley of Zanaam
d_valley_of_zanaam.description: This valley is home to a mysterious obelisk that is covered in letters from a dead alien language. It hums with power and those in its proximity suffer headaches.

d_abandoned_primitive_homesteads.name: Abandoned Homesteads
d_abandoned_primitive_homesteads.description: These abandoned homesteads were once inhabited by a society of reptiles. They still populate the planet, but have since lost all capacity for sapient though.

d_the_zone.name: Zone A
d_the_zone.description: A thirteen-by-thirteen kilometer stretch of land on this planet is a ruin of unknown origin, littered with many bizarre and unique alien artifacts. Bafflingly, it also produces sensations of deep contentment in its visitors.

d_hyperfertile_valley.name: Hyperfertile Valley
d_hyperfertile_valley.description: The soil in this valley is extremely fertile, and it is covered in intense greenery.

d_ancient_mining_site.name: Ancient Mining Site
d_ancient_mining_site.description: The site of an ancient mining operation. Despite its age, much of the equipment can still be operated.

d_toy_factory_complex.name: Toy Factory Complex
d_toy_factory_complex.description: Complex machinery ceaselessly molds complex polymers into small items of varying shapes and inscrutable purpose.

d_mutant_landfill.name: Mutant Landfill
d_mutant_landfill.description: A putrid mass of dead mutated horrors. Their volatile organic matter has twisted together to form a structure of sorts.

d_ancient_bombardment_craters.name: Ancient Bombardment Craters
d_ancient_bombardment_craters.description: This world was subjected to intense orbital bombardment long ago. Parts of the surface are still pockmarked with impact craters.

d_ancient_battlefield.name: Ancient Battlefield
d_ancient_battlefield.description: The civilization that once inhabited this world was destroyed by an invading force from somewhere beyond their solar system. This ancient battlefield is littered with ancient debris from their desperate last stand.

d_irradiated_ruins.name: Irradiated Ruins
d_irradiated_ruins.description: Remnants from a massive nuclear war waged by the two global superpowers that once inhabited this world.

d_impact_crater.name: Impact Crater
d_impact_crater.description: A crater from a large meteor impact. Minerals from the meteor itself can still be found at the site.

d_odd_factory.name: Odd Factory
d_odd_factory.description: A well-crafted facility that produces high value resources, left on the planet by a different civilization.

d_ancient_particle_accelerator.name: Ancient Particle Accelerator
d_ancient_particle_accelerator.description: This old particle accelerator was built using a novel design, and the surviving terminals within the structure contain a massive amount of research data composed by what must have been a brilliant theoretical physicist.

d_underground_vault.name: Underground Vault
d_underground_vault.description: A massive underground vault, intended as a bomb shelter by this world's original inhabitants. The vault's occupants turned on each other when their food ran out.

d_underground_vault_2.name: Underground Vault
d_underground_vault_2.description: A massive underground vault, intended as a bomb shelter by this world's original inhabitants. The vault contains a huge machine park along with stores of mining equipment.

d_cryonic_clones.name: Cryonic Clones Monument
d_cryonic_clones.description: Hundreds of alien clones were left sealed in cryostasis chambers when this Ring World was still a ruin. Now fully restored, the clones have been preserved in this monument.

d_flooded_mounds.name: Flooded Mounds
d_flooded_mounds.description: Thousands upon thousands of interconnected termite-like mounds can be found far beneath the ocean on this world, the last remnants of an ancient species of sapient arthropoids.

d_processing_pens.name: Processing Pens
d_processing_pens.description: The fungoids native to this planet were genetically engineered to be docile... and delicious. In these vast processing pens, the fungoids are nourished and then harvested.

d_harvester_fields.name: Harvester Fields
d_harvester_fields.description: Vast fields of dense, edible vegetation where ancient solar-powered harvesters assist in gathering crops.

d_wetware_computer.name: Wetware Computer
d_wetware_computer.description: The oceans on this world are almost completely covered in a fine network of algae that appear to be a primitive wetware computer.

d_savage_wildlands.name: Savage Wildlands
d_savage_wildlands.description: The indigenous creatures who inhabit this region appear to operate as a single organism.

d_mothballed_facilities.name: £blocker£ Mothballed Facilities
d_mothballed_facilities.description: Districts and buildings finished to the latest colonial standard, but obviously left in disuse and partial disrepair for years.

d_worm_mine.name: Spiral-Hewn Mine
d_worm_mine.description: Narrow shafts twist around spiraling mineral veins.

d_worm_farm.name: Loop-Plowed Farm
d_worm_farm.description: The food crops lean into the wind, somehow.

d_organic_landfill.name: Organic Landfills
d_organic_landfill.description: Toxic biohazard waste rots and fumes in vast heaps under the sun.

d_underground_farm.name: Subterranean Farming Caverns
d_underground_farm.description: A network of vast caverns which contain numerous fungal farms, hunting areas, and lakes teeming with edible flora and fauna.

d_underground_mine.name: Subterranean Mining Sites
d_underground_mine.description: Underground tunnels lead to a variety of mineral-rich ore veins inaccessible from the surface.

d_underground_generator.name: Subterranean Generator Areas
d_underground_generator.description: Subterranean rivers and the geothermal energy from the molten core of the planet offer vast potential for energy generation.

d_underground_farm_blocked.name: Teeming Farming Caverns
d_underground_farm_blocked.description: These Subterranean areas are currently fully exploited by the Civilization living there.

d_underground_mine_blocked.name: Teeming Mining Sites
d_underground_mine_blocked.description: These Subterranean areas are currently fully exploited by the Civilization living there.

d_underground_generator_blocked.name: Teeming Generator Areas
d_underground_generator_blocked.description: These Subterranean areas are currently fully exploited by the Civilization living there.

d_underground_farm_dead.name: £blocker£ Corpse-Filled Caverns
d_underground_farm_dead.description: Vast numbers of dead Subterraneans need to be removed before we can make use of these areas.

d_underground_mine_dead.name: £blocker£ Corpse-Filled Mining Sites
d_underground_mine_dead.description: Vast numbers of dead Subterraneans need to be removed before we can make use of these areas.

d_underground_generator_dead.name: £blocker£ Corpse-Filled Generator Areas
d_underground_generator_dead.description: Vast numbers of dead Subterraneans need to be removed before we can make use of these areas.

d_underground_contact_zone.name: Subterranean Contact Zone
d_underground_contact_zone.description: An area where Subterranean dwellers and Surfacers can work together towards peace and prosperity.

d_space_time_anomaly.name: Space-Time Anomaly
d_space_time_anomaly.description: A remarkably stable space-time anomaly left behind by an extradimensional species which conducted research on the planet. The scientific implications of its existence are, apparently, quite profound.

d_portal_research_zone.name: Portal Research Area
d_portal_research_zone.description: A secure complex has been built around the Dimensional Portal to house research staff dedicated to probing its mysteries.

d_ancient_one.name: Ancient One
d_ancient_one.description: An ancient being, living deep beneath the waves, is the dominating life force on this planet.

d_numas_breath.name: Numa's Breath
d_numas_breath.description: This stable vent reaching into the planet's crust was created by The Numistic Order.

d_nanosands.name: Nanosands
d_nanosands.description: The sand dunes on this planet are almost entirely composed of countless broken nanites. Their structure is degraded far beyond any chance for reactivation, but they do coat the planet in rare metal granulate.

d_sentinels.name: Sentinels
d_sentinels.description: The Sentinels guard this land; it may not be disturbed. The Sentinels counts as Defense Armies, and will come to the planet's aid if there's an invasion.

d_sentinels_metal.name: Sentinels
d_sentinels_metal.description: The broken remains of nine monumental automatons made from an unusual metal alloy offer an ample supply of Living Metal.

d_sentinels_monument.name: The Sentinels
d_sentinels_monument.description: Ancient guardians watch over the planet inspiring unity and spirituality in our people.

d_hab_lonely_bot_deposit.name: Enigmatic Robot
d_hab_lonely_bot_deposit.description: An ancient and enigmatic little robot, supervising a factory which dates back to an earlier civilization.

d_hab_lonely_bot_deposit_2.name: Enigmatic Robot
d_hab_lonely_bot_deposit_2.description: An ancient and enigmatic little robot, supervising a factory which dates back to an earlier civilization.

d_hab_lonely_bot_deposit_3.name: Enigmatic Robot
d_hab_lonely_bot_deposit_3.description: An ancient and enigmatic little robot, supervising a factory which dates back to an earlier civilization.

d_house_turtle.name: Juvenile Nemma
d_house_turtle.description: A young Nemma which we have bred and is now large enough to be capable of carrying some of our industry.

d_turtle_miner.name: Nemma Mining Operation
d_turtle_miner.description: The careful balance of drugs and pain inhibitors allows us to drill into the Nemmas while still residing on them.

d_turtle_corpse.name: Nemma Corpses
d_turtle_corpse.description: The floating remains of the gargantuan Nemma that once lived here can still be seen from orbit. The reptilian amphibian is now naught but a floating island.

d_polaris_city.name: Ancient Sunken City
d_polaris_city.description: The cities of the Polarians once covered the frozen ocean before their icy foundations melted away.

d_nano_corpses.name: Nanite Swarm Remains
d_nano_corpses.description: A fine powder is all that remains of the massive nanite swarm that evolved on - and once covered - Parvus III.

d_fungal_study_zone.name: Fungal Study Zone
d_fungal_study_zone.description: The 'spying' mushrooms found here are an endless source of cryptic insights into their strange biology, and how they connect to one another.

d_landed_dragon.name: Feeding Dragon
d_landed_dragon.description: The mighty Sky Dragon has landed, and is proceeding to devour its way through a startling amount of food.

d_living_snow_reserve.name: Living Snow Reserve
d_living_snow_reserve.description: A reservation where the Living Snow can live in peace and explore its new state of being. And where, in turn, we can observe the unique chemical reactions it is able to produce.

d_dayside_farm.name: Dayside Solar Farm
d_dayside_farm.description: This world has all its solar power set up on the dayside of its tidally locked hemispheres, granting it access to unlimited solar hours.

d_radiotrophic_preserve.name: Radiotrophic Preserve
d_radiotrophic_preserve.description: An isolated area filled with low pressure and a very radioactive atmosphere keeps the natives of this world alive.

d_machine_care_home.name: Organic-Machine Interface Center
d_machine_care_home.description: A specialized center where malfunctioning drones are paired with biological assistants.

d_crystal_kraken_body.name: Crystalline Remains
d_crystal_kraken_body.description: The broken remains of the crystalline entity that dwelled under the crust of this world. Its many tentacles all turned into rich mineral veins.

d_crystal_kraken_body_bombed.name: Shattered Crystalline Remains
d_crystal_kraken_body_bombed.description: The broken remains of the crystalline entity that dwelled under the crust of this world. Its many tentacles all turned into rich mineral veins.

d_big_nature_preserve_blocker.name: Nature Preserve
d_big_nature_preserve_blocker.description: A section of this world has been declared a nature preserve and may never be tampered with.

d_shroud_flora_deposit.name: Semi-Shrouded Region
d_shroud_flora_deposit.description: Bordering the Shroud-Touched regions, unique flora and fauna have emerged, each with properties that are absent from existing datasets.

d_dimensional_manipulation_device.name: Dimensional Manipulation Device
d_dimensional_manipulation_device.description: A device stolen from the fae Syamelle, it can manipulate the very dimensions and render what appears small to be more spacious.

d_toxic_god_blight_upon_the_land.name: A Blight Upon the Land
d_toxic_god_blight_upon_the_land.description: It is said that in this place, the Deity first smote the land in anger. Little remains of what once was here.

d_toxic_god_blight_upon_the_land_upgrade.name: Blighted Remembrance
d_toxic_god_blight_upon_the_land_upgrade.description: It is said that in this place, the Deity first smote the land in anger. Little remains of what once was here, but a monument has been erected, its features synthesized from our memories of that moment.

d_toxic_god_deitys_swarms.name: Swarms of the Deity
d_toxic_god_deitys_swarms.description: In the Deity's wake, insects previously unknown to this world spread rapidly, coming to thrive in many of the affected areas. Their pestilent presence continues to test us as we seek to cultivate these lands.

d_toxic_god_deitys_swarms_upgraded.name: Subdued Swarms
d_toxic_god_deitys_swarms_upgraded.description: In the Deity's wake, insects previously unknown to this world spread rapidly, coming to thrive in many of the affected areas. We have mastered the art of farming them for their succulent taste and potent venom.

d_toxic_god_pools_most_venemous.name: Pools Most Venemous
d_toxic_god_pools_most_venemous.description: Left in the Deity's wake are many pools most venemous, from which remnants of Its toxins may be recovered.

d_toxic_god_pools_most_venemous_upgraded.name: Toxins Most Deadly
d_toxic_god_pools_most_venemous_upgraded.description: Left in the Deity's wake are many pools most venomous, from which remnants of Its toxins may be recovered. Thanks to the efforts of the Knights of the Toxic God, we are now able to harvest and make diverse use of this potent poison.

d_toxic_god_pestilential_wasteland.name: Pestilential Wasteland
d_toxic_god_pestilential_wasteland.description: Not all could enjoy the blessings of the Deity. Large areas of land were ruined by its passing, never to recover.

d_toxic_god_pestilential_wasteland_upgra.name: Reclaimed Pestilence
d_toxic_god_pestilential_wasteland_upgra.description: Not all could enjoy the blessings of the Deity. Large areas of land were ruined by its passing, never to recover. However, the suits of armor recovered by the knights have provided us with the means to work safely in these parts.

d_toxic_god_envenomed_seas.name: Envenomed Seas
d_toxic_god_envenomed_seas.description: Not even the seas were spared the Deity's baneful touch.

d_toxic_god_envenomed_seas_upgraded.name: Pelagic Bounty
d_toxic_god_envenomed_seas_upgraded.description: Our Knights have brought back the technology necessary to harvest exotic gases from the seas touched by the Toxic God.

d_knights_calibrator.name: Order's X-Calibrator
d_knights_calibrator.description: The Order's most revered relic, sustaining the entire Keep.

d_ancient_manufactorium_working.name: Operational Manufactorium
d_ancient_manufactorium_working.description: An alien Manufactorium, fully operational and producing precious resources for the empire.

d_ancient_manufactorium_scrapyard.name: Manufactorium Scrapyard
d_ancient_manufactorium_scrapyard.description: Specialized salvaging yards are dismantling the old machinery and turning the scraps into useful materials.

d_ancient_manufactorium_crater.name: Destroyed Vault
d_ancient_manufactorium_crater.description: All that remains of the vault is a crater filled with machinery and debris. Although most of it is now useless, it provides easy access to recyclable materials.

d_ancient_manufactorium_vaultexploration.name: Mountainous Vault
d_ancient_manufactorium_vaultexploration.description: This large underground complex is currently being explored by dedicated research units, putting strain on the planetary power grid.

d_metallic_puddles.name: Metallic Puddles
d_metallic_puddles.description: Rare meteorology allows Puddle Technicians to harvest food and alloys simultaneously.

d_empty_quarry.name: Empty Quarry
d_empty_quarry.description: The last geode was extracted from this quarry a long time ago.

d_eater_deposit.name: Shrouded Crater
d_eater_deposit.description: Part of this planet has been devoured by a Shroud entity. The resulting crater is home to swirling purple mists, and those that venture nearby often never return.

d_stasis_prison.name: Stasis Prison
d_stasis_prison.description: Inside this planet's moon, an abandoned prison complex is connected to a network of highly advanced stasis pods. Prisoners frozen within are unable to escape.

d_prisoner_intergration.name: Structured Integration
d_prisoner_intergration.description: Freeing the stasis prisoners all at once would have been a mistake. By examining them on a case by case basis, we can better ensure that each individual can fully integrate into our society.

d_meals_in_pods.name: Meals in Pods
d_meals_in_pods.description: Those frozen in stasis make for excellent pre-packed meals.

d_star_mall_promenade_blocker.name: Destroyed Promenade
d_star_mall_promenade_blocker.description: This enormous, multi-level hub once served as the station's central shopping area, but now only collapsed displays and garbage remain.

d_star_mall_promenade.name: Promenade
d_star_mall_promenade.description: This enormous, multi-level hub serves as the station's central shopping area, with easy connections to commercial outlets, nutrition courts, and spas.

d_star_mall_blocker.name: Abandoned Wing
d_star_mall_blocker.description: This section of the Star Mall lies in ruins. We must clear the decaying structure before we can rebuild.

d_astrogarbage_collector.name: Astrogarbage Unit
d_astrogarbage_collector.description: By reducing the amount of orbital debris, this world hopes to maintain its spacefaring capabilities.

d_myrmeku_power_farms.name: Myrmeku Power Farms
d_myrmeku_power_farms.description: These tiny insects generate power for us to harness.

d_crystalline_glacier.name: Crystallized Ice Field
d_crystalline_glacier.description: These icy blue crystals were once the hearts of primordial glaciers.

d_mineral_seabed.name: Rich Seabed
d_mineral_seabed.description: The seabed is littered with high-quality minerals.

d_floodplains.name: Growing Floodplains
d_floodplains.description: Large areas of this world are flooded due to rapidly rising sea levels.

d_red_desert.name: Red Desert
d_red_desert.description: Vast deserts stained red by the bloody sacrifices made here.

d_desertling_infestation.name: Invasive Fauna
d_desertling_infestation.description: An invasive species of alien mammals.

d_alien_sanctuary.name: Alien Safari
d_alien_sanctuary.description: A sanctuary built for alien fauna where tourists can interact with extraordinary species.

d_planet_stripmine.name: Strip Mine Network
d_planet_stripmine.description: This planet has been stripped of most of the biosphere, enabling miners to extract significantly more resources.

d_geocentric_experiment.name: Celestial Orrery Supercomputer
d_geocentric_experiment.description: The supercomputer that has kept the Celestial Orrery from gravitational collapse.

d_zro_deposit_1.name: Zro discovered
d_zro_deposit_1.description: Zro dust radiates a powerful psionic presence.

d_zro_deposit_2.name: Zro discovered
d_zro_deposit_2.description: Zro dust radiates a powerful psionic presence.

d_zro_deposit_3.name: Zro discovered
d_zro_deposit_3.description: Zro dust radiates a powerful psionic presence.

d_zro_deposit_4.name: Zro
d_zro_deposit_4.description: Zro dust radiates a powerful psionic presence.

d_zro_deposit_5.name: Zro
d_zro_deposit_5.description: Zro dust radiates a powerful psionic presence.

d_dragon_monument.name: Dragonslayer Monument
d_dragon_monument.description: A monument commemorating the defeat of the Ether Drake.

d_stellarite_trophy.name: Stellar Devourer Trophy
d_stellarite_trophy.description: A trophy made out of the remains of the Stellar Devourer, reminding our great nation of its victory over the gargantuan entity.

d_scandinavian_reclamation_sector.name: Scandinavian Reclamation Sector
d_scandinavian_reclamation_sector.description: Reclamation efforts in the late 22nd century eliminated all but the most stubborn pockets of radiation, and mutation levels are now at an all-time low since the Containment Breach.

d_pacific_algae_tracts.name: Pacific Algae Tracts
d_pacific_algae_tracts.description: Invisible until you plunge beneath the waves, the algae tracts seem to stretch into infinity.

d_saharan_irrigation_project.name: Saharan Irrigation Project
d_saharan_irrigation_project.description: Few today remember the vicious ridicule that Operation Green Sahara faced when it was first proposed by Professor Izquierdo.

d_mesopotamian_urban_corridor.name: Mesopotamian Urban Corridor
d_mesopotamian_urban_corridor.description: The megalopolis that stretches along most of the Fertile Crescent is in itself a monument to this ancient birthplace of civilization.

d_delhi_sprawl.name: Delhi Sprawl
d_delhi_sprawl.description: Lakshmi Commerce Tower was the tallest building on Earth for the better part of the 22nd century, and its unique shape remains an iconic feature of the Delhi skyline.

d_boswash_metropolitan_axis.name: BosWash Metropolitan Axis
d_boswash_metropolitan_axis.description: The BosWash Riots traumatized an entire generation and led to sweeping legal reforms. Never Forget!

d_pearl_river_agglomerate.name: Pearl River Agglomerate
d_pearl_river_agglomerate.description: The first region on Earth to be officially designated a megacity. Several other developing urban regions would eventually adopt their own versions of the Golden Delta's successful anti-pollution policies.

d_mauritanian_security_zone.name: Mauritanian Security Zone
d_mauritanian_security_zone.description: Unexploded munitions are still occasionally found near the compound where Colonel Tetchu and the remnants of his brigade made their famous last stand.

d_great_albertan_crater.name: Great Albertan Crater
d_great_albertan_crater.description: When 711494 Satis approached Earth and triggered the Great Panic of '72, everyone thought this was it - the Big One had finally arrived. Fortunately, it wasn't big enough to cause an extinction event. Unfortunately, it wiped out much of Alberta.

d_great_pacific_garbage_patch.name: £blocker£ Great Pacific Garbage Patch
d_great_pacific_garbage_patch.description: A swirling miasma of plastic refuse covers a good portion of Earth's largest ocean.

d_failing_infrastructure_earth.name: £blocker£ Industrial Wasteland
d_failing_infrastructure_earth.description: This region is covered by ruined industrial complexes and toxic soil; detritus from a past age of progress.

d_exotic_mountain.name: Exotic Mountains
d_exotic_mountain.description: Deep within these mountains lie vast reserves of exotic gases - the core of our biology.

d_collapsed_spire.name: £blocker£ Collapsed Spire
d_collapsed_spire.description: An immense residential spire has collapsed under its own weight in this region, blocking access. While it was still standing, this towering structure must have been among the tallest on the planet.

d_massive_crevice.name: £blocker£ Massive Crevice
d_massive_crevice.description: This region is divided by a vast crevice that cuts through what was once a dense urban zone. The ground here is extremely unstable, with frequent earthquakes and landslides.

d_shattered_solar_array.name: £blocker£ Shattered Solar Array
d_shattered_solar_array.description: The shattered remnants of some kind of colossal solar array. When it was still functional, it must have provided power to a significant portion of this planet.

d_flooded_reactor_pits.name: £blocker£ Flooded Reactor Pits
d_flooded_reactor_pits.description: These deep pits appear to have once housed the planet's main energy production facilities. Over the eons, rain and flooding have filled the pits with murky water.

d_crumbling_mining_tunnels.name: £blocker£ Crumbling Mining Tunnels
d_crumbling_mining_tunnels.description: A network of deep tunnels beneath the planet's surface seem to have been its primary source of minerals. Millennia of cave-ins and rockfalls have left only a fraction of the tunnels traversable.

d_ancient_reactor_pits.name: Ancient Reactor Pits
d_ancient_reactor_pits.description: These deep pits near the planet's equator once housed its primary energy generators. Much of the surprisingly sturdy infrastructure has survived, and new reactors can be slotted into it.

d_immense_solar_array.name: Immense Solar Array
d_immense_solar_array.description: This solar array is nearly the size of a small continent. Most of it has been smashed beyond repair, but the underlying power infrastructure has survived, making it a good site for energy production.

d_abandoned_mining_tunnels.name: Abandoned Mining Tunnels
d_abandoned_mining_tunnels.description: Many of the ruins on the planet's surface were built by minerals extracted from these tunnels. Although most have been mined to depletion, there are still several with rich yields.

d_relic_metal_boneyard.name: Metal Boneyards
d_relic_metal_boneyard.description: The hollowed-out metal skeletons of fallen infrastructure seem almost to groan as the wind whistles through them.

d_central_spire.name: Central Spire
d_central_spire.description: This towering structure appears to have served as the administrative center of the planet. Its central location and mostly intact interior provides an unmatched opportunity to research the ruins of this world.

d_industrial_sector.name: Industrial Sector
d_industrial_sector.description: This entire region once served as the industrial heartland of the planet. The factories and refineries that operated here have long since stopped working, but vast amounts of scattered resources can still be found in the area.

d_relic_dense_ruins.name: Dense Ruins
d_relic_dense_ruins.description: The study of the dense ruins that cover this Relic World are a boon to science, but their presence also limits the amount of livable space.

d_former_relic_world.name: Former Relic World
d_former_relic_world.description: This ecumenopolis was once an abandoned Relic World. Most of the old ruins were repurposed or cleared away when the planet-wide city was rebuilt, but there are still many sites that are of scientific value.

d_mutation_vats.name: Mutation Vats
d_mutation_vats.description: In a painful ceremonial procedure, members of this post-nuclear exchange society on this planet would expose themselves to near-lethal doses of chemical mutagens, in the hopes of revealing their 'true selves.' The skeletal remains found at the bottom of many of these vats suggest not all supplicants survived the ordeal.

d_artifacts_planet_1.name: Minor Artifacts Deposit
d_artifacts_planet_1.description: Archaeological sites on this planet have already been extensively researched, but many objects of lesser value yet remain to be studied here.

d_artifacts_planet_2.name: Minor Artifacts Deposit
d_artifacts_planet_2.description: Archaeological sites on this planet have already been extensively researched, but many objects of lesser value yet remain to be studied here.

d_artifacts_planet_3.name: Minor Artifacts Deposit
d_artifacts_planet_3.description: Archaeological sites on this planet have already been extensively researched, but many objects of lesser value yet remain to be studied here.

d_arcane_replicator.name: Arcane Replicator
d_arcane_replicator.description: This ancient machine is nestled deep within the habitat's interior, built into its main reactor from where it also draws its power. A relic of whomever originally built this habitat, its matter replication technology is utterly incomprehensible to us.

d_arcane_generator.name: Arcane Generator
d_arcane_generator.description: This ancient machine seems to respond to our needs by producing the resources needed to upkeep some of our segments.

d_segment_rubble_1.name: £blocker£ Ancient Rubble
d_segment_rubble_1.description: Broken down machinery and other debris obstructs workers from utilizing the entire segment.

d_segment_rubble_1_small.name: £blocker£ Ancient Rubble
d_segment_rubble_1_small.description: Broken down machinery and other debris obstructs workers from utilizing the entire segment.

d_segment_rubble_2.name: £blocker£ Ancient Rubble
d_segment_rubble_2.description: Broken down machinery and other debris obstructs workers from utilizing the entire segment.

d_segment_rubble_3.name: £blocker£ Ancient Rubble
d_segment_rubble_3.description: Broken down machinery and other debris obstructs workers from utilizing the entire segment.

d_segment_rubble_4.name: £blocker£ Ancient Rubble
d_segment_rubble_4.description: Broken down machinery and other debris obstructs workers from utilizing the entire segment.

d_decrepit_tunnels_1.name: £blocker£ Decrepit Tunnels
d_decrepit_tunnels_1.description: These ancient and decrepit tunnels have never been fully explored or cleared.

d_decrepit_tunnels_2.name: £blocker£ Decrepit Tunnels
d_decrepit_tunnels_2.description: These ancient and decrepit tunnels will need to be fully explored and cleared.

d_decrepit_tunnels_3.name: £blocker£ Decrepit Tunnels
d_decrepit_tunnels_3.description: These ancient and decrepit tunnels have never been fully explored or cleared.

d_malfunctioning_reactor.name: Malfunctioning Reactor
d_malfunctioning_reactor.description: The reactor powering the various climate control and gravitational systems of this section is malfunctioning. Hazardous weather conditions and fluctuating gravity make it difficult to settle parts of this segment.

d_sr_diurnal_regulator.name: Faulty Diurnal Regulator
d_sr_diurnal_regulator.description: Massive panels regulating the day/night cycle of the segment have fallen out of orbit. Parts of this segment are constantly illuminated and have been scorched by centuries of exposure.

d_sr_vacuum_fields.name: Unstable Vacuum Fields
d_sr_vacuum_fields.description: This area is subject to frequent decompressions as the force fields protecting it from the vacuum of space are unstable.

d_sr_ring_gyros.name: Unaligned Ring Gyros
d_sr_ring_gyros.description: Malfunctioning gyroscopes have shifted the position of this segment in the ring, twisting and collapsing several habitable areas.

d_sr_power_grid.name: Shorting Power Grid
d_sr_power_grid.description: The damaged power grid supplying this segment has frequent shorts and brownouts.

d_spore_vents.name: Spore Vents
d_spore_vents.description: Shroom spores can be refined for industrial use.

d_cave_shroom_veins.name: Cave Shroom Veins
d_cave_shroom_veins.description: Ridding the caves of fungus revealed rich mineral veins.

d_tree_of_life_home.name: Tree of Life
d_tree_of_life_home.description: The Great Tree has sheltered and supported the Hive for untold generations.

d_tree_of_life_colony.name: Tree of Life Sapling
d_tree_of_life_colony.description: An offshoot of the Great Tree, transplanted here by the Hive. It will take millennia for it to fully mature.

d_buried_lithoids.name: £blocker£ Buried Lithoids
d_buried_lithoids.description: These Lithoids were driven deep into the ground when they fell from orbit.

d_buried_lithoids_overlord.name: £blocker£ Buried Lithoids
d_buried_lithoids_overlord.description: The crew of our Overlord's latest "test-flight" is lying dormant after their successful crash landing into [Root.GetName]. If unearthed, they might be persuaded to join us.

d_lithoid_crater.name: Massive Crater
d_lithoid_crater.description: The impact site of the meteorite which brought Lithoids to this planet.

d_machine_minerals.name: Consolidated Resources
d_machine_minerals.description: The refined mineral wealth of an entire Solar system is gathered here in continent-sized piles.

d_organic_slurry.name: Organic Slurry
d_organic_slurry.description: An ocean of organic slurry, the processed remains of the former biomass of a planet.

d_machine_prototype_pc_machine.name: Prototype Machinery
d_machine_prototype_pc_machine.description: This Machine World has yet to be completed.

d_machine_ongoing_construction.name: Unfinished Construction
d_machine_ongoing_construction.description: The machinery that comprises this region of the world has yet to be finished.

d_project_cornucopia.name: Project Cornucopia
d_project_cornucopia.description: Extensive strip mining operations made this planet harder to inhabit... And easier to exploit.

d_disco_planet.name: Party Fever
d_disco_planet.description: A gas in this planet's atmosphere induces feelings of exhilaration and the irresistible urge to dance, as well as certain aphrodisiac urges. This has made the world a prime destination for party-goers young and old who seek to shed their inhibitions and experience the thrill of the planet's perpetual dancing festivals with abandon. Meanwhile, we are also able to utilize this gas for our own purposes...

d_disco_planet2.name: Party Fever
d_disco_planet2.description: Something about this planet induces feelings of exhilaration and the irresistible urge to dance, as well as certain aphrodisiac urges. This has made the world a prime destination for party-goers young and old who seek to shed their inhibitions and experience the thrill of the planet's perpetual dancing festivals with abandon.

d_impossiblecorrie.name: Lotus Corrie
d_impossiblecorrie.description: An improbable geological feature has emerged. Strange and reflective crystal deposits line its curved walls.

d_bluelotus.name: Blue Lotus Prototype
d_bluelotus.description: This highly experimental facility seeks to transmute everyday silicates into useful alloys.

d_bluelotus2.name: Blue Lotus Facility
d_bluelotus2.description: An industrial-scale facility which transmutes everyday silicates into useful alloys.

d_ruin_bluelotus.name: Blue Lotus Ruin
d_ruin_bluelotus.description: Ruined site of a once-promising, experimental facility for transmuting rock and other matter into alloys. Nothing now remains, save this minor seam.

d_crater_bluelotus.name: Blue Lotus Crater
d_crater_bluelotus.description: Site of an accidental, runaway transmutation of rock and other matter into a single, precious alloy.

d_federation_hegemony_monument_1.name: Federation Monument
d_federation_hegemony_monument_1.description: This spaceborne monument stands witness to the unity, strength and splendor of the interstellar federation that constructed it.

d_federation_hegemony_monument_2.name: Federation Monument
d_federation_hegemony_monument_2.description: This spaceborne monument stands witness to the unity, strength and splendor of the interstellar federation that constructed it.

d_resource_consolidation_1.name: £blocker£ Malfunctioning Replicator Bay
d_resource_consolidation_1.description: The replicator bay built into the Machine World is malfunctioning, producing endless piles of grappling clamps.

d_admirals_bickering_crashed_cargo_ship.name: Crashed Cargo Ship
d_admirals_bickering_crashed_cargo_ship.description: The cargo ship destroyed a housing district, but opened up an unexpected mineral vein.

d_technocracy_toxic_waste_blocker.name: Toxic Waste
d_technocracy_toxic_waste_blocker.description: A toxic wasteland caused by research done on the structural integrity of the planet. Cold-hearted scientists may be interested in how it will affect those living on the planet.

d_technocracy_barren_lands_blocker.name: Barren Lands
d_technocracy_barren_lands_blocker.description: Barren lands left by the original toxic waste on the planet, after a significant amount of the fauna and flora was destroyed.

d_technocracy_toxic_ocean_blocker.name: Toxic Water
d_technocracy_toxic_ocean_blocker.description: A significant amount of the water on the planet has been affected by toxic waste on the planet, being incredibly destructive to nearby land and leaving it inhospitable to those who used to live there.

d_technocracy_molten_waste_blocker.name: Molten Waste
d_technocracy_molten_waste_blocker.description: Molten lava emerged from the ground after a notable earthquake on the planet, causing untold damage to many of the colonies nearby.

d_progenitor.name: Progenitor Nest
d_progenitor.description: The Progenitor's nest, where every single Offspring is born.

d_progenitor_empty.name: Empty Progenitor Nest
d_progenitor_empty.description: The once-mighty Progenitor has been vanquished, which has left the swarm in disarray.

d_prospectorium_strip_mine.name: Prospectorium Strip Mine
d_prospectorium_strip_mine.description: An expertly built mining complex, making efficient use of the local resources.

d_spawning_complex_blocker.name: £blocker£ Overlord Spawning Complex
d_spawning_complex_blocker.description: A large hulking biomass, alive and pulsating as it is slowly producing new workers for the hive.

d_nature_preserve_blocker.name: Nature Preserve
d_nature_preserve_blocker.description: A section of natural beauty decreed by the Overlord to never be tampered with.

d_crashed_slaver_ship.name: Crashed Slaver Ship
d_crashed_slaver_ship.description: While debris from the crash is scattered across a massive area, enough of the ship has survived that scavenging it for parts may be of value.

d_crashed_slaver_ship_memorial.name: Memorial to the Unshackled
d_crashed_slaver_ship_memorial.description: A public memorial and museum constructed around the remains of the crashed slaver ship. The inscription over the entrance reads: "Memory is the cradle of freedom.

d_ship_debris_broken_shackles_blocker.name: Ship Debris
d_ship_debris_broken_shackles_blocker.description: The debris from the crashed slaver ship covers a massive area, blocking development of the planet.

d_ship_debris_payback_blocker.name: Ship Debris
d_ship_debris_payback_blocker.description: The crashed debris from the orbiting Minamar ship covers a massive area, blocking development of the planet.

d_payback_habitat_research.name: Technological Cache
d_payback_habitat_research.description: The interior of the former MSI warship provides us with an unmatched opportunity to unlock the secrets of their technology.

d_msi_air_freshener.name: Atmospheric Infuser
d_msi_air_freshener.description: These ventilation units combine the latest advances in aromatherapy with advanced chemistry to mask the malodorous stench of despair and replace it with a variety of invigorating and delightful scents.

d_freeports.name: Freeport
d_freeports.description: An area dedicated to intergalactic trade with [GetPreFTLUpperPlural] countries.

d_landgrab_blocker.name: Foreign Holdings
d_landgrab_blocker.description: Purchased by off-world investors, these lands are no longer accessible to the indigenous population.

d_landgrab_foreign_holdings.name: Remote Holdings
d_landgrab_foreign_holdings.description: These parcels of land have been acquired from the indigenous population, and are now managed from orbit.

d_arcane_device.name: Arcane Device
d_arcane_device.description: This ancient machine is nestled deep within government vaults on our planet. A relic of the ingenuity of our beloved ruler, its matter replication technology remains incomprehensible to us.

d_volcanic_active_planet.name: Volcanic Activity
d_volcanic_active_planet.description: Active volcanoes melt underground mineral deposits, allowing for far easier resource acquisition.

d_hostile_fauna.name: Aggressive Wildlife
d_hostile_fauna.description: Aggressive wildlife scours the land on the hunt for prey. Settlements need increased protection to curtail this threat.

d_hostile_flora.name: Aggressive Flora
d_hostile_flora.description: Aggressive flora has overgrown this land, hunting for prey. Security-oriented personnel are issued to keep the overgrowth in check.

d_space_ship_graveyard.name: Crashed Ships
d_space_ship_graveyard.description: Old ships litter the planet, inhibiting the potential mining operations in the area. Though, they provide an easily accessible source of alloys.

d_fallen_orbital_shipyard.name: Fallen Shipyard
d_fallen_orbital_shipyard.description: The shattered remains of an ancient orbital shipyard strewn across the planetary surface. Ripe for study and extraction, is twisted hull and dormant machinery remain rich with salvageable materials.

d_pulsar_scarred.name: Scarred Land
d_pulsar_scarred.description: Scarred lands and burnt-out wastelands are impossible to use outside of harnessing the potential power from the constant pulsar flares.

d_ancient_facilities.name: Ancient Facilities
d_ancient_facilities.description: These ancient facilities contain research data on pulsars, shielding technology, and extracting energy from the most dangerous suns.

d_hab_astral_threads_1.name: Astral Threads Deposit
d_hab_astral_threads_1.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable Astral Threads deposit.

d_hab_astral_threads_2.name: Astral Threads Deposit
d_hab_astral_threads_2.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable Astral Threads deposit.

d_hab_astral_threads_3.name: Astral Threads Deposit
d_hab_astral_threads_3.description: This Habitat Complex is built near an exploitable Astral Threads deposit.

d_fractal_seed.name: Fractal Seed
d_fractal_seed.description: These transparent globes recovered from beyond an Astral Rift are able to bend themselves into an extra dimension, increasing the effective size of their surrounding space. We should place them carefully.

d_rockworm_hive.name: Rockworm Hive
d_rockworm_hive.description: The young Rockworms recovered from beyond the Astral Rift can be carefully trained to carve extensive mining tunnels. What could go wrong?

d_rockworm_hive_volcanic.name: Rockworm Hive
