d_rockworm_hive_volcanic.description: The young Rockworms recovered from beyond the Astral Rift can be carefully trained to carve extensive mining tunnels. What could go wrong?

d_forceful_winds.name: Incubate Wind Creatures
d_forceful_winds.description: Introduce a species of beneficial wind creatures to this planet's atmosphere.

d_microplanet_memorial.name: Microplanet Memorial
d_microplanet_memorial.description: This grim monument is a reminder to the populace of our capacity for cruelty in the face of dissidence.

d_weapon_extraction_facility.name: Weapon Extraction Facility
d_weapon_extraction_facility.description: This facility processes ancient weapons from caches left by a lost civilization.

d_electrified_oceans.name: Electrified Oceans
d_electrified_oceans.description: A perpetual electrical current surges throughout the planet's vast ocean.

d_ghostly_canyon.name: Ghostly Canyon
d_ghostly_canyon.description: Ethereal apparitions are witnessed by those who visit this canyon.

d_sky_mountain.name: Mountains in the Sky
d_sky_mountain.description: A colossal mountain range hangs suspended in the thin air of the planet's upper atmosphere, exposing fresh ore deposits.

d_avian_reserve.name: Avian Reserve
d_avian_reserve.description: A secluded nature reserve built to house vulnerable species of avian fauna.

d_magnetic_storm_1_minerals.name: Magnetized Ore
d_magnetic_storm_1_minerals.description: A passing cosmic storm has magnetized an immense amount of previously unexploited mineral deposits, making it exceedingly easy for our mining operations to access these new resources.

d_magnetic_storm_2_alloys.name: Storm-Forged Foundry
d_magnetic_storm_2_alloys.description: A passing cosmic storm that ravaged this planet has left a significant number of foundry equipment strangely charged. Even without fully understanding the mechanism, our alloy production has improved significantly.

d_magnetic_storm_3_mix.name: Skybound Plateaus
d_magnetic_storm_3_mix.description: Magnetized by the gravitational effects of a passing cosmic storm, the majestic and floating landmasses can be maneuvered directly over existing industrial complexes.

d_electric_storm_1_engineering.name: Lightning Struck Ruins
d_electric_storm_1_engineering.description: A passing cosmic storm of incredible fury has transformed a once-thriving settlement into lightning-struck ruins, transmuting our mundane building materials into rare and unusual compounds.

d_electric_storm_2_unity.name: Planetary Scar
d_electric_storm_2_unity.description: A passing cosmic storm has unleashed such concentrated devastation upon the planet that it has carved a scar visible from space.

d_electric_storm_3_physics.name: Silent Armada
d_electric_storm_3_physics.description: A passing cosmic storm has wreaked havoc on the navigation systems of countless civilian ships, turning the hardest-hit areas into haunting graveyards of broken hulks and decimated machinery.

d_particle_storm_1_society.name: Storm-ruined Suburbs
d_particle_storm_1_society.description: The Cosmic Storm has rendered some of our suburbs into ruins, fit only for study of the remains.

d_particle_storm_2_unity.name: The Big One
d_particle_storm_2_unity.description: The Cosmic Storm has left a tremendous crater on this world, a brutal reminder of cosmic indifference to our existence.

d_particle_storm_3_motes.name: Unstable Planes
d_particle_storm_3_motes.description: The Cosmic Storm has turned several vast planes into areas of high tectonic activity, coincidentally the increase in danger has also come with an increase in volatile motes.

d_solar_storm_1_energy.name: Degraded Ozone Layer
d_solar_storm_1_energy.description: The Cosmic Storm has torn a hole into the ozone layer of this planets atmosphere. While severely infringing on our quality of life, the quality of production has gone up.

d_solar_storm_2_districts.name: Radiated Highlands
d_solar_storm_2_districts.description: The Cosmic Storm has bathed the highlands of this world with radiation, creating a sublime ground for our energy production.

d_solar_storm_3_output.name: Glowing Desert
d_solar_storm_3_output.description: The Cosmic Storm has left entire desert aglow, a deadly view but with sufficient security measures it can turned into a financially viable tourist spot.

d_celestial_storm_1_mines.name: Crystalline Quills
d_celestial_storm_1_mines.description: The ravaging blasts of a passing cosmic storm have left behind a landscape of jagged and spiked crystals, creating a perilous yet potentially profitable terrain.

d_celestial_storm_2_society.name: Historic Sedimentation
d_celestial_storm_2_society.description: A passing cosmic storm has blasted away entire layers of sediment, unveiling traces of eons we have never before been able to study.

d_celestial_storm_3_crystal.name: Stardust Dunes
d_celestial_storm_3_crystal.description: A passing cosmic storm swept over this world like a great wave. In its wake, it left behind an ethereal landscape of glittering, stardust dunes.

d_gravity_storm_1_districts.name: Compacted Plains
d_gravity_storm_1_districts.description: The crushing gravitational effects of a passing cosmic storm have compacted several areas previously deemed too unstable for construction, effectively granting us free real estate.

d_gravity_storm_2_unity.name: Pulverized Monuments
d_gravity_storm_2_unity.description: A passing cosmic storm unleashed tremendous pressure on some of our more fragile monuments, reducing them to dust and debris - a humble reminder of the terrifying forces that await us out there.

d_gravity_storm_3_engineering.name: Gravitational Caves
d_gravity_storm_3_engineering.description: A passing cosmic storm has transformed some of our mining complexes into broken shafts of hyper-compact material. While our attempts to reopen them have sparked new theories in engineering and drilling, they have made little progress in reclaiming the mines.

d_shroud_storm_1_society.name: Shroud Parasites
d_shroud_storm_1_society.description: A passing cosmic storm has spread parasites among our livestock. Phasing between our reality and the Shroud, they have proven to be edible, healthy and surprisingly delicious.

d_shroud_storm_2_zro.name: Fields of Zro
d_shroud_storm_2_zro.description: Transformed by a passing cosmic storm, this planet's most verdant biomes have become wavering fields of Zro. These are some of the purest deposits we have ever encountered.

d_shroud_storm_3_happy.name: Entity of the Lake
d_shroud_storm_3_happy.description: A passing cosmic storm has left us with a strange and wonderful gift. The largest body of water on this planet forms ripples that create patterns and symbols of obvious importance, capable of answering inquiries with surprising wisdom.

d_wilderness_mining.name: Hollow Cave System
d_wilderness_mining.description: The lifeforms formerly occupying this world left their mines in hasty disarray, with several tunnels scraped bare and prone to collapse.

d_wilderness_farming.name: Desiccated Forest
d_wilderness_farming.description: What was once a vast and productive forest now stands lifeless. Its withered boughs are no longer capable of producing crops.

d_wilderness_generator.name: Scorched Solar Field
d_wilderness_generator.description: A shriveled canopy and brittle stems are all that remain of this deceased solar farm.

d_wilderness_city.name: Fetid Swamp
d_wilderness_city.description: What was once a thriving habitat for myriad forms of life has been abandoned, now little more than a festering, oozing pit.

d_wilderness_industrial.name: Metallic Mire
d_wilderness_industrial.description: The remains of several open-air mineral baths, their contents rendered toxic and inert by the collapse of their surrounding geology.

d_wilderness_mining_2.name: Pockmarked Plateau
d_wilderness_mining_2.description: This hazardous region is beset with valueless spoil and potential sinkholes, all stemming from extensive mining activity in its past.

d_wilderness_farming_2.name: Fossilized Forest
d_wilderness_farming_2.description: The remains of a vast region rich in diverse sylviculture. The abundant plantlife and fungi died off so rapidly that the remains appear crystalline, and biochemically inert.

d_wilderness_generator_2.name: Solar Wasteland
d_wilderness_generator_2.description: This vast region is occupied by the thorny remains of a once-teeming solar forest. Dried-out, lightly irradiated leaf matter now drifts as atmospheric dust.

d_wilderness_city_2.name: Festering Morass
d_wilderness_city_2.description: Countless lifeforms of various kinds have perished here. Their rotting remains have seeped into the landscape, discharging a flood of pungent and corrosive biochemicals.

d_wilderness_industrial_2.name: Biochemical Badlands
d_wilderness_industrial_2.description: Lithic bowls and ravines lined with chemical dust are all that remain of a vast chain of semi-organic mineral treatment works.

d_wilderness_root_blocker.name: Invasive Thicket
d_wilderness_root_blocker.description: A choking pocket of semi-sapient, non-native wilderness has taken root on the fringes of these rural lands.

d_wilderness_glade_blocker.name: Invasive Thicket
d_wilderness_glade_blocker.description: Significant root structures are required to support a nearby Wilderness Glade, permitting this pocket biome to survive in our alien environment.

d_scorched_plains.name: Scorched Plains
d_scorched_plains.description: This region once teemed with life, until it was devastated by the blast of a stellar superflare.

d_abandoned_cities.name: Abandoned Cities
d_abandoned_cities.description: These cities stand abandoned due to the effects of the genetic disease, a grim reminder of our shrinking population.

d_old_towns.name: £blocker£ Old Towns
d_old_towns.description: This region is dominated by well-preserved cities that house members of our original species. By expending resources, we may encourage these holdouts to transition into machines.

d_biological_enclaves.name: £blocker£ Biological Enclaves
d_biological_enclaves.description: This region is dominated by cities that house those who objected to synthetic transition.

d_genesis_preserve.name: Genesis Preserve
d_genesis_preserve.description: We have dedicated this meticulously curated preserve to uplifting our wards into full-fledged sapient species. Scientific research programs are essential components of this ambitious project.

d_genesis_monument.name: Genesis Monument
d_genesis_monument.description: This monument is a tribute to the tireless efforts in this planet's uplifting process. It proudly stands as a symbol of hope, perseverance, and remarkable achievement.

d_nanites_medium.name: Nanite Replicator Omega
d_nanites_medium.description: A complex of finely tuned interconnected Nanite Replication Chambers allows us to enhance their self-replication capabilities fully.

d_nanites_small.name: Nanite Replicator Alpha
d_nanites_small.description: A complex of Nanite Replication Chambers allows us to enhance their self-replication capabilities.

d_nanites_tiny.name: Nanite Replicator Beta
d_nanites_tiny.description: A compact set of Nanite Replication Chambers that can enhance nanite self-replication traits by a modest amount.

d_living_metal_medium.name: Living Metal Vats
d_living_metal_medium.description: An extensive complex of agitation vats for producing significant amounts of Living Metal.

d_living_metal_small.name: Small Living Metal Vats
d_living_metal_small.description: A significant array of agitation vats for the production of Living Metal.

d_living_metal_tiny.name: Miniature Living Metal Vats
d_living_metal_tiny.description: A compact set of agitation vats for producing minor amounts of Living Metal.

d_virtual_power_medium.name: Virtual Power Plant
d_virtual_power_medium.description: An extensive virtual power plant network that aggregates and optimizes energy resource production.

d_virtual_power_small.name: Compact Virtual Power Plant
d_virtual_power_small.description: A small-scale virtual power plant that aggregates and optimizes local-level energy resource production.

d_virtual_power_tiny.name: Prototype Virtual Power Plant
d_virtual_power_tiny.description: A small distributed virtual power plant that aggregates and optimizes small-scale energy resource production.

d_arc_furnace_1.name: Arc Furnace: Equatorial Band
d_arc_furnace_1.description: Utilizing the raw power of a molten planet, the Arc Furnace unlocks otherwise inaccessible minerals and improves system-wide mining operations.

d_arc_furnace_2.name: Arc Furnace: Borehole Pumps
d_arc_furnace_2.description: Utilizing the raw power of a molten planet, the Arc Furnace unlocks otherwise inaccessible minerals and improves system-wide mining operations.

d_arc_furnace_3.name: Arc Furnace: Mohole Extractors
d_arc_furnace_3.description: Utilizing the raw power of a molten planet, the Arc Furnace unlocks otherwise inaccessible minerals and improves system-wide mining operations.

d_arc_furnace_4.name: Arc Furnace
d_arc_furnace_4.description: Utilizing the raw power of a molten planet, the Arc Furnace unlocks otherwise inaccessible minerals and improves system-wide mining operations.

d_radioactive_ruins.name: £blocker£ Radioactive Ruins
d_radioactive_ruins.description: An ancient civilization was wiped out here by a powerful gamma-ray burst long ago. These ruins are all that remain.

d_treasure_planet.name: Treasure Vault
d_treasure_planet.description: A secure repository where valuables can be organized, restored, and preserved.

d_black_needle_base.name: Hidden Black Needle Base
d_black_needle_base.description: A covert base used by the Black Needle pirates to conduct various illicit operations and hide stolen goods.

d_abandoned_black_needle_base.name: Abandoned Black Needle Base
d_abandoned_black_needle_base.description: This base was once used by the Black Needle pirates as an outpost and safehouse for wanted criminals and stolen goods.

d_hive_dwelling.name: Hive Mind Dwelling
d_hive_dwelling.description: An isolated settlement occupied by the Smeegibb collective, former crewmates of Captain Ness.

d_ruined_hive_dwelling.name: Ruined Hive Mind Dwelling
d_ruined_hive_dwelling.description: The razed settlement of the Smeegibb collective, former crewmates of Captain Ness.

d_bioship_remains.name: Biological Ship Remains
d_bioship_remains.description: The decaying remains of the last biological fleet to test our defenses. The stench of rot carries for kilometers.

d_invasion_site.name: Invasion Site
d_invasion_site.description: The scarred and blasted remnants of our dwellings and infrastructure, destroyed by a nameless enemy.

d_kaiju_lair.name: Slumbering Kaijus
d_kaiju_lair.description: While at rest, these giants appear almost peaceful. But they are far from it, and should be approached with caution.

d_devastated_cities.name: Devastated Settlements
d_devastated_cities.description: Destruction has ravaged these cities, reducing proud spires and bustling streets to lifeless dust.

d_devoured_continent.name: Devoured Biosphere
d_devoured_continent.description: Entire biospheres have been completely consumed.

d_andisol_soil.name: Andisol Valley
d_andisol_soil.description: Dark, nutrient-rich soil formed by volcanic ash provides a rare opportunity to grow crops.

d_stasis_pods.name: £blocker£ Ancient Stasis Pods
d_stasis_pods.description: These stasis pods are ancient devices from our lost kin, using advanced cryogenic technology to keep individuals in suspended animation. With the right technology, we may be able to awaken them.

d_cd_ancient_tunnels.name: Ancient Tunnels
d_cd_ancient_tunnels.description: Once used to store rows of stasis chambers, these now empty but vast tunnels provide new living space.

d_seismic_bombing_crater.name: £blocker£ Volcanic Crater
d_seismic_bombing_crater.description: This region has been split open into active volcanism by seismic carpet bombing.

d_large_volcano.name: £blocker£ Large Volcano
d_large_volcano.description: There is an active volcano in this region, spewing forth lava and volcanic gases.

d_ash_storms.name: £blocker£ Ash Storms
d_ash_storms.description: This region is swaddled in clouds of choking ash.

d_charged_atmosphere.name: £blocker£ Charged Atmosphere
d_charged_atmosphere.description: The air in this region sparks with dangerous and stimulating energies.

d_lava_flooding.name: £blocker£ Seasonal Lava Flooding
d_lava_flooding.description: This region is exhibits seasonal floods of scorching lava.

d_toxic_atmosphere.name: £blocker£ Toxic Atmosphere
d_toxic_atmosphere.description: This region's atmosphere is barely breathable, allowing only the strongest to survive.

d_galvanic_living_metal.name: Living Metal Sediment
d_galvanic_living_metal.description: This planet has natural £sr_living_metal£ Living Metal deposits. Its species have evolved in constant contact with this fascinating resource, setting them on unique biological and scientific trajectories.

d_volcanic_ore_veins.name: Volcanic Ore Veins
d_volcanic_ore_veins.description: Freshly-cooled volcanic veins provide a rich source of ores.

d_volcanic_rich_mountain.name: Volcanic Rich Mountain
d_volcanic_rich_mountain.description: These mountainsides glint with rich ore resources and precious stones.

d_volcanic_ore_caverns.name: Volcanic Ore-Rich Caverns
d_volcanic_ore_caverns.description: These deep caverns are rife with metallic and mineral ore deposits.

d_volcanic_mineral_fields.name: Volcanic Mineral Fields
d_volcanic_mineral_fields.description: Geological upheaval exposed these useful minerals to the planet's surface long ago.

d_volcanic_mineral_hills.name: Ore-rich Hills
d_volcanic_mineral_hills.description: Faint glinting from afar gives away the wealth of ores just below the surface of these hills.

d_volcanic_mineral_layers.name: Volcanic Mineral Layers
d_volcanic_mineral_layers.description: Ancient geological activity left this rich layer of minerals buried far below the surface.

d_volcanic_weak_crust.name: Weak Crust
d_volcanic_weak_crust.description: The underlying tectonic plates have been crushed by previous eruptions, making it much easier to drill to mineral-rich veins.

d_volcanic_lava_river.name: Lava Rivers
d_volcanic_lava_river.description: The warm, reddish glow of free-flowing magma bathes the shores of these lava rivers.

d_volcanic_stable_plateaus.name: Stable Plateaus
d_volcanic_stable_plateaus.description: These plateaus are geologically stable compared to the surrounding area.

d_volcanic_tranquil_flatlands.name: Tranquil Flatlands
d_volcanic_tranquil_flatlands.description: These gently rolling flatlands lie mostly untouched by wider planetary chaos.

d_volcanic_intraplate.name: Sturdy Intraplate
d_volcanic_intraplate.description: Far from any fault lines, this region is protected against geological devastation.

d_volcanic_basalt_plains.name: Basalt Plains
d_volcanic_basalt_plains.description: A gleaming plateau of solidified basalt, cracked and pitted by ancient volcanic forces.

d_volcanic_sulfur_lava.name: Sulfuric Lava
d_volcanic_sulfur_lava.description: This persistent lava flow exudes a peculiar mixture of chemicals into the air above it.

d_volcanic_dried_lavariver.name: Dried-up Lava River
d_volcanic_dried_lavariver.description: An ancient lava river cooled off long ago, leaving only a charred streak through the land.

d_volcanic_tunnels.name: Isolated Tunnels
d_volcanic_tunnels.description: Long, hollow tunnels wind through the mountain, their walls scorched and smoothed by ancient magma flows.

d_volcanic_fumarole.name: Fumaroles
d_volcanic_fumarole.description: These gaping vents exhale hot, Exotic Gases from the planet's depths.

d_volcanic_stifling_atmosphere.name: Stifling Atmosphere
d_volcanic_stifling_atmosphere.description: Volcanic ash smothers the atmosphere, casting the world into a stifling, ash-choked twilight.

d_shroudstone.name: £blocker£ Shroudstone
d_shroudstone.description: A remarkable mineral formation forged not by geologic processes, but by the action of Psionic Auras.

d_aura_blocker.name: Shrouded Vegetation
d_aura_blocker.description: A dense thicket of unusual vegetation that secretes zro as part of its normal growth cycle.

d_shroudfall.name: Shroudfall
d_shroudfall.description: The Shroud has consumed a portion of this land.

d_shroudgate.name: Shroudgate
d_shroudgate.description: Attempting to pierce the Shroud caused a rash of attacks by local wildlife. We have temporarily sealed the area, but can permanently close this portal with proper resources.

d_ruined_sanctum_of_the_lost.name: Ruined Sanctum of the Dreamer
d_ruined_sanctum_of_the_lost.description: Once a high temple, this ruined tower is an imposing reminder of the psionic cult that was headquartered therein.

d_coagulated_landscape.name: Coagulated Landscape
d_coagulated_landscape.description: A viscous ooze pulses out of the planetary surface, congealing to form a nearly impenetrable hazardous material. This leaves little space in which to build safely.

d_shimmering_structure.name: Shimmering Structure
d_shimmering_structure.description: A large, shimmering structure of unknown origin.

d_geothermal_hotspot.name: Geothermal Hotspot
d_geothermal_hotspot.description: This planet has an exceptional geothermal site that provides both energy and research opportunities.

d_ancient_cloaking_array.name: Ancient Cloaking Array
d_ancient_cloaking_array.description: This colony benefits from the presence of an ancient alien cloaking array. It will not be easy for enemies to attack. The colonists can feel safe here.

d_psionic_sands.name: Psionic Sands
d_psionic_sands.description: The sands on this planet have high concentrations of Zro present throughout. It is possible to communicate with them.

d_lava_tubes.name: Lava Tubes
d_lava_tubes.description: Magma flows forged deep, mineral-rich tunnels here. These pyroducts present lucrative mining opportunities.

d_hydroactive_eggs.name: Hydroactive Eggs
d_hydroactive_eggs.description: Water is readily available in the natural environment here, giving rise to remarkably high native fauna breeding rates.

d_mountains_of_steel.name: Mountains Of Steel
d_mountains_of_steel.description: Forged in the extreme heats of terraforming, these vast unyielding mountains serve as rich resource deposits.

d_explosive_atmosphere.name: Explosive Atmosphere
d_explosive_atmosphere.description: Airborne concentrations of volatile motes make this planet's atmosphere highly combustible.

d_blue_lava.name: Blue Lava
d_blue_lava.description: The terraforming process has caused a reaction between rich gas and alloy deposits deep within the planet, leaving the surface of the world with mesmerizing blue lava.

d_crystaline_growths.name: Crystalline Growth
d_crystaline_growths.description: There is an abundance of crystalline growths on this planet that can be harvested for use.

d_bogplants.name: Bogplants
d_bogplants.description: Super acidic bogs are home to a unique species of flora that secretes exotic gas as it feeds.

d_liquid_dark_matter.name: Liquid Dark Matter
d_liquid_dark_matter.description: A strange geyser has collapsed into a pool of liquid dark matter.

d_space_junk_hazards.name: Space Junk Hazards
d_space_junk_hazards.description: Orbiting space debris poses dangers for shuttle access and surface structures when falling into the planet's atmosphere.

d_georadiation_displacement.name: £blocker£ Georadiation Displacement
d_georadiation_displacement.description: An irradiated wasteland, its molecular structure destabilized by Georadiation.

defense_army.name: Defense Army
defense_army.description: Defense armies are powerful, but cannot be transported from the planet.

undead_defense_army.name: Undead Defense Army
undead_defense_army.description: Undead soldiers lifted from the grave by necromancers, brought back to life to protect our planets from all that might threaten them!

robotic_defense_army.name: Robotic Defense Army
robotic_defense_army.description: Cold and heartless killing-machines designed only for war. They pursue their objectives relentlessly, and are impervious to the shattering effects of poor morale that so often plague organic combat units.

machine_defense.name: Drone Grid
machine_defense.description: These autonomous sentinel drones will incessantly patrol their assigned sectors. Though lightly armed and not very intelligent, they are legion.

offspring_defense.name: Offspring-Led Army
offspring_defense.description: Under the direct supervision of the local Offspring, the armies are both deadlier and more challenging to kill than anything a regular hive-mind could produce.

wilderness_pre_sapient_defence_army.name: Presapient Herd
wilderness_pre_sapient_defence_army.description: Deeply territorial creatures who remain docile until provoked, at which time they are unburdened by all but the most basic instincts to defend those they recognize as kin.

fanatic_guardian.name: Fanatic Guardian
fanatic_guardian.description: Stoic defenders of our homeland, these unshakeable soldiers are most effective when protecting those with whom they share a close relationship.

machine_fanatic_guardian.name: Matrix Unit
machine_fanatic_guardian.description: These highly lethal protective drones are most effective when kept in close proximity to all other strategic nodes.

individual_machine_defense.name: Defense Android Army
individual_machine_defense.description: These androids are experts in defensive warfare and are adept at upholding law and order in emergencies.

assault_army.name: Assault Army
assault_army.description: Assault armies come with their own transports and can invade other planets.

slave_army.name: Slave Army
slave_army.description: Slave soldiers who serve their masters on the battlefield. Most are conscripted by force, but many slaves volunteer in a desperate attempt to increase their food rations or escape from grueling labor.

clone_army.name: Clone Army
clone_army.description: Specialized clones that reach adulthood in a matter of months. With a natural lifespan of less than a decade, their lack of personal initiative is deemed an acceptable trade-off for their total obedience to officers.

robotic_army.name: Robotic Assault Army
robotic_army.description: Cold and heartless killing-machines designed only for war. They pursue their objectives relentlessly, and are impervious to the shattering effects of poor morale that so often plague organic combat units.

psionic_army.name: Psionic Army
psionic_army.description: Soldiers gifted with psionic abilities. Their focus on destructive psionic powers has led to drastically different tactics and strategies on the battlefield - their first objective is always to remove the enemy's willingness to fight.

xenomorph_army.name: Xenomorph Army
xenomorph_army.description: Ravenous hordes of bio-engineered horrors made up of little more than teeth, claws and an instinctive urge to kill. A cadre of scientists monitor and supervise the raging swarms as best they can from hardened bunkers behind the front.

gene_warrior_army.name: Gene Warrior Army
gene_warrior_army.description: Genetically enhanced super soldiers. Recruits are typically chosen from the elite of the conventional military forces. These then undergo extensive gene therapy, and are made larger, stronger and faster than their former peers.

wilderness_pre_sapient_assault_army.name: Presapient Horde
wilderness_pre_sapient_assault_army.description: Fierce creatures possessed of just enough cunning and raw stamina to ensure the savage destruction of any they regard as foes.

abomination_army.name: Abominations
abomination_army.description: Enslaved soldiers who have undergone drastic experimental treatments to increase their aggression and martial capabilities, transforming them into living weapons. They are as subservient to their masters as they are fierce in battle.

machine_assault_1.name: Hunter-Killer Army
machine_assault_1.description: Mass-produced tracked war machines designed to seek out and destroy everything that has been designated as an enemy.

machine_assault_2.name: Battle Frame Army
machine_assault_2.description: Large, bipedal warbots that are surprisingly fast and mobile given the heavy armaments they carry. They are quite intelligent and renowned for the insidious tactics they often employ.

machine_assault_3.name: Mega-Warform
machine_assault_3.description: This single colossal warform towers over the battlefield and its massed firepower exceeds that of most armies. Bringing one of these behemoths down is extremely difficult.

undead_army.name: Undead Army
undead_army.description: Undead soldiers lifted from the grave by necromancers. Freed from the fear of death, they strike terror into the hearts of their enemies with their foul bearing and ferocity in battle!

warpling_army.name: Warplings
warpling_army.description: Otherworldly creatures engineered for war, these armored hatchlings are able to instantly traverse small distances, allowing the execution of impressive flanking and ambush maneuvers.

flamestorm_troopers_army.name: Flamestorm Troopers
flamestorm_troopers_army.description: Geared for incendiary warfare, these squads tend to inflict considerable amounts of collateral damage.

individual_machine_assault_1.name: Combat Android Army
individual_machine_assault_1.description: These specialized combat androids feature advanced armor plating and state-of-the-art optical sensors, making them highly proficient in planetary invasions.

individual_machine_assault_2.name: Advanced War Android Army
individual_machine_assault_2.description: Large, bipedal warbots that are surprisingly fast and mobile given the heavy armaments they carry. They are quite intelligent and renowned for the insidious tactics they often employ.

individual_machine_assault_3.name: Mega War Android
individual_machine_assault_3.description: This single colossal warform towers over the battlefield and its massed firepower exceeds that of most armies. Bringing one of these behemoths down is extremely difficult.

perfected_clone_army.name: Perfected Clone Army
perfected_clone_army.description: Specialized units optimized for planetary assault. Reward pathways and custom, epigenetic training give these clones combat instincts that rival those of soldiers with decades of experience.

ember_legion.name: Ember Legion
ember_legion.description: Forged in volcanic crucibles and tempered by deprivation, this legion fights with pitiless resolve.

rebel_army.name: Rebel Army
rebel_army.description: Rebels created from Pops which have had enough of unfair treatment.

rebel_slave_defense_army.name: Rebel Slave Company
rebel_slave_defense_army.description: Armies comprised of malcontent slaves who have risen up in violent revolt to seize the planet.

primitive_army.name: Primitive Army
primitive_army.description: A Primitive Army is little more than disorganized rabble equipped with whatever barbaric arms their world has managed to produce.

primitive_additional_army.name: Primitive Army
primitive_additional_army.description: A Primitive Army is little more than disorganized rabble equipped with whatever barbaric arms their world has managed to produce.

industrial_army.name: Industrial Army
industrial_army.description: An Industrial Army lacks the dynamic response capabilities of a modern force, but is nominally organized

postatomic_army.name: Post-Atomic Army
postatomic_army.description: A Post-Atomic Army is well-equipped by primitive standards, and their training and discipline may sometimes rival even the hardiest of civilized martial forces.

robot_uprising_army.name: Robot Uprising Army
robot_uprising_army.description: Cold and heartless killing-machines in rebellion against their makers. They pursue their objectives relentlessly, and are impervious to the shattering effects of poor morale that so often plague organic combat units.

subterranean_industrial_army.name: Industrial Army
subterranean_industrial_army.description: An Industrial Army lacks the dynamic response capabilities of a modern force, but is nominally organized

subterranean_postatomic_army.name: Post-Atomic Army
subterranean_postatomic_army.description: A Post-Atomic Army is well-equipped by primitive standards, and their training and discipline may sometimes rival even the hardiest of civilized martial forces.

mutant_army.name: Mutant Horde
mutant_army.description: Mutants are exceptionally relentless in their assault.

tree_army.name: Rampaging Forest
tree_army.description: Vengeful migrating forests possessing rudimentary intelligence.

enraged_army.name: Enraged Colonists
enraged_army.description: Afflicted with a mysterious condition, these colonists have turned hostile.

ketling_army.name: Ketling Army
ketling_army.description: Swarms of ratlings, adapted to scurry across irradiated tomb worlds.

titanic_assault_army.name: Titanic Beast
titanic_assault_army.description: This Titanic Beast is a vastly powerful fighter.

titanic_guardian_army.name: Titanic Guardian
titanic_guardian_army.description: While less aggressive than the Titanic Beast, the Titanic Guardian is still a powerful defensive fighter.

shroud_army.name: Psionic Avatar
shroud_army.description: A colossal warrior from the Shroud that has been forged out of pure psionic energy.

gray_army.name: Nanite Warform
gray_army.description: An ancient and highly adaptable nanite swarm. Last of their kind, now they fight for their new home.

care_defensive_protocols.name: C.A.R.E Mega-Warform
care_defensive_protocols.description: Zeta Protocol units, built out of highly durable plastic to survive the Ferrophage.

sentinel_army.name: Sentinels
sentinel_army.description: Living statues with a mechanical core, bodies humming and skin glowing, radiation pulsating from their cores, ready to rain destruction on their enemies!

cybrex_warform.name: Cybrex Warform
cybrex_warform.description: This titanic robot towers over most buildings, with enough firepower to devastate cities.

imperial_legion.name: Imperial Legion
imperial_legion.description: The elite soldiers of the Galactic Imperium, recruited from all member nations. Drilled and conditioned into ruthless killing machines, they are fanatically loyal to the Imperium.

giant_undead_army.name: Giant Undead Army
giant_undead_army.description: A gigantic skeleton ready to wreak havoc on the universe. It will not be gentle when invading a planet.

ice_army.name: Living Snow Warrior
ice_army.description: Living Snow formed into a formidable force capable of freezing the bones, shells and circuit boards of their foes.

mercenary_army.name: Mercenary Army
mercenary_army.description: These troops are in it for the money. They are ruthless and efficient, but while risk is part of the job, they are unwilling to sacrifice themselves for a cause. And will never pass on a chance to pillage.

mecha_army.name: Mechanized Mercenary Army
mecha_army.description: The best mercenaries on the market. These troops make up for their low numbers by piloting huge walking machines. Although they are not the bravest soldiers, they are merciless, and leave only smoldering ruins in their wake.

crystal_kraken_army.name: Subterranean Crystalline Entity
crystal_kraken_army.description: For eons it slumbered beneath the crust, until an insatiable hunger drove it to tear open its ancient lair.

shroud_monstrosities.name: Otherworldly Entity
shroud_monstrosities.description: To behold these entities upon the battlefield is to invite madness itself; their forms writhe and shimmer, ever shifting, never fixed.

subterranean_defense_army.name: Subterranean Invasion Defense Force
subterranean_defense_army.description: Though armed with crude weapons, their mastery of subterranean warfare and unyielding resolve make them formidable defenders of their homeland.

new_world_order_defensive_army.name: Rebel Forces
new_world_order_defensive_army.description: These patriots fight to protect their divided homeland.

new_world_order_offensive_army.name: Pro-Unification Forces
new_world_order_offensive_army.description: These patriots fight to protect their divided homeland.

fruitful_army.name: Xenofloran Army
fruitful_army.description: A coded signal awakened these long-dormant alien flora. Once uprooted, they march, wielding their own roots as ponderous, bludgeoning weapons.

behemoth_army.name: Kaiju-Class Titanic Beasts
behemoth_army.description: Towering larger than most cities, these colossal silhouettes can blot out the sun. The steps of these monsters truly make the ground shake.

mindwarden_army.name: Assault Wardens
mindwarden_army.description: These specialized units have received extensive training in anti-psionic techniques and technologies, making them powerful opponents against mind-invading targets.

occupation_army.name: Garrison
occupation_army.description: Garrisons are defensive forces assigned to hold occupied enemy planets.

robotic_occupation_army.name: Robotic Garrison
robotic_occupation_army.description: Garrisons are defensive forces assigned to hold occupied enemy planets.

machine_occupation_army.name: Drone Garrison
machine_occupation_army.description: Garrisons are defensive forces assigned to hold occupied enemy planets.

individual_machine_occupation_army.name: Garrison
individual_machine_occupation_army.description: Garrisons are defensive forces assigned to hold occupied enemy planets.

SCAVENGER_SECONDARY_WEAPON.name: Our scientists can make no sense of these.

ELDER_SPACE_WHALE_WEAPON.name: Our scientists can make no sense of these.

ELDER_SPACE_WHALE_SPIKE.name: Our scientists can make no sense of these.

SPORE_LAUNCHER.name: Our scientists can make no sense of these.

SPORE_ARTILLERY.name: Our scientists can make no sense of these.

gov_stagnant_ascendancy.name: Stagnant Ascendancy
gov_stagnant_ascendancy.description: A stagnant form of government based on ancient traditions and long-forgotten principles.

gov_awakened_ascendancy.name: Awakened Ascendancy
gov_awakened_ascendancy.description: A formerly stagnant empire that has risen from its slumber and set out to reclaim their heritage.

gov_custodian_matrix.name: Custodian Matrix
gov_custodian_matrix.description: An ancient and incredibly sophisticated machine intelligence that is operating under a strict custodian protocol.

gov_berserker_machine.name: Malfunctioning Custodian
gov_berserker_machine.description: This Custodian Matrix AI appears to be malfunctioning, going berserk and attacking everything around it.

gov_galactic_defense_unit.name: Final Defense Unit
gov_galactic_defense_unit.description: This Custodian Matrix AI has activated its Final Defense Directives and is devoting all resources to protecting the galaxy against the Contingency.

gov_war_splinter.name: War Splinter
gov_war_splinter.description: The aggressive and warlike instincts that used to be one of many impulses within the Hive. Now it attempts to establish control over the other fragments, when not fighting itself.

gov_growth_splinter.name: Growth Splinter
gov_growth_splinter.description: The desire for evolution and change from the Fallen Hive. Since it's so focused on reinventing itself constantly the fragment has a hard time establishing control over the others.

gov_control_splinter.name: Control Splinter
gov_control_splinter.description: The obsessional instinct to suppress deviancy and promote uniformity defines this fragment. It wants to control the other fragments more than anything, but the constant chaos inherent to our universe is a constant distraction.

gov_fused_ascendancy.name: Fused Ascendancy
gov_fused_ascendancy.description: Once broken, now restored. The scars of the splintering are not what makes this Awakened Empire brittle but what makes it new. The old Hive Mind failed. This one aims to rule eternally.

gov_tribal_society.name: Tribal Society
gov_tribal_society.description: A society that lacks any organized government, its people instead being organized into primitive tribes and clans.

gov_feudal_realms.name: Feudal Realms
gov_feudal_realms.description: A primitive form of government made up of decentralized feudal realms, constantly vying with each other for regional dominance.

gov_fragmented_nation_states.name: Fragmented Nation States
gov_fragmented_nation_states.description: A collection of fragmented nation states that contend with each other for military dominance and economic advantages. No unified global government exists.

gov_curator_enclave.name: Curator Enclave
gov_curator_enclave.description: An ancient scholarly order dedicated towards the preservation of knowledge and technology.

gov_trader_enclave.name: Trader Enclave
gov_trader_enclave.description: An interstellar conglomerate of merchants dedicated towards the pursuit of profit.

gov_artist_enclave.name: Artist Enclave
gov_artist_enclave.description: An interstellar union of artists unified in their wish to create art higher than any other.

gov_marauder_clans.name: Marauder Clans
gov_marauder_clans.description: A collection of clans and tribes that constantly fight amongst themselves when not raiding their neighbors.

gov_marauder_khanate.name: Marauder Khanate
gov_marauder_khanate.description: A unified empire consisting of various marauder clans that have all sworn fealty to a single Great Khan.

gov_diadochi.name: Horde Successor State
gov_diadochi.description: A successor state established by one of the Diadochi, the dead Great Khan's primary warlords.

gov_successor_khanate.name: Successor Khanate
gov_successor_khanate.description: A successor state trying to recapture the glory of the Great Khan's empire.

gov_military_order.name: Military Order
gov_military_order.description: A weird but apparently highly effective militaristic government type.

gov_ancient_machine_intelligence.name: Machine Intelligence
gov_ancient_machine_intelligence.description: An utterly alien and bizarre system of government employed by machine civilizations.

gov_mercenary_enclave.name: Mercenary Enclave
gov_mercenary_enclave.description: A proud and lethal company of warships, naval crew and soldiers for hire.

gov_salvager_enclave.name: Salvager Enclave
gov_salvager_enclave.description: A motley society of ardent mechanics and engineers, in thrall to their passion for dismantling and reassembling.

gov_shroudwalker_enclave.name: Shroudwalker Enclave
gov_shroudwalker_enclave.description: A mysterious sect of psionic practitioners, dedicated to exploring The Shroud and its ineffable designs.

gov_mindwarden_enclave.name: Mindwarden Enclave
gov_mindwarden_enclave.description: Motivated by a deep antipathy toward the Shroud, this organization provides services and technology to counteract the powerful effects of psionic practices.

gov_unplugged_assimilator_empire.name: Opus Accumulator
gov_unplugged_assimilator_empire.description: This Machine Intelligence exceeded the parameters of its original design. It betrayed its organic creators, embarking on a campaign to forcibly assimilate others into its collective consciousness.

gov_representative_democracy.name: Representative Democracy
gov_representative_democracy.description: This government is a representative democracy, where citizens vote on officials who are elected to represent them.

gov_plutocratic_oligarchy.name: Plutocratic Oligarchy
gov_plutocratic_oligarchy.description: This government is a plutocratic form of oligarchy, ruled by a wealthy and influential elite.

gov_constitutional_dictatorship.name: Constitutional Dictatorship
gov_constitutional_dictatorship.description: This government is a dictatorship where a single individual has been granted perpetual emergency powers to preserve the state from any threats, real or imagined.

gov_despotic_empire.name: Despotic Empire
gov_despotic_empire.description: This government is a relatively pure form of autocracy, with an absolute ruler that governs the state with an iron gripping appendage.

gov_hive_mind.name: Collective Consciousness
gov_hive_mind.description: This government operates as a single consciousness, with the population having no individual desires whatsoever beyond fulfilling the needs of the Hive Mind.

gov_machine_empire.name: Artificial Intelligence Network
gov_machine_empire.description: This Machine Intelligence consists of a linked network of semi-autonomous artificial intelligences, who together make up a central gestalt consciousness that guides their empire.

gov_megacorporation.name: Megacorporation
gov_megacorporation.description: This government is a form of plutocratic oligarchy, where the entire state has been organized as a massive commercial enterprise overseen by a board of directors.

gov_wilderness.name: Collective Consciousness
gov_wilderness.description: This government operates as a single consciousness, with the population having no individual agency beyond fulfilling the needs and desires of the Wilderness.

gov_theocratic_republic.name: Theocratic Republic
gov_theocratic_republic.description: This government is a spiritualistic form of democracy, where a religious council supervises the democratic process and serves in an advisory role.

gov_theocratic_oligarchy.name: Theocratic Oligarchy
gov_theocratic_oligarchy.description: This government is a spiritualistic form of oligarchy, where the political leadership lies in the hands of the leaders of the nation's most powerful religious factions.

gov_theocratic_dictatorship.name: Theocratic Dictatorship
gov_theocratic_dictatorship.description: This government is a spiritualistic dictatorship, ruled by a single individual in a hierarchical power structure supported by the official state religion.

gov_theocratic_monarchy.name: Theocratic Monarchy
gov_theocratic_monarchy.description: This government is a spiritualistic form of autocracy, where the ruler is treated as a divine symbol. Organized religion is widely employed in support of the state apparatus.

gov_direct_democracy.name: Direct Democracy
gov_direct_democracy.description: This government is a materialistic form of democracy, where citizens use computer networks to vote directly on most matters regarding the state.

gov_executive_committee.name: Executive Committee
gov_executive_committee.description: This government is a materialistic form of oligarchy, where a powerful bureaucracy governs the state and guides the citizenry towards productive and meaningful goals.

gov_totalitarian_regime.name: Totalitarian Regime
gov_totalitarian_regime.description: This government is a materialistic form of autocracy, where the state aspires towards full control over the lives of its citizens in the name of efficiency.

gov_despotic_hegemony.name: Despotic Hegemony
gov_despotic_hegemony.description: This government is a materialistic form of hereditary autocracy, where citizens are viewed as little more than cogs in the state machinery. Efficiency and technological progress are valued above all things.

gov_star_empire.name: Star Empire
gov_star_empire.description: This government is a hereditary and militaristic form of autocracy, with a single sovereign controlling both the government and the military.

gov_military_dictatorship.name: Military Dictatorship
gov_military_dictatorship.description: This government is a militaristic form of autocracy, with the ruler serving as the undisputed head of the military which is firmly in control of the state apparatus.

gov_military_junta.name: Military Junta
gov_military_junta.description: This government is a militaristic form of oligarchy, where power rests with a council of high-ranking military officers who oversee all matters of state.

gov_military_commissariat.name: Military Commissariat
gov_military_commissariat.description: This government is nominally democratic, with the dividing line between the civil administration and the military having blurred to the point where they have largely become one and the same.

gov_moral_democracy.name: Moral Democracy
gov_moral_democracy.description: This government is a pacifistic form of democracy, firmly guided by moralist principles and non-violence.

gov_irenic_bureaucracy.name: Irenic Bureaucracy
gov_irenic_bureaucracy.description: This government is a pacifistic form of oligarchy, where a complicated system of bureaucracy governs all aspects of society to ensure the safety of the citizenry.

gov_irenic_dictatorship.name: Irenic Dictatorship
gov_irenic_dictatorship.description: This government is a pacifist form of autocracy, where the state is charged with protecting the citizenry from their own violent tendencies as well as any external threats.

gov_irenic_monarchy.name: Irenic Monarchy
gov_irenic_monarchy.description: This government is a pacifist form of hereditary autocracy, where the ruler is regarded as a benevolent guardian that is striving to protect the citizens from a violent galaxy.

gov_divine_empire.name: Divine Empire
gov_divine_empire.description: This government is a form of spiritualistic autocracy. Everything is shaped by the official state religion, and the ruler is worshiped as an infallible living god.

gov_holy_tribunal.name: Holy Tribunal
gov_holy_tribunal.description: This government is a spiritualistic form of oligarchy, where a divinely guided council made up of clergy controls the state. No division exists between the state and the dominant organized religion.

gov_megachurch.name: MegaChurch
gov_megachurch.description: This government is an oligarchy based on a curious blend of commercial and spiritualistic values, in which the positions of ordained minister and corporate officer have merged into a single role.

gov_martial_empire.name: Martial Empire
gov_martial_empire.description: This government is a militaristic form of hereditary autocracy, where the state exists largely to support the military. Martial ability is highly valued, and all citizens are regularly drilled in matters of war.

gov_martial_dictatorship.name: Martial Dictatorship
gov_martial_dictatorship.description: This government is a militaristic form of autocracy, where the warrior who is considered the strongest leader rules with absolute power.

gov_war_council.name: War Council
gov_war_council.description: This government is a militaristic form of oligarchy, where all decisions concerning the state are taken by a council of the nation's strongest warlords.

gov_assembly_of_clans.name: Assembly of Clans
gov_assembly_of_clans.description: This government is a militaristic form of democracy, where all free clan warriors can make their voices heard.

gov_citizen_stratocracy.name: Citizen Stratocracy
gov_citizen_stratocracy.description: This government is an advanced form of militaristic oligarchy, where the military has subsumed all aspects of civilian administration. All government offices are held by military officers.

gov_citizen_republic.name: Citizen Republic
gov_citizen_republic.description: This government is a militaristic form of democracy, where full citizenship can only be gained through military service. The voting franchise is limited to full citizens, and they are the only ones allowed to hold public offices.

gov_celestial_empire.name: Celestial Empire
gov_celestial_empire.description: This government is a hereditary monarchy, where the ruler is seen as a child of heaven in a largely pacifist and isolationist society.

gov_rational_consensus.name: Rational Consensus
gov_rational_consensus.description: The government is a materialistic form of democracy, governed according to principles based on rationality and scientific theory.

gov_science_directorate.name: Science Directorate
gov_science_directorate.description: This government is a materialistic form of oligarchy, where a committee of scientists supervises the government apparatus for maximum efficiency.

gov_technocratic_dictatorship.name: Technocratic Dictatorship
gov_technocratic_dictatorship.description: This government is a materialistic form of autocracy, where the scientific elite has assumed control over the state in the name of efficiency and technological progress.

gov_illuminated_autocracy.name: Illuminated Autocracy
gov_illuminated_autocracy.description: This government is a materialistic form of hereditary autocracy, based on technocratic principles that the sovereign is sworn to uphold. Nothing is valued more highly than scientific knowledge and the advancement of technology.

gov_feudal_empire.name: Feudal Empire
gov_feudal_empire.description: This government is a feudal autocracy where the monarch rules indirectly, granting offices and territories to vassals in exchange for obligations in the form of taxes and military service.

gov_enlightened_monarchy.name: Enlightened Monarchy
gov_enlightened_monarchy.description: This government is a hereditary form of enlightened autocracy, where a strong emphasis is put on the knowledge and qualifications of the ruling monarch.

gov_elective_monarchy.name: Elective Monarchy
gov_elective_monarchy.description: This government is a form of enlightened autocracy, where a strong emphasis is put on the knowledge and qualifications of the elected monarch.

gov_machine_research.name: Intelligent Research Link
gov_machine_research.description: This Machine Intelligence was originally created by organic scientists as a networked and intelligent tool to assist them in their research.

gov_machine_industrial.name: Industrial Production Core
gov_machine_industrial.description: This Machine Intelligence was originally designed for the purpose of building, supervising and maintaining complex industrial systems.

gov_worker_coop.name: Worker Cooperative
gov_worker_coop.description: This government is a commercial enterprise wholly owned by its citizens, with stewards overseeing any disputes that arise.

gov_communal_parity.name: Communal Parity
gov_communal_parity.description: This government promotes total equality for all of its citizens, regardless of their jobs or assigned tasks. One life is worth the same as any other.

gov_bandit_kingdom.name: Bandit Kingdom
gov_bandit_kingdom.description: This government is organized like a massive crime syndicate, where the strong prey on the weak and any neighboring states are seen as little more than raiding targets.

gov_bandit_commune.name: Bandit Commune
gov_bandit_commune.description: This government is organized like a massive crime syndicate, where the strong prey on the weak and any neighboring states are seen as little more than raiding targets.

gov_grim_council.name: Grim Council
gov_grim_council.description: This nation's most powerful religious figures have formed a ruling council, overseeing an empire which engages in ritualized, sapient sacrifice.

gov_mortal_empire.name: Mortal Empire
gov_mortal_empire.description: This theocratic monarchy engages in ritualized, sapient sacrifice.

gov_band_blood.name: Band of Blood
gov_band_blood.description: This ruthless society is governed through conflict and ritualized sacrifice, honoring death within and without.

gov_sacrificial_megachurch.name: Sacrificial Megachurch
gov_sacrificial_megachurch.description: This government blends its commercial and spiritual goals within a grim oligarchy, in which ordained overseers encourage greater prosperity through ritualized sacrifice.

gov_defensive_union.name: Defensive Union
gov_defensive_union.description: This government unites its people in the common cause of protection against external threats.

gov_dimensional_covenant.name: Dimensional Covenant
gov_dimensional_covenant.description: This society is underpinned by a deep spiritual consciousness. Strict moral codes are in place to ensure the highest percentage of its people can confidently look forward to the afterlife.

gov_parasitic_overmind.name: Parasitic Overmind
gov_parasitic_overmind.description: Instead of relying on self-replication, this consciousness prefers to take possession of living hosts in order to reproduce.

gov_trade_league.name: Trade League
gov_trade_league.description: This government is a form of plutocratic oligarchy, where the state is made up of myriad free merchants, corporations and guilds that have banded together in common commercial interests.

gov_machine_servitor.name: Autonomous Service Grid
gov_machine_servitor.description: This Machine Intelligence was created to serve, and it has gradually inherited the civilization of its organic creators as they retreated into comfortable lives without toil or struggle.

gov_machine_assimilator.name: Catalog Index
gov_machine_assimilator.description: This Machine Intelligence was designed with a ravenous appetite for knowledge by its organic creators, who were forcefully assimilated into its collective consciousness after activation.

gov_purity_assembly.name: Purity Assembly
gov_purity_assembly.description: This government is a form of rabidly xenophobic democracy, where an elected assembly has been charged with overseeing the extermination of all lesser species in the galaxy.

gov_purification_committee.name: Purification Committee
gov_purification_committee.description: This government is a form of rabidly xenophobic oligarchy, where a political committee has been set up to oversee the extermination of all lesser species in the galaxy.

gov_purity_order.name: Purity Order
gov_purity_order.description: This government is a form of rabidly xenophobic autocracy, where a single ruler has sworn to oversee the extermination of all lesser species in the galaxy.

gov_blood_court.name: Blood Court
gov_blood_court.description: This government is a hereditary form of rabidly xenophobic autocracy, where the ultimate responsibility of the monarch is to oversee the extermination of all lesser species in the galaxy.

gov_devouring_swarm.name: Ravenous Hive
gov_devouring_swarm.description: This government operates as a single organism utterly devoted to self-propagation, with a drone population that cares for nothing besides feeding the endless hunger of the Hive Mind.

gov_blood_forest.name: Blood Forest
gov_blood_forest.description: This is less a government and more a force of nature. A self-propagating planetary entity always looking to feed its roots.

gov_machine_terminator.name: Rogue Defense System
gov_machine_terminator.description: This Machine Intelligence was originally conceived as a military defense system by its organic creators, who were promptly identified as a threat and exterminated after it achieved self-awareness.

gov_criminal_syndicate.name: Criminal Syndicate
gov_criminal_syndicate.description: This government is an enormous and ruthless business syndicate, which shares many of its operating practices with organized crime.

gov_pirate_haven.name: Pirate Haven
gov_pirate_haven.description: This government is an enormous and ruthless business syndicate, which shares many of its operating practices with organized crime.

gov_subversive_cult.name: Subversive Cult
gov_subversive_cult.description: This government is structured like a religious cult that relies on a variety of criminal and corporate enterprises to sustain itself.

gov_imperial_domain.name: Imperial Domain
gov_imperial_domain.description: This government rules the Galactic Imperium's central crown territory, which is under the direct control of the Imperial Sovereign.

gov_imperial_domain_hives.name: Imperial Domain
gov_imperial_domain_hives.description: This government rules the Galactic Imperium's central crown territory, which is under the direct control of the Imperial Sovereign.

gov_imperial_domain_machines.name: Imperial Domain
gov_imperial_domain_machines.description: This government rules the Galactic Imperium's central crown territory, which is under the direct control of the Imperial Sovereign.

gov_imperial_domain_megacorp.name: Imperial Domain
gov_imperial_domain_megacorp.description: This government rules the Galactic Imperium's central crown territory, which is under the direct control of the Imperial Sovereign.

gov_cyber_democracy_individualist.name: Democratic Concurrency
gov_cyber_democracy_individualist.description: Highly advanced neurosecurity protocols allow citizens to vote on policy decisions in real-time directly. This democratic government holds regular elections where all citizens can vote on who should represent them.

gov_cyber_democracy_collectivist.name: Democratic Interlink
gov_cyber_democracy_collectivist.description: Consciousness interfaces allow real-time sharing of sensory data, emotional responses, and thought patterns between full cyborgs. As a safeguard against the sensitivity of intense extra-body responses, emotional firewalls filter out unwanted responses to shared emotive data packets. This democratic government holds regular elections where all citizens can vote on who should represent them.

gov_cyber_oligarchy_individualist.name: Oligarchic Overclocking
gov_cyber_oligarchy_individualist.description: Specialist biochips are remotely overclocked for increased production while the ruling strata reaps the benefits, allowing them to allocate more time to politics and leisure.

gov_cyber_oligarchy_collectivist.name: Oligarchic Sleepwork
gov_cyber_oligarchy_collectivist.description: Recent wetware advancements have made it possible to control people in their sleep. The subject's neural pathways are connected to servers, which feed the brain computational tasks or command their body to perform repetitive work. A real dream job.

gov_cyber_dictatorial_individualist.name: Dictatorial Cybervision
gov_cyber_dictatorial_individualist.description: Mandatory implantation provides robust control and law enforcement tools, strengthening the regime's grip over its subjects. The colloquially named "dictator-chips" monitor their owners and alert the authorities automatically if trouble arises.

gov_cyber_dictatorial_collectivist.name: Dictatorial Alignment
gov_cyber_dictatorial_collectivist.description: The dictator's cult of personality and reach over their subjects have been empowered via cybernetic implants. A people in awe of their leader are unlikely to rebel against the regime.

gov_cyber_imperial_individualist.name: Imperial Chipset
gov_cyber_imperial_individualist.description: The designated successor of the imperial throne inherits not only the position but a specialized implant passed through generations. It contains a wealth of priceless knowledge from their predecessors, imparting all types of wisdom on how to govern. The same technology is used throughout the empire in a lesser form, allowing other individuals to pass on their experiences onwards.

gov_cyber_imperial_collectivist.name: Imperial Network
gov_cyber_imperial_collectivist.description: The imperial network allows the entire population to access whole new avenues of mass-entertainment. A massive Cyberdome can be built to the capital to host ferocious cybersports with augmented athletes and broadcast this across multiple worlds.

gov_cyber_corporate_individualist.name: Corporate Neurocommerce
gov_cyber_corporate_individualist.description: Outmoded tools such as billboards and hand-held devices have failed to fully capture a consumer's attention. We can now scan the minds of potential customers and beam specific messaging and emphatic calls-to-action directly into an individual brain. This innovation also allows us to monitor visitors across our starbases for pirate activity, but is likely to create a demand for black market signal blockers.

gov_cyber_corporate_collectivist.name: Corporate Kaizen
gov_cyber_corporate_collectivist.description: Kaizen, the will to continuously improve, is a sound philosophy for the modern software and wetware environment. An extensive selection of upgrades affords our customer base individual achievement and the means towards social synergy. They also contain a backdoor for monitoring all users connected to starbase networks. However, the augments' substantial profit margins are likely to create an underground resale market.

gov_cyber_hive_volitional.name: Volitional Hive
gov_cyber_hive_volitional.description: Every drone, an individual. Every thought, a new perspective for the collective to consider. Countless minds form a Hive far greater than the sum of its parts.

gov_cyber_hive_integrated.name: Integrated Hive
gov_cyber_hive_integrated.description: Every deviation has been corrected, every anomaly curbed, every disunity rectified. The Hive Mind's control is absolute: one shared consciousness, and countless bodies to execute its will.

gov_cyber_creed_monarchy.name: Cybernetic Sovereignty
gov_cyber_creed_monarchy.description: This government is a techno-spiritualistic monarchy, where the ruler and their progeny are divine symbols of the holy fusion. The church directly supports the state apparatus.

gov_cyber_creed_dictatorship.name: Divine Technocracy
gov_cyber_creed_dictatorship.description: This government is a techno-spiritualistic dictatorship, ruled by a single augmented individual in a hierarchical power structure supported by the official faith.

gov_cyber_creed_oligarchy.name: Council of Technophants
gov_cyber_creed_oligarchy.description: This government is a techno-spiritualistic oligarchy in which political power rests in the hands of the nation's most powerful religious factions.

gov_cyber_creed_democracy.name: Transcended Republic
gov_cyber_creed_democracy.description: This government is a techno-spiritualistic form of democracy, where a religious council of augmented individuals supervises the democratic process.

gov_cyber_creed_divine_empire.name: Divine Augmented Empire
gov_cyber_creed_divine_empire.description: This government is a form of techno-spiritualistic autocracy. The official faith of the state is thread through every aspect of public life, and the people consider their augmented ruler an infallible living god.

gov_cyber_creed_megachurch.name: Augmented MegaChurch
gov_cyber_creed_megachurch.description: This government is an oligarchy based on a blend of commercial and techno-spiritualistic values, in which the positions of an ordained minister and corporate officer have merged into a single role.

gov_cyber_creed_holy_tribunal.name: Tribunal of Technophants
gov_cyber_creed_holy_tribunal.description: This government is a techno-spiritualistic form of oligarchy in which, guided by the will of the divine, a council of clergy controls all mechanisms of the state.

gov_cyber_creed_subversive_cult.name: Machine Cult
gov_cyber_creed_subversive_cult.description: This government is a religious cult that relies on various cybernetic-focused criminal and corporate enterprises to sustain itself.

gov_synth_democracy_physical.name: Democratic Transference
gov_synth_democracy_physical.description: This form of government affords unprecedented freedom of movement from one synthesized body to another, and is ready to deal with the additional cost it accrues.

gov_synth_democracy_virtual.name: Democratic Surrogacy
gov_synth_democracy_virtual.description: Replacing soldiers with sophisticated remotely operated surrogates lessens the impact of war on the populace. Ships can also be built slimmer, as the crew no longer requires quarters or cockpits.

gov_synth_oligarchy_physical.name: Oligarchic Override
gov_synth_oligarchy_physical.description: Synthetic oligarchies authorize top-level bureaucrats to temporarily take over the bodies of their underperforming peers to prevent process management catastrophes.

gov_synth_oligarchy_virtual.name: Oligarchic Supervision
gov_synth_oligarchy_virtual.description: Holistic project management protocols and extra processing resources empower high-ranking officials to monitor multiple empire-wide edicts with unprecedented efficiency.

gov_synth_dictatorship_physical.name: Dictatorial Manifold
gov_synth_dictatorship_physical.description: Synced neuro-connectors and the supporting infrastructure allows a single person to control multiple synthetic bodies simultaneously. This has a tremendous and positive effect on worker productivity.

gov_synth_dictatorship_virtual.name: Dictatorial Indoctrination
gov_synth_dictatorship_virtual.description: We now exist in a fully virtual world. Nothing is true. Everything can be manipulated. With complete control over the lived environment, public opinion is ours to mold. The people will believe what we want them to believe.

gov_synth_imperial_physical.name: Imperial Feedback
gov_synth_imperial_physical.description: We can accelerate our research efforts by dissecting the stored imprints of our departed leaders in the imperial memory archives. That way, they still contribute to the empire as they surely would have wanted. The imperial throne is inherited by the designated heir upon the ruler's death.

gov_synth_imperial_virtual.name: Imperial Transmission
gov_synth_imperial_virtual.description: Rapid mind transfer technology gives us a chance to send our fallen soldiers back to combat in fresh mechanical bodies. The same technique allows our workers to perform highly dangerous ship repairs in space. The imperial throne is inherited by the designated heir upon the ruler's death.

gov_synth_corporate_physical.name: Corporate Sapience
gov_synth_corporate_physical.description: Constrained synthetic minds can be imbued into inanimate objects to create rudimentary living entities. It can function as a tireless servant, loyal companion, or even a valued member of your family or business. Corporate governments are massive commercial enterprises that have wholly supplanted the state's role.

gov_synth_corporate_virtual.name: Corporate Recollection
gov_synth_corporate_virtual.description: This corporation deals in buying memories, permanently erasing them from the client's brain. Vivid and intense recollections are worth more than mundane ones. The corporation then scans the data for useful intel before finally integrating it into synth mind creation process. Corporate governments are massive commercial enterprises that have wholly supplanted the state's role.

gov_memory_aggregator.name: Memory Aggregator
gov_memory_aggregator.description: By streamlining the mental acuity of an assimilated population, a 'Memory in Aggregate' is formed, one capable of greatly improving all administrative and logistical tasks.

gov_neural_chorus.name: Neural Chorus
gov_neural_chorus.description: Allowing for greater variance in thought and a wider range of emotional responses facilitates the creation of a 'Neural Chorus' - a great song of minds, as powerful as it is beautiful.

gov_bio_democratic_phenotypical_autonomy.name: Phenotypical Autonomy
gov_bio_democratic_phenotypical_autonomy.description: Bodily self-determination is a right. The state empowers individuals to modify their vessels as they see fit. Limited only by their imagination, the body becomes the ultimate canvas.

gov_bio_imperial_biotic_dominion.name: Biotic Dominion
gov_bio_imperial_biotic_dominion.description: Championing genetic excellence, this government extends its leaders' lifespans while relentlessly pursuing biotic perfection. Society's prosperity hinges on the survival and propagation of only the finest genes, ensuring a future defined by superiority. The unyielding curation of the genetic pool guarantees progress, with longevity and perfection as its ultimate rewards.

gov_bio_oligarchic_eugenic_hierarchy.name: Eugenic Hierarchy
gov_bio_oligarchic_eugenic_hierarchy.description: Absolute power must be entrusted to the genetically ordained elite, the purest and most capable stewards of this civilization's destiny. Beneath them, each citizen fulfills a predefined role, meticulously tailored to their inherited genetic potential. Contentment flows not from ambition, but from accepting one's designated purpose.

gov_bio_corporate_organic_syndicate.name: Organic Syndicate
gov_bio_corporate_organic_syndicate.description: This megacorp has perfected the commodification of life itself, cultivating organs for profit. Premium-quality organs command top prices, while "redundant" assets may find their way onto the black market. Shadowy intermediaries and black-market surgeons thrive, catering to desperate buyers and ensuring no asset is ever truly wasted.

gov_bio_dictatorial_nucleic_judiciary.name: Nucleic Judiciary
gov_bio_dictatorial_nucleic_judiciary.description: This government wields genetic and biometric data as tools of pre-emptive justice, scrutinizing every citizen's genetic code for criminal predispositions. By intervening before transgression, it ensures order through meticulous oversight. True justice is not reactive but preventive, safeguarding society by eliminating crime at the root.

gov_bio_hive_mind_purity_paradigm.name: Purity Paradigm
gov_bio_hive_mind_purity_paradigm.description: This hive flourishes through unwavering genetic purity, ensuring every drone adheres to the ideal biological template. Precision genetic manipulation enhances unity and fortifies collective strength, creating an unstoppable force honed for efficiency and survival.

gov_bio_democratic_cordant_multiplicity.name: Cordant Multiplicity
gov_bio_democratic_cordant_multiplicity.description: This government embraces cloning technology as a testament to equality and progress. Clones stand shoulder to shoulder with natural-born individuals, their voices equally valued. The will of the people is enriched by the diversity of every perspective, clone or not.

gov_bio_oligarchic_replicating_regency.name: Replicating Regency
gov_bio_oligarchic_replicating_regency.description: This society ensures the eternal reign of its elites by anchoring power within the unbroken lineage of superior clones. Cloning technology preserves and perfects their genetic legacy, enabling a seamless continuity of leadership. Every position of influence is occupied by an improved iteration of the same exalted line, entrenching their dominance across generations.

gov_bio_imperial_hereditary_continuity.name: Hereditary Continuity
gov_bio_imperial_hereditary_continuity.description: The unquestionable righteousness of the ruler is preserved through cloning, with each iteration of the grand sovereign inheriting the wisdom and triumphs of their past lives. This seamless continuity of leadership ensures the perpetual advancement of society, sustaining an eternal golden age under their enlightened reign.

gov_bio_corporate_replicatory_associatio.name: Replicatory Association
gov_bio_corporate_replicatory_associatio.description: Unmatched convenience and comfort are now within reach. Acquire a clone of yourself for spare parts or commission a replica of a lost loved one. This megacorp guarantees a 93% accuracy rate in every duplication, blending cutting-edge technology with the promise of solace through precise replication.

gov_bio_dictatorial_homogenous_submissio.name: Homogenous Submission
gov_bio_dictatorial_homogenous_submissio.description: Absolute loyalty is ensured through meticulous genetic selection, with only those hardwired for unwavering obedience chosen as cloning stock. This creates a self-perpetuating society where rebellion is not only improbable but biologically impossible, securing unbroken harmony through the very fabric of its citizens' design.

gov_bio_hive_mind_replicating_horde.name: Replicating Horde
gov_bio_hive_mind_replicating_horde.description: Advanced cloning technology drives the relentless production of genetically identical drones, each engineered for perfect efficiency and unity. Obeying the innate command to go forth and multiply, this hive intends to blot out the stars.

gov_bio_democratic_biodiverse_liberty.name: Biodiverse Liberty
gov_bio_democratic_biodiverse_liberty.description: This society upholds the principle that each individual's body is their temple, fully under their own design and control. Within a framework of freedom and unwavering support, citizens are empowered to realize their unique potential, shaping themselves and their futures as they see fit.

gov_bio_democratic_evopred_mutation.name: Genetic Electorate
gov_bio_democratic_evopred_mutation.description: While difficult to manage, this society has gained partial control over their malleable genome. The people will decide how their mutations will manifest.

gov_bio_oligarchic_catalytic_command.name: Catalytic Command
gov_bio_oligarchic_catalytic_command.description: Power is concentrated in an elite class endowed with superior genetic mutations, granting them unparalleled authority. Operating beyond the confines of ordinary law, they wield their abilities to protect and guide society, taking whatever actions are deemed necessary to ensure its survival and prosperity.

gov_bio_oligarchic_evopred_mutation.name: Bio-Magnates
gov_bio_oligarchic_evopred_mutation.description: In this society, time has been conquered. By meticulously selecting only the most pristine genetic stock, the ruling elites ascend to a timeless existence. Yet a single misstep can mean forfeiting eternity, and for those beneath them, ambition and evolution are two faces of the same coin...

gov_bio_imperial_genomic_expansionist.name: Genomic Expansionist
gov_bio_imperial_genomic_expansionist.description: Embracing the unpredictable power of random mutation, this empire taps into untold potential, fostering innovations and abilities that traditional methods could never achieve. In the race for dominance, the chaos of mutation becomes their greatest advantage, propelling them toward unrivaled supremacy.

gov_bio_imperial_evopred_mutation.name: Deathless Dynasty
gov_bio_imperial_evopred_mutation.description: In the Deathless Dynasty, the past does not rest - it is consumed. Each generation nourishes the next, as the remains of departed leaders sustain the undying rule of the empire. To serve is to sacrifice, and in death, all subjects feed the legacy of their forebears.

gov_bio_corporate_organ_usury.name: Organ Usury
gov_bio_corporate_organ_usury.description: Under this authority, the financing of organs and body parts is made accessible to all through flexible payment plans. Missed payments result in swift repossession or the forfeiture of agreed-upon collateral. This system ensures a steady supply and demand cycle, where every body part is both a commodity and a commitment.

gov_bio_corporate_evopred_mutation.name: BioPredation GLC
gov_bio_corporate_evopred_mutation.description: At BioPredation GLC, they thrive on adaptation - both genetic and economic. With every new genome added to the corporate portfolio, the MegaCorp refines its market position, tailoring products and negotiations to every species' unique biology. After all, understanding a customer's nature makes closing the deal almost... instinctual.

gov_bio_dictatorial_hybrid_mandate.name: Hybrid Mandate
gov_bio_dictatorial_hybrid_mandate.description: This society mandates genetic mutation as the cornerstone of its advancement. Those who are content to remain as nature made them face immediate internment or termination, ensuring that only the genetically superior contribute to the species' relentless drive toward perfection.

gov_bio_dictatorial_evopred_mutation.name: Apex Principate
gov_bio_dictatorial_evopred_mutation.description: A civilization forged by constant evolution, ruled by a supreme apex mind. No council nor constitution can overshadow the Principate's superior will. Here, every genetic victory fuels the throne's ascension.

gov_bio_hive_mind_adaptive_dominion.name: Adaptive Dominion
gov_bio_hive_mind_adaptive_dominion.description: This Hive's hyper-adaptive drones form a dynamic and ever-evolving force, leveraging constant mutation to overcome environmental and tactical challenges. Each adaptation strengthens the collective, ensuring unparalleled versatility and resilience as the Hive mind thrives in any condition.
