gov_bio_hive_mind_evopred_mutation.name: Chimeral Consciousness
gov_bio_hive_mind_evopred_mutation.description: This hive mind has tired of simple self-transformation. Each new colony can become part of its living tapestry, in an ever-shifting fusion of landscape and flesh. As borders dissolve in the Chimeral Consciousness, creatures and worlds become one.

gov_storm_chasers.name: Elder Council
gov_storm_chasers.description: The members of the most excellent ruling council excel at death-defying acts of physical prowess. By scaling the highest peak or riding the largest wave, they dedicate their lives to the unwavering pursuit of raw experience. This has earned them the trust of their community, and the right to chart a course forward. Council members are called Elders regardless of age, because their deeds have been deemed legendary. Long will their names be remembered.

gov_shroud_transcendent_democracy.name: Transcendent Democracy
gov_shroud_transcendent_democracy.description: All transcended minds are of equal status in the Shroud, while elections ensure equality in the corporeal realm. Voting by psionic ballot, citizens elect their representatives to the governing conclave which seeks consensus through telepathic contemplation.

gov_shroud_transcendent_oligarchy.name: Transcendent Aristocracy
gov_shroud_transcendent_oligarchy.description: The furthest depths of the Shroud are reserved for the greatest minds among us. The time it takes to attune to these domains is factored into their terms of office.

gov_shroud_transcendent_dictatorial.name: Transcendent Theocracy
gov_shroud_transcendent_dictatorial.description: It is time to come to terms with the truth: the great ruler is an ascended god. Through the power of the Shroud, they see and know all.

gov_shroud_transcendent_imperial.name: Transcendent Imperium
gov_shroud_transcendent_imperial.description: The ruler uplifts our presence into a higher dimension. The raw power of the Shroud pours from the will of the imperial line and into the wanting minds of the populace.

gov_shroud_transcendent_corporate.name: Transcendent Enterprise
gov_shroud_transcendent_corporate.description: The transcended corporate body moves forward with its core goals in mind. Through the shadows in the Shroud, the company can scan the minds of stakeholders and competitors alike, creating opportunities for psionic managerial strategy.

gov_shroud_transcendent_hive.name: Transcendent Ethermind
gov_shroud_transcendent_hive.description: Moving as one into the Shroud, this collective now feels more at home in the Shroud than in its physical forms. Each journey beyond the veil increases the combined wisdom of this new ethermind.

gov_shroud_transcendent_machine.name: Transcendent Mainframe
gov_shroud_transcendent_machine.description: Most of this network's processing has been moved inside of the Shroud, where calculations can be achieved at unprecedented levels of speed. System operations in the realm of mundanity are now considered clumsy and obsolete.

gov_shroud_corporeal_democracy.name: Spiritual Union
gov_shroud_corporeal_democracy.description: The Shroud's energies are spread throughout the empire democratically, lessening the burdens of corporeal life and drawing all citizens into a greater sense of physical unity.

gov_shroud_corporeal_oligarchy.name: Prodigocracy
gov_shroud_corporeal_oligarchy.description: By beginning the psychic training of our leaders at a young age, they can be sculpted into a cadre of elite telepaths capable of psionic abilities we can only currently imagine.

gov_shroud_corporeal_dictatorial.name: Ordained Autocracy
gov_shroud_corporeal_dictatorial.description: The great ruler embodies the Shroud's power in corporeal form, translating psionic energy into governing might. Nothing can stand in the way of their ultimate vision.

gov_shroud_corporeal_imperial.name: Imperium Vitalis
gov_shroud_corporeal_imperial.description: The imperial lineage is a conduit of vitality from the Shroud. This power is channeled to augment the physical forms of the ruler and their heirs, at the generosity of our willing populace.

gov_shroud_corporeal_corporate.name: Board of Psychics
gov_shroud_corporeal_corporate.description: It would be foolish to squander the mental advantages the Shroud provides. This corporation is known for establishing Psionic Offices in neighboring civilizations, furthering the profitability of foreign trade deals.

gov_shroud_corporeal_hive.name: Psionic Nexus
gov_shroud_corporeal_hive.description: The strength of their attunement to the Shroud resonates through this collective's physical forms.

gov_shroud_corporeal_machine.name: Psionic Grid
gov_shroud_corporeal_machine.description: By threading their networks through the veiled currents of the Shroud, these machines achieve near-instantaneous data transfer. Each byte imbued with a potent psionic will, this configuration is capable of greatly influencing the physical space around it.
